name: Eddie Seay
subject: We’d love to hear from you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
freedomva.org [freedomva.org]
Freedom Virginia has been working to establish a Prescription Drug Affordability Board in Virginia for years.
An important part of our advocacy comes from having real stories of the impact of rising prescription costs in Virginia.
We are reaching out to our supporters, not to ask for contributions, but for something more valuable: can you share your experience with us?
If you have a story you would be willing to share you can fill out our form here.
Visit our form here [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScVuX1t13Jy8hn0lVLB63gXZ7r2kdrJBJ39MoFEevbla7orSQ/viewform?usp=sf_link]
A great example of where those stories go is our annual storybook. When advocating to legislators about the importance of passing a PDAB we bring a book with us full of stories like these from real Virginians.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/story%20blitz%202%20am.png]
Your story will help us remind legislators why a PDAB is so important in Virginia.
Thank you for your support!
Eddie Seay,
Organizing Director

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
**Happy Hanukkah!
Merry Christmas!
Blessed Kwanzaa!**

When members of Congress take the oath of office, they place their hands on the Christian Bible, the Hebrew Bible, or the Quran and swear to God that they will uphold the Constitution of the United States.

But it’s more than an official act. It is a testament to the religious freedom that the Founders enshrined in the Constitution.

While we celebrate the religious traditions of Hanukkah and Christmas at this time of year, as well as the cultural tradition of Kwanzaa, we also can take time to celebrate the fact that these observances are equally respected in the _American_ tradition. The joyful practice of faith and recollection of history they embody are something that all Americans of any faith and no faith can celebrate.

**Happy Holidays and a prosperous 2024 to you and your family!**

Rick

subject: What it takes to WIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
I don’t have much time, so here goes....
[](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=78c408f00cd04d00807a29f28321e1b2&_e=kHrK2q-zXPBD0BPgahM9XGE9GK31LeYhG_hUBiR37sT6eqOuH7jrnuHdF5Dv4IUgs6xs6J5Nf7ym7dRj49-7U1w9gBzgDR8g2RL1UHW3MhDysZfabYaugeL_7ZHd-Oy-9PfM2HGpdOIjop65ztiV462aHUmpgY26G9-l8CVHEHqfK6WGt1Pach9EJaMV4WuafSbcc8SWgzPSBSZLk9brHfmbE8eyKtUYO3eUFu7nj6CamJc9MALGYR_NtpQjhh_2rOzepAZVQk3GVMaaExCQ_NgGXKk6hsJ3mNpubB6hZG9srLiJOzMRJyFiqTHXgYoU1QU8ODskRmDISQcPv518VL5MpSGdGcXGbEK9-rvoqY_0co7De9EqYM9lzvFSSAZO)

Fellow American,

When I'm on the campaign trail, I get asked all the time why I'm running for Senate. It's not easy. I've opened myself and my family up to attacks from the far left, and every day feels like a battle.

But I believe in America's strength and resilience. And I believe our nation needs leaders who place selfless service to others above all else. As a West Point grad, former paratrooper and business leader, _**I 've seen what it takes to lead and get things done.**_

**America is at an inflection point. If we don 't elect leaders to go to DC to clean up the mess the career politicians have made, we will lose America as we know it! **

Here's where I need you, Fellow American. I'm approaching my first fundraising goal of the campaign, and I'm afraid it's looking like we are going to come up short of the goal we set. And if we don't hit this goal, our chances of flipping the Senate are GONE. I hate asking for money. I'm not a career politician, and it's not in my nature, but I have no choice but to ask if we're going to hit our end-of-year goal. _**[Will you chip in $25 or more right now?](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=78c408f00cd04d00807a29f28321e1b2&_e=kHrK2q-zXPBD0BPgahM9XGE9GK31LeYhG_hUBiR37sT6eqOuH7jrnuHdF5Dv4IUgs6xs6J5Nf7ym7dRj49-7U1w9gBzgDR8g2RL1UHW3MhDysZfabYaugeL_7ZHd-Oy-9PfM2HGpdOIjop65ztiV462aHUmpgY26G9-l8CVHEHqfK6WGt1Pach9EJaMV4WuafSbcc8SWgzPSBSZLk9brHfmbE8eyKtUYO3eUFu7nj6CL8czDzsNlhDYCMscytK08M2qeJbk8S1xxEMC-gnfgzNr6DEcjfhW3D0cVSyE1KSyMribi-OxRV-QBXj_fVqrnp8gECV26Bgek6lEaln7JMU570yM6PgVuFtB6uCg5KjvTciUtoD9lES2L_QoVhNK2) **_

Chuck Schumer and his allies are working overtime to stuff my opponent's campaign coffers. They know if I win this race in Pennsylvania, it's IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to keep their majority in the Senate. If we don't show the Democrats we can win this race, it's game over. That's why I'm hoping you can spare **[$15, $25, or even $75 to help me finish the quarter strong!](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=78c408f00cd04d00807a29f28321e1b2&_e=kHrK2q-zXPBD0BPgahM9XGE9GK31LeYhG_hUBiR37sT6eqOuH7jrnuHdF5Dv4IUgs6xs6J5Nf7ym7dRj49-7U1w9gBzgDR8g2RL1UHW3MhDysZfabYaugeL_7ZHd-Oy-9PfM2HGpdOIjop65ztiV462aHUmpgY26G9-l8CVHEHqfK6WGt1Pach9EJaMV4WuafSbcc8SWgzPSBSZLk9brHfmbE8eyKtUYO3eUFu7nj6D0hsK93hP6dqChKWgqQ9XOmxWn6eXN0keconj6-OCavKCaTKt5KCmtfusNJrmNCrDhzqx1WCSiG5yE9T3SYoavb1yYEYDCtOkNnENPH8ixZC6QPJTsexQ1ZQZ3xWROGXmZMj9Fxgf5gs6pVWdkF_Jh)**
[DONATE](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=78c408f00cd04d00807a29f28321e1b2&_e=kHrK2q-zXPBD0BPgahM9XGE9GK31LeYhG_hUBiR37sT6eqOuH7jrnuHdF5Dv4IUgs6xs6J5Nf7ym7dRj49-7U1w9gBzgDR8g2RL1UHW3MhDysZfabYaugeL_7ZHd-Oy-9PfM2HGpdOIjop65ztiV462aHUmpgY26G9-l8CVHEHqfK6WGt1Pach9EJaMV4WuafSbcc8SWgzPSBSZLk9brHfmbE8eyKtUYO3eUFu7nj6CKOeXHxAhgDTiwZjklGKt56XEwOhbe0nU6_hgrEXHBYdpg6-9y0bTsU6jaSclVa_udsN5Xn_3mUqkuENZFOLh6r1cH1ENgh0Wf8b24WoDdhB6cVyIEln1NUxh61Skrv02JVZ_pQ_PaLzr4jQ4TZfKk)

Your donation will take us one step closer to victory, and I am so grateful for your support.

Thank you,
Dave McCormick

P.S. Democrats from all over the country are pouring money into this race to defeat me because they know this race could flip the Senate red. **[Will you chip in $30 to make sure I have the resources to WIN?](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=78c408f00cd04d00807a29f28321e1b2&_e=kHrK2q-zXPBD0BPgahM9XGE9GK31LeYhG_hUBiR37sT6eqOuH7jrnuHdF5Dv4IUgs6xs6J5Nf7ym7dRj49-7U1w9gBzgDR8g2RL1UHW3MhDysZfabYaugeL_7ZHd-Oy-9PfM2HGpdOIjop65ztiV462aHUmpgY26G9-l8CVHEHqfK6WGt1Pach9EJaMV4WuafSbcc8SWgzPSBSZLk9brHfmbE8eyKtUYO3eUFu7nj6CYjQaMqCA3oxQ73rPS9drezP40p998IOTzfz2D7y2O2pEuZblnSLIfv836PwXTqUXGVFzwHFYUgsSZl74Z0Hd18TZ_vQhzg6_p8_Q4hzx9lm3dWQBKM222m4mSTddRz9_xut3hND2XHfGZPdWU0hfB)**

body:
we are about to lose everything | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b1493474854a/the-judge-ruled-against-us?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=be61f31ab1&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Peter,
---
| | A recent development has emerged that significantly impacts our fight to maintain a Conservative Republican majority. A New York court decision has given Democrats an inside track on redistricting, potentially leading to the loss of five competitive congressional seats This makes our seat in Nevada even more crucial to maintain and build the Conservative Republican Majority under Speaker Mike Johnson and, God willing, _under President Donald J. Trump._
---
| [****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=d0416e03af&e=54a81bd33c)[****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=e71d513e5d&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| The stakes have never been higher, and [your support is now more critical than ever.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=c90bbb3ac8&e=54a81bd33c) We must rally together to counter this strategic move by the Democrats and ensure our voices are not drowned out.

---
|
---
| [Rush Your Support – Every Dollar Makes a Difference](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=a3ca5dac29&e=54a81bd33c "Rush Your Support – Every Dollar Makes a Difference")
---

It's not just about one seat or one state; it's about the future of our nation and our values. We need to stand united and fight back with everything we've got.

I'm counting on you, the backbone of our movement, to step up in this crucial hour. Let's show the Democrats that we are resilient, determined, and ready to fight for what we believe in.

Thank you for [your unwavering support.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=7d3c256b86&e=54a81bd33c) Together, we will overcome this challenge and continue our mission to put America first.

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: how doughnuts will save our Senate majority 🍩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
a huge opportunity
| | | Friend, I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $150,000 end-of-quarter goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority.
---
**[(If you're short on time and ready to retire Rick Scott next fall, you can help me make up this fundraising gap and flip Florida blue by clicking here to split a gift between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75670279/445388711/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4674-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTQ0Y2RlNC0yNmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDtLIfGw6GSQ5A_pwCcTG4tvq2td4I6tVwsmMdWdU7k=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75670280/445388712/-1568314327?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4674-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTQ0Y2RlNC0yNmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDtLIfGw6GSQ5A_pwCcTG4tvq2td4I6tVwsmMdWdU7k=)** | When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment. **So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop.** It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality. We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. **I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate.** **Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change. _And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign next November._**
---
**[That's why I'm asking you to chip in just $10 — about the cost of a dozen doughnuts — to send me to the Senate. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand before my end-of-month deadline to help me defeat Rick Scott? This campaign is powered by small-dollar donations, and every single gift makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75670281/445388713/-1568314327?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4674-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTQ0Y2RlNC0yNmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yDtLIfGw6GSQ5A_pwCcTG4tvq2td4I6tVwsmMdWdU7k=)**

clean_body: a huge opportunity | | | Friend, I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $150,000 end-of-quarter goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority. = = | When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment. So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality. We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate. Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change. And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign next November. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | *

name: Will Rollins
subject: We have the receipts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58589?t=6&akid=12177%2E878179%2EhkZih8) Friend,

There aren't many Republicans in Congress with records quite as extreme as Ken Calvert's.

_Democracy:_
No on certifying President Biden's victory in 2020

_LGBTQ issues:_
No on the Matthew Shepard & James Byrd Hate Crimes Prevention Act
No on recognizing gay marriage nationally, and sought to ban it in California
He publicly outed a former Democratic opponent

_Women’s rights:_
No on the right to Contraception Act
No on the Violence Against Women Act
No on the Equal Rights Amendment
No on the Fair Pay Act

_Sensible gun laws:_
No on assault weapons ban
No on expanding background checks
No on the Protecting Our Kids Act
Yes to expand conceal and carry laws
Yes to protect firearms manufacturers from lawsuits

_The environment:_
No on the Inflation Reduction Act which made historic investments in clean energy
No on protecting people from toxic incinerators
No on recovering America’s wildlife
No on investing in transportation and water infrastructure
No on cracking down on oil company price gouging

**I've said this before, and I still mean it: Lives are at stake in the coming 2024 elections. LGBTQ+ rights are at stake. Our democracy is at stake. The right to choose is at stake -- and so much more.**

[**Stopping the GOP from retaining House control starts by ousting Ken Calvert here in CA-41. That's why I'm all in on electing Will Rollins, and it's why I'm counting on your support. Please split an urgent $10 between Voter Protection Project and Will’s campaign today.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58589?t=7&akid=12177%2E878179%2EhkZih8) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58590?t=8&akid=12177%2E878179%2EhkZih8)

name: LCV Shop
subject: Unwrap holiday savings all December long
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzsVpga~tN/eEN0THBEVk5mQzZKWVF3YUh3SktZcG1tMmpaUlIvZjFpd0FyWjMyeUM1N0xPMWRlSW5ibTE1c2l1L2gyakY0SXNWUnIrWjJqejNKaWlkMDBmeTlubncwanE1YXZpWWJUZzhzdTlWVzlobFk9S0/S1llaDM4R0NWeGZwS28vMnBuc3BPRXhYTGczZW5Ba3hnZjQzTVlLeUNTNWZSQjltM2NOU0dKcitjNzhXMEVMODZtRWdMdWpkb3g0YnFSU0FaWEdWMTlOWHBocVFNZUdQME1pZXlJam9nZW89S0 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10372758&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDMwMDE0NgS2&spReportId=MTg4MDMwMDE0NgS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10372758&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDMwMDE0NgS2&spReportId=MTg4MDMwMDE0NgS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~w2rPhv/eEN0THBEVk5mQzZKWVF3YUh3SktZcG1tMmpaUlIvZjFpd0FyWjMyeUM1N0xPMWRlSW5ibTE1c2l1L2gyakY0SXNWUnIrWjJqejNKaWlkMDBmeTlubncwanE1YXZpWWJUZzhzdTlWVzlobFk9S0/

They're investing in the future they can get behind. They know, just like you, that we're in the fight to beat back MAGA extremism and secure the progress we’ve worked so hard to make, and the only way forward is to reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. But winning an election isn't going to be easy, and we're grateful to have folks from all across the country by our side. A donation of $42.21 may not seem like it will make a difference, but every little bit counts. Thanks for your support. We're grateful to have you with us. Team Biden-Harris

## [PRIORITIES](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=84f662f625&e=fc26432468) | [VOLUNTEER](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=5cf6f5698d&e=fc26432468) | [MEDIA |](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=b2b2a49434&e=fc26432468) [CONTRIBUTE](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=a8e37d3bdb&e=fc26432468)

---
| | |
---
| Peter -
---
| _**Merry Christmas!**_** ** 🎄 The rumor at the North Pole is that Santa’s sleigh will be a little lighter this year. And I can’t blame him; Bidenomics** and the terrible policies enacted by our elected officials have increased the cost of everything.** It’s no wonder that even Saint Nick is feeling the pinch.

The combined cost for the dozen gifts featured in the final verse of “The Twelve Days of Christmas” has reached an all-time high of $46,730. That's $1,207 higher than last year’s price tag – and a 19.8% increase since President Joe Biden took office, according to the 40th annual [PNC Christmas Price Index](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=ebbe24e0ac&e=fc26432468).

While most of us won’t be impacted by the 25% price hike in the price of two turtle doves, _my wallet is quite a bit lighter this Christmas because of the nearly 63% [increase in the cost](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=c94bb863eb&e=fc26432468) of buying a bag of basic grocery store staples_ like bread, milk, toilet paper, and laundry detergent since last year. And I bet yours is, too.

Christmas is both a blessing and a struggle for so many of us. **_As a kid, I watched my mom use layaway plans and pick up side jobs cleaning houses so my sister and I would have presents under the tree._**

That’s one of the memories that motivates me to _fight to make life easier and more affordable for every American_.

As an economist, I understand that **inflation is caused by failed government policies**. Washington must _stop printing money to pay for wasteful and unconstitutional government programs_. Americans can’t afford for Congress to continue artificially increasing the price at the pump and the cost of electric bills by _limiting our domestic energy production in the name of green virtue signaling_.

As a taxpayer watchdog, columnist, and advisor to federal lawmakers at some of America’s most influential conservative organizations, **_I’ve saved taxpayers more than $60 billion_** by exposing waste, fraud, and abuse of YOUR tax dollars and working with lawmakers to slash wasteful spending.

**As a member of Congress, I will respect your money and make damn sure that every dollar is spent carefully.**

I have one Christmas wish this year: your support for our campaign.

Your generous contribution will empower us to share our message of fiscal conservatism, individual empowerment, and limited government with every corner of our district. Please visit [www.DrewForNevada.com](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=ae73b9dea4&e=fc26432468) today. If you prefer to send your contribution by mail, please send a check to **Drew for Nevada, 5325 S. Fort Apache Road, Suite D-31, Las Vegas, NV 89148**.

_December 31 is a CRUCIAL fundraising deadline, so please help us meet our year-end goals._

Let's make a difference together this Christmas. Regardless of the amount, your contribution will play a vital role in building a more fiscally responsible future for our children and grandchildren.

If Bidenomics has left you unable to contribute to our campaign financially, please consider volunteering your time or hosting an event by signing up at [https://drewfornevada.com/volunteer/](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=f18f8689ac&e=fc26432468).

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our shared American values. Sarah and I wish you and yours a Christmas filled with warmth and love.
---

| PS - If you know someone who would be interested in learning more about my campaign to flip NV-03, please [forward them this email](https://us14.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=a8be0ed275&e=fc26432468).

As always, thank you for your [continued support of our campaign](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=bfcf10ce1c&e=fc26432468)! No matter the amount -- whether it's $5, $55, or $500 -- every dollar makes a difference!
---
|
---
|
# _**Drew Supports Constitutional Term Limits**_
Drew has joined with U.S. Term Limits to sign the Term Limits Pledge. Once elected, Drew will cosponsor and vote for the U.S. Term Limits Amendment limiting House members to 3 terms and Senators to 2 terms.
---
|
---
|
---
|
#
_**On the Campaign Trail**_
---
| Drew was a featured guest this year at **Turning Point USA's** **America Fest 2023** in Phoenix! Drew spoke about his background as a government watchdog and taxpayer advocate with thousands of like-minded patriots in attendance.
---
|
---
| Drew was honored to attend the grand opening and ribbon cutting for [**Power2Parent's**](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=40b1703b68&e=fc26432468) brand new office in Southern Nevada! Power2Parent is a parental rights organization that fights to ensure all students have access to a high-quality education that fits their learning needs.
---
|
---
---
| Drew and Sarah attended the **American for Prosperity Nevada's **End of Year Gala. Nevada is blessed to have AFP NV's passionate leadership team, including Ronnie Najarro and Wiz Rouzard, as well as their army of inspiring volunteers fighting to advance liberty, limited government, and the American Dream.
---
|
---
|
#
_**In the Media**_
---
| Drew appeared on **Live & Local** with **Dr. Laurence Schiff** on KZZZ 94.1 FM. They spoke about inflation, school choice, and everyone's favorite... the Golden Knights! Dr. Schiff's radio show reaches the southern area of Nevada's 3rd congressional district, including Laughlin, Palm Gardens, Cal-Nev-Ari, and Searchlight.
---
|
---
|
---
| Last, but certainly not least, Drew was profiled by** _ _**_**Star News Digital Media**_! Here are some excerpts from the article, which you can find **[HERE](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=0baa999643&e=fc26432468)**

“I am very proud that I was able to make government less expensive,” Drew told the** **_Star News**, **_adding that “**people make better decisions about their lives than government** ” and “dictating people’s lives at the government level is not the best way to solve things.”

“The rate of inflation in Clark County, in the Las Vegas metro area, is much higher even than the rest of the country.” Drew continued, “[A]nd one of the reasons why things are worse is because **our housing prices, and as a result our rent prices, are skyrocketing because the federal government owns 89 percent of Clark County**.”

Drew stressed, “One of the things I am going to fight for is to **put Nevada’s land back in the hands of Nevadans**.”

Speaking in opposition to social media censorship Drew said, “**There’s no place for using power gained through political favoritism to silence what Americans see, to silence Americans’ views**. It’s just so fundamentally anti-American, it disgusts me.”

**Click the image below** to read the whole thing!
---
| [ ](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=b8e89d7d70&e=fc26432468)
---
|
---
|
# _YOU Can Help Us Defeat Susie Lee!_
Want to help Drew? This race is going to be tight, and having the help of supporters like you is the only way we can win!

Here are the **_TOP 3_ ways _YOU_ can get involved:**

1. **Donate: **Simply chipping in a few dollars to support our efforts is incredibly helpful. Whether it's $3 or $3,000, every donation makes a _huge_ difference! Just $18 buys coffee and donuts for volunteers! **You can contribute to the campaign [HERE](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=51644b15c4&e=fc26432468)**.

2. **Host a Meet-and-Greet for Drew** : Hosting a Meet-and-Greet in your home for Drew and inviting your friends, family, and neighbors is one of the _best ways to spread our message_. Whether it’s a casual coffee meeting, a wine and cheese event, or an energetic Golden Knights watch party, we can make hosting a get-together fun and easy. Interested in hosting a Meet-and-Greet? Email [linnea@drewfornevada.com](mailto:linnea@drewfornevada.com?subject=I'd%20like%20to%20host%20a%20Meet%20%26%20Greet%20for%20Drew!).

3. **Volunteer for the Campaign:** #TeamDrew is the secret weapon that will get Drew elected to Congress. We need to knock on tens of thousands of doors, write thousands of postcards, and make as many phone calls as possible to make this campaign a success...and we can't do it without you! Please visit** **[THIS](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=3370a38cee&e=fc26432468) link to join #TeamDrew as a volunteer.

It's Chuck Schumer. One of the most important races on the ballot next year is Debbie's race in Florida. She's running against Republican Rick Scott, a self-funded MAGA extremist who's already shelled out millions in attack ads.
**The fact is, Debbie needs a huge push of grassroots resources to compete with Scott.** And with less than a year until the election, we need all hands on deck. **[So please, will you rush $5 to help Debbie hit her $300,000 goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75670572/445405121/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk516-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDE5Nzk1N2UtMmNhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gKrdssJ3UaTOcnX1sP31sqmel87kkwxEEqDI1eLlYVU=)**

I'm watching Debbie's race very closely, and I've never been more convinced that we can flip Florida blue:
* Debbie jumped into the race amidst **a huge outpouring of grassroots support** from folks like you — last quarter, _she outraised Rick Scott_ , even though she only had a few weeks before fundraising numbers went public.

* Polling data shows that Debbie's campaign had already made this race a **statistical TIE** , and election experts at _CNN_ have officially ranked Rick Scott as **one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators** in 2024.
* And if Debbie wins in Florida, _Democrats will be virtually _guaranteed_ to maintain our narrow Senate majority_ next year!

**This news is exciting for Democrats like me. But Mitch McConnell and Rick Scott will do anything to thwart our progress — you can bet that they're not going to sit by and let Debbie flip Florida blue without a fight.**
This _will_ be one of the most expensive races in the country (and maybe even in history). Debbie needs strong grassroots resources NOW if she wants to compete with Rick Scott's massive fortune. [We can't slow down for even a minute here: Please, donate $5 before midnight to help Debbie hit her critical $300,000 goal and save our Senate majority next year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75670574/445405124/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk516-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDE5Nzk1N2UtMmNhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gKrdssJ3UaTOcnX1sP31sqmel87kkwxEEqDI1eLlYVU=)

clean_body: we can't settle | | | = Friend, It's Chuck Schumer. One of the most important races on the ballot next year is Debbie's race in Florida. She's running against Republican Rick Scott, a self-funded MAGA extremist who's already shelled out millions in attack ads. The fact is, Debbie needs a huge push of grassroots resources to compete with Scott. And with less than a year until the election, we need all hands on deck. = | | = I'm watching Debbie's race very closely, and I've never been more convinced that we can flip Florida blue: Debbie jumped into the race amidst a huge outpouring of grassroots support from folks like you — last quarter, she outraised Rick Scott , even though she only had a few weeks before fundraising numbers went public. Polling data shows that Debbie's campaign had already made this race a statistical TIE , and election experts at CNN have officially ranked Rick Scott as one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators in 2024. And if Debbie wins in Florida, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our narrow Senate majority next year! This news is exciting for Democrats like me. But Mitch McConnell and Rick Scott will do anything to thwart our progress — you can bet that they're not going to sit by and let Debbie flip Florida blue without a fight. This will be one of the most expensive races in the country (and maybe even in history). Debbie needs strong grassroots resources NOW if she wants to compete with Rick Scott's massive fortune. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Chuck Schumer | | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

# Did Colorado removing from Trump from the ballot boost his poll numbers?
Trump’s pollster Jim McLaughlin joined us to talk about the ruling in Colorado removing Trump from the ballot and how it might POSITIVELY impact his poll numbers. I also talk to Congressman Derrick Van Orden about funding for Ukraine, the recent passage of NDAA and the latest on the hostages being held in Gaza.
Watch here:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8998ee8ec9&e=f6564bbe3b)

**And just like you Friend, I'm 100% conservative.**

According to Sleepy Joe Biden, that makes us "political extremists."

My name is Derrick Van Orden.

You probably haven't heard of me, but I'm a Ret. Navy SEAL Senior Chief & Afghanistan & Iraq War veteran from a rural town you've never heard of before. I did 5 combat deployments.

__I went to war against REAL extremists like al-Qaeda and the Taliban.__

body:
If you're gonna write in a clown, make it Bozo.

| | Derek, We just held a press conference in Concord and delivered the following message:
**Joe Biden is determined to put an end to our First in the Nation Primary, but we will not allow this disrespect to occur unchecked.**
Over the past year, he’s sent a clear message to Granite Staters about what he thinks about our FITN primary – he doesn’t care; New Hampshire’s proud electoral process can be disrespected, disregarded, ignored, skipped, and dishonored without a second thought.
He forced the DNC to change its rules. He refused to file for our Presidential Primary. He’s disrespected and diminished the importance of New Hampshire at every turn, he hasn't traveled to our state since early spring of 2022 - but he found time to visit Massachusetts earlier this month.
In every instance, when it came to ending New Hampshire's First in the Nation Presidential Primary, Joe Biden failed.
In the last few weeks, leading New Hampshire Democrats have rallied behind a Write In Biden effort to reward Joe Biden for turning his back on New Hampshire.

**Do you want to do something about it? Cause we are and we need your help, TODAY!**
---
| [ ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
Under Joe Biden, inflation has soared over 17%. Homicides have increased 13%. Assaults have increased 33%. And 6.2 Million illegal border crossings have taken place. We're better off if Democrats [Write-in Bozo](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) instead. Democrats are going to push their "Write-In Biden" campaign far and wide, and I want to do something about it. With your help, we can match and beat the National Democrats' [$100,000](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) write-in campaign and send a clear message to Washington elites that NH’s FITN primary is here to stay. Washington and state Democrat leaders are going to push their "Write-In Biden" campaign far and wide, and we want to do something about it. We plan to educate primary voters and let New Hampshire Democrat leaders know that there’s another clown in town. Help us remind the Democrat Party Chair that Granite State primary voters will not be instructed, ["The reality is that Joe Biden will win the NH FITN Primary in January...”](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) Welcome to the [Write-in Bozo](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) movement to protect the NH primary and send a clear message that we will not back down! Defeating Joe Biden next November starts with _**embarrassing**_ his Write-In campaign on January 23rd so we NEED to act fast with your help. Every dollar donated through this effort will help promote the [Write-in Bozo](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) campaign and defeat Joe Biden. YOU CAN TELL EVERYONE YOU KNOW....If you’re going to write in a clown for president, that clown should be Bozo.

clean_body: If you're gonna write in a clown, make it Bozo. | | | | | Derek, We just held a press conference in Concord and delivered the following message: Joe Biden is determined to put an end to our First in the Nation Primary, but we will not allow this disrespect to occur unchecked. Over the past year, he’s sent a clear message to Granite Staters about what he thinks about our FITN primary – he doesn’t care; New Hampshire’s proud electoral process can be disrespected, disregarded, ignored, skipped, and dishonored without a second thought. He forced the DNC to change its rules. He refused to file for our Presidential Primary. He’s disrespected and diminished the importance of New Hampshire at every turn, he hasn't traveled to our state since early spring of 2022 - but he found time to visit Massachusetts earlier this month. In every instance, when it came to ending New Hampshire's First in the Nation Presidential Primary, Joe Biden failed. In the last few weeks, leading New Hampshire Democrats have rallied behind a Write In Biden effort to reward Joe Biden for turning his back on New Hampshire. Do you want to do something about it? Cause we are and we need your help, TODAY! | Under Joe Biden, inflation has soared over 17%. Homicides have increased 13%. Assaults have increased 33%. And 6.2 Million illegal border crossings have taken place. We're better off if Democrats instead. Democrats are going to push their "Write-In Biden" campaign far and wide, and I want to do something about it. With your help, we can match and beat the National Democrats' write-in campaign and send a clear message to Washington elites that NH’s FITN primary is here to stay. Washington and state Democrat leaders are going to push their "Write-In Biden" campaign far and wide, and we want to do something about it. subject: Our future is no laughing matter
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=d6b9aa421c&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### A new message for the holiday season
Ryan is taking America's future _[seriously](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=801697f893&e=c1403f41d3)_ in 2024, and his campaign is preparing for the Iowa Caucus on January 15. You can make a difference! Read _[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=8ed7686eb0&e=c1403f41d3)_ for more details.
| |
---
### Warren County GOP
Ryan spoke with the people of the Warren County GOP last week. He talked about his plans for America and the importance of unity.
---
| |
---
### Five Seasons Republican Women
Ryan attended the Five Seasons Republican Women Christmas Party in Cedar Rapids last week.
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=6244d810a5&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Reaching the Youth
Ryan interviewed with ABC Action News to discuss growing disinterest amongst 18 to 29-year-olds for politics in America. _[Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=6973f14bef&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
|
####
**How Can I Help?**
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=80602cc426&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Iowa Caucus Registration
The Iowa Caucus is the first presidential primary and it plays a pivotal role in election year politics. Can you join us in Iowa on January 15 to support Ryan at a local caucus meeting? [_Sign up here!_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=72b9158121&e=c1403f41d3)
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=a608019bc1&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### 90-Day Push to the Primaries
Will you help bolster our outreach to voters over the next 90 days? We're asking for dedicated volunteers to make calls to Iowa and New Hampshire voters. [_Sign up her_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=ef2d620b7d&e=c1403f41d3)[ _e!_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=436f9a8aa8&e=c1403f41d3)
---
|
---

---

• Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75672007/445422425/-1558759641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzYzOWQzOC0zZmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXjo_XZFT4yszjysz-8jLndDM1johXRT9kowHOJHqFY=&emci=521c2bdc-3ba1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=37639d38-3fa1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=349307)

| | Peter,

The Wisconsin Supreme Court ruled today that Wisconsin’s state legislative maps are unconstitutional!

For years, gerrymandered maps have virtually guaranteed that Republicans would remain in the majority in the state legislature. And the entrenched Republican majority has disregarded the views of the majority of Wisconsin voters on important issues, including Medicaid expansion and universal background checks for firearm purchases.

While it remains to be determined what the new legislative district lines will be, today’s ruling, assuming it stands, will almost certainly lead to maps being in place for the 2024 elections that are much fairer than the current maps (as well as the maps that immediately preceded the current maps).

I’m proud to be one of the attorneys representing Governor Evers in the case in which Wisconsin’s current state legislative maps have been found to be unconstitutional.

I’m proud to be working to move Wisconsin forward.

[**_Peter, we have a fundraising deadline at the end of the year, and I’m asking for your support. Will you please make a contribution?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75672008/445422426/136599575?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzYzOWQzOC0zZmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AXjo_XZFT4yszjysz-8jLndDM1johXRT9kowHOJHqFY=)

name: Phil Kerpen
subject: ACTION ALERT: Don't Let Biden FCC Bring Back Obama Net Neutrality Order
body:
[unsubscribe](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx0z7u2nCAUANCv0ZIF5yCPwiIr985_8PCOMIKIOOp8fVbSp9_N9qPyWjLVTyOTFBGlVtjPo6bCGsEV6sEIZf0AjksmxTDpSSrm-jACBWQAyBAEIGFEsS_NmBSSqW_9-3voODVpqsGZXEyrYW3ehOUmbk39Ms6tlQ5_dfDo4NGqcS_yP_3X4OM6lg6_xGdnUe6vJmzKULPyysIQsGiRXb48wFTfw4Emecf5upVzPT-UzRghlbSEtsZQTp9uODfbjsJbjTv3Tr5avuL7Z7jlOtw3RWnuzRo3zB2IKcwdfr0-SeW9RVFqitLOH7nH9zvf-ybRmufcp1EIAEW56uvoyxmWJexCdpw-kwnLv3gbL7ILnFZKGOpCLhESq-Ti1h4HmXNR1BK1Kf4kP5J7JCwe-CcAAP__TQ2HYQ)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Dear Fellow Republican: After being exposed for censoring conservative voices on social media, the Biden Administration is doubling down on new Internet controls that would give the federal government vast new powers over Internet providers. [Please click here now to submit an official comment to the FCC urging them to withdraw these proposed regulations.](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00D3WnCAUANDVaMmB9xgeFhY5mW_2gQMqKvgDzqCrz0n69Le6ttW2IaFr1wriiEiNxnpsbQ8PsFZK3qvedUDYd5wTvJWW5BpT-xY4oABAgaAAmWBaPBshSJHQP83vn0cluQnu8G8TN5MPv2Zr_HKx9xrqpR1z3ir8VcGrglc-zHtm_9N_Db5KXip8ip6iWcJ9z_2IU3M2ofArpeHelUng1ilwcfJOxV1_9IxanXehGOxQ7uEyzR0pfuP53bUi-xCHeMukDEkCELCm2Z-zIP04w1bKtvMB3JVKvrtpxmTcB6bO-ZWPOVSgnB8rfM530DHlSW1HmKgbb0rT5xOvtBN2Zhjr0CoFoLnU9dHa7euXxSdFleRDMH7515HbwpJCt3ImsNlYUT6IgxXZdefJxrhp3jG9azmwnqRFJqYT_wQAAP__YQiPSg) It's hard to think of a bigger hoax in recent years than the absurd panic when the Trump FCC repealed Obama's mangled form of net neutrality – public utility regulation of the Internet – after it was in effect for only two years. We were told there would be dead bodies in the streets. Democrats said it would be the end of the Internet as we know it. Liberal media outlets confidently predicted all manner of doom and gloom. Tweets were supposedly going to load... one... word... at... a... time. And what happened? Precisely no negative consequence of any kind. Instead, we saw private investment rise sharply, speeds more than triple, and prices actually declined. In the face of this overwhelming deregulatory success story... FCC Democrats are now proposing to bring back the mangled Obama net neutrality rules, and the docket is already being flooded by thousands of liberal activists to create the appearance that this is something the public wants. [Please click here now to submit an official comment to the FCC urging them to withdraw these proposed regulations.](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00L32myAcANCn0ZED_Agfg0NP8897ICqgIAokQZ--p9273-lOg5yUILKfByIwAAgloXcDmwmeFeeU0dmo0SxgzAgPYzRjmGHc-4FiCoRSIEA5BUSQJE9FiOCCyB_1--fRMazjnL3R-6Fr9qlO2ocLmRT7MLhajw5-dfTV0VfN2mzof_qvgVeroYMnWcSuQ7zvbXGwqreKDV-l2PvkutA5bY6Pk7VYTRDX3a3-zt-HyPmWMrmLXAnOwBvFOPFRm4u4eLJVp0Cy1qGVHEJlD7Ayns36KVYrHJtMaAEv21cncXDJRFNzR_nsXQfP7Y5yL3XlR46rGN0tyvr57Fc5BYzauj4OnFMqMZN9Hqbj60PwhYuOYRu1D_866tBQ4TAnjAioAzXuI8mosXF8v5HbD4lHJE_JLFoEmwCR9Q1_AgAA___dQo_P) Thanks for everything you do,
Phil Kerpen President American Commitment P.S. If they do impose these rules again, do you think we'll all die again when Trump repeals them again???

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor. Steve Thompson, Editor * Dear Fellow Republican: After being exposed for censoring conservative voices on social media, the Biden Administration is doubling down on new Internet controls that would give the federal government vast new powers over Internet providers. It's hard to think of a bigger hoax in recent years than the absurd panic when the Trump FCC repealed Obama's mangled form of net neutrality – public utility regulation of the Internet – after it was in effect for only two years. We were told there would be dead bodies in the streets. Democrats said it would be the end of the Internet as we know it. Liberal media outlets confidently predicted all manner of doom and gloom. Tweets were supposedly going to load... one... word... at... a... time. And what happened? Precisely no negative consequence of any kind. Instead, we saw private investment rise sharply, speeds more than triple, and prices actually declined. In the face of this overwhelming deregulatory success story... FCC Democrats are now proposing to bring back the mangled Obama net neutrality rules, and the docket is already being flooded by thousands of liberal activists to create the appearance that this is something the public wants. Thanks for everything you do, Phil Kerpen President American Commitment P.S. name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37142%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cw1IgctGgNaEdIboxamLGg&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37143%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XEegPFNK6UWe5d19bxej7g&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37143%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XEegPFNK6UWe5d19bxej7g&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsom41aih6359t4c40gdboohohaqchblgls89u9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj6cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp4qt45orr1nsn14ot27uf2eg4je3qd6urk97f98_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj6cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg5dnrhk86b7rcpa5bovcjrgafjncvntoo0ia4ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj6cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zim1ccmkf011qu61vummcfrnecvvr2b5dfqpj0b8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj2cph2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3u7hsv43i2s91tftphgmeqerlkrogvqc8bgctug_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj2cph2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj0v6m213a95ot3b3q8m6u79po0rfpunc293232o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj2cph2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. GOP Presidential 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Update
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvkafu9d13fk946khnqnsjumiijm6ivgjht6f2n0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj6cjh2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpukeku3v47ijen1na7qblqv48lrjoni7tiud2po_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj6cjh2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi5elnv5mad336qta107u6u50i2fb4lmf6p0fgho_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj6cjh2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z49hfqhp6jieucrrpjuqp299vdp7mrfbu8btvai0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj6cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

ICYMI News
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8um38f7f8omqq3jb32c1s5kagrgqapm9f6f60fo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj4clh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpskoep1kp1tt6tm5i4dprps1k402j8pabomljvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj4clh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjebm95ov2pkr2rua9vpu17kugm7aehap9jrf188_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj4clh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjnpq58obi398l3obhpgop5i652klvc02r433r78_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj2chi61pb246h22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj4clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z12peloel4hkuteu808q35ptcgeobpj20a78saa0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj4clh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlcbpk23n9g8fm6kkfaqbq49eg7ldrtc9820nlj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cph69oj4clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Rediscovering the Nativity
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
____Hello Friend,

As the Christmas season approaches, it’s easy to get caught up in the whirlwind of festivities, decorations, and traditions. It’s the time of year when nativity scenes adorn our homes, and the Christmas story echoes in our ears once more. But, let’s be honest, sometimes our familiarity with these things can dim the awe of that very first Christmas.

As we grow older, the nativity scenes around town and the Christmas story we hear each year may lose some of their enchantment. They become an annual ritual, and the words of the story become more like a well-rehearsed script than an immersive experience. It’s not uncommon to find ourselves hearing or reciting those familiar passages without truly pausing to absorb their profound significance.

This year, I invite you to approach the Christmas season with fresh eyes and an open heart. Imagine that you are seeing the nativity scene for the first time, that you’re peering into the lives of the characters with a renewed perspective. Let’s recapture the wonder that may have faded over the years.
---
| | _Pathway to Victory_ has created a beautifully designed book featuring intricate illustrations of the nativity figures, bringing the story to life. Called simply _The Nativity Devotional_ , in its pages, you’ll discover devotions that delve into the lives of the central characters: Mary, Joseph, the shepherds, the wise men, the angels, and, of course, Baby Jesus.
---
| [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-13_LEDAOs_YO8UGbqg)
---
| | What can we learn from these individuals, each uniquely chosen by God to play a vital role in that momentous occasion? _The Nativity Devotional _will be your guide to rediscovering the wonder of Christmas.

As our gift to you in return for your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ , this devotional is perfect for sharing as a family. You can explore it together while decorating your home for the holidays or in the days leading up to Christmas. And if you have young children or grandchildren, you can use the simple, child-friendly version included at the end of each devotional to share the story with your loved ones.

Secure your copy here: [https://ptv.org/the-nativity-devotional](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)

May this coming Christmas season be one of renewed joy, awe, and reverence for you and your family, inspiring you to worship the Savior throughout the entire season.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzU3LWIwM2VkNGQxMTExOTQ5OTliMDdiMjFkODU2MzNkZGUwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/IdV4daOfbO6xxiuZgcXiCQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: The Doug Collins Podcast
subject: The Doug Collins Podcast Update – Saturday, December 23, 2023
body:

| | [ What Happened to 2023 ](http://click1.srnemail.com/gtwmrtjjrfkdffpjdkkhcdnfsrdltssfythpsykgkclttg_qppffvvsvwsdtmpnsssfvnn.html)
### _Friday, December 22, 2023_
With 2024 on its way Doug and James reflect on 2023. We had a speaker of the house hired and fired in the same year, A.I. was getting lawyers in trouble, there was a writers strike, a Chinese spy balloon took over America, There was cocaine in the White House, Oh, and aliens are here. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/tvppvcddvtbkttrdkbbglkjtsvkmcsstzcgrszbhblmccb_qppffvvsvwsdtmpnsssfvnn.html)

### _Wednesday, December 20, 2023_
Social Media is having a large influence of the youths view of Hamas and the issues in Israel. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/vhjyhgqqhckncczqnkktfnmcdhnjgddcvgtzdvkpkfjggg_qppffvvsvwsdtmpnsssfvnn.html)
| [ From Arkansas to the White House, small town dreams matter ](http://click1.srnemail.com/zslfslggscbkccqgkbbtrkdcvskwlvvcmltqvmbpbrwllw_qppffvvsvwsdtmpnsssfvnn.html)
### _Monday, December 18, 2023_
The things we learn in a small town can propel us to great heights if we just follow our hearts. Hogan Gidley is a prime example of that great truth. Our conversation focuses on what we can do to live out our dreams and change the world in the process. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/owwqwlccwpkdppncdkkvtdmpswdrlsspzlvnszkjktrllm_qppffvvsvwsdtmpnsssfvnn.html)

name: Rebekah Bydlak
subject: The importance of Catholic schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
In many communities, Catholic schools are the sole option for families seeking a robust educational foundation for their children.

| | | ****
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37250%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sD09UOxG8tv0CPmmV8q%2baw&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, Throughout the United States, Catholic schools are __**_instrumental_** in reigniting students' and communities' passion for learning. Whether it's the strong academic foundation offered by urban Catholic schools or the fundamental education accessible through new classical Catholic schools, Catholic education holds a profound intellectual and spiritual legacy for students and their families.
In many communities, Catholic schools are the sole option for families seeking a robust educational foundation for their children. **[Sadly, financial challenges are leading many Catholic schools to close their doors, leaving families with limited alternatives.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37251%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x11bLCWcYfw3fimi7msrxA&sysid=1)**
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37252%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RA9xTB77u%2bWiUE2SCGUEdg&sysid=1)
---
As the school choice movement expands, this story will no longer need to be told. Instead, we can embrace a story of resurgence, with schools reopening and growing to provide a quality education to families of all income levels. **[If you believe families should have access to Catholic education through the school choice movement, please add your name today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37253%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UYayRouHv41nR%2f45Le%2fIaQ&sysid=1)**
---
[**SIGN TO STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37254%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0mAQV41QaVKtZfnWBcjGIQ&sysid=1)
---
Onward, Rebekah Bydlak American Federation for Children
