name: ICYMI News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfqcf748jrqu6cfms9i8ncn1u79d1bo0llmh9alo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2t6nguht4j47l7lck1g07i7qhedgasaatb20e60_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z35bkjinf9tcfbkmdml4co3ppa8nmj3h6snptk5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2toctv4v6h26s83kuup6j51vr14bj1g3prjome0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71cdh2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvq5i2t24pgloud424p08dahvirrg76o5tu2g1c8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71cdh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7jm85rnfobd9ol42h8rfa4cvd2ffgh36vj53kgg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71cdh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: Rebekah Bydlak
subject: Why Catholic schools?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
In many communities, Catholic schools are the sole option for families seeking a robust educational foundation for their children.

| | | ****
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zidmifkrtvfci5ocs6jr6b17e37fe2aa34oc44a8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq0o73cop66db3cmgj0opi6mgm1or7cmge6c74cmhm6o9i69hm8cpmc9ge4pt0ekon9cbkmuprb930c1j608h1k8gn48n24hjm0pj6cph61ob1c8iv0)
---
| | Friend, Throughout the United States, Catholic schools are __**_instrumental_** in reigniting students' and communities' passion for learning. Whether it's the strong academic foundation offered by urban Catholic schools or the fundamental education accessible through new classical Catholic schools, Catholic education holds a profound intellectual and spiritual legacy for students and their families.
In many communities, Catholic schools are the sole option for families seeking a robust educational foundation for their children. **[Sadly, financial challenges are leading many Catholic schools to close their doors, leaving families with limited alternatives.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9o4eoudhhfrnjiu2tojrmtd649l9doqhuori7d0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt0c3hmccj36lhmb89gccp3b8b0sdjmb87363i6b8r3c4p34or46cr64o72cug7acbkm5qbfctlkhg60pj048iv0)**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk1kn6asfpbh41p6qouj3ftpd79kg9musrse1h4o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq0o73cop66db3cmgj0opi6mgm1or7cmge6c74cmhm6o9i69hm8cpmc9ge4pt0ekon9cbkmuprb930c1j608h1k8gn48n24hjm0pj6cph61ob1c8iv0)
---
As the school choice movement expands, this story will no longer need to be told. Instead, we can embrace a story of resurgence, with schools reopening and growing to provide a quality education to families of all income levels. **[If you believe families should have access to Catholic education through the school choice movement, please add your name today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziek0ub6icv1pq94mhi1qpmm082q0tfohre590ho_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt0c3hmccj36lhmb89gccp3b8b0sdjmb87363i6b8r3c4p34or46cr64o72cug7acbkm5qbfctlkhg60pj048iv0)**
---
[**SIGN TO STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcha984483rlusn0ipdvn30sjeik6bd1dssiuh2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj64o71c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt0c3hmccj36lhmb89gccp3b8b0sdjmb87363i6b8r3c4p34or46cr64o72cug7acbkm5qbfctlkhg60pj048iv0)

name: Your America
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37260%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pTPnGaQfd4mU6GDgU%2bd7Fw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688757%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eEKNhjVdK1NjyXvFnxJ9hg&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688758%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=djRfKoJT1SYeblzwM%2bkrcw&sysid=1) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource “The Major Characters of the End Times” as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688759%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yDRd50ArauFcWFth4sZkkQ&sysid=1)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z75tiuup1p9vvg715si8iu5od497v9m5m1ejg72o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zanp8c5nrqgtquonm1h1ofa3n7mh65rfnph4n7fo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob6c5h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhljjdahknkuj57pr459709sj7268rle2n8mtni8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob6c5h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi5l2e6rfvhoe3aalbj37m7d28g1k4an9ldgrbm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob6c5h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: American Briefing
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1nl9vt63m453463ddbj54vjnghacgjikt2m46go_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob1c1h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuhvqmnjtsoa7v5k50gfugke0vibl2399ljc1ne8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob1c1h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu9oh1d9cpsqrtj9tqen7od1mesgva3pu7nq1o7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob1c1h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Briefing

clean_body: The survey will only take a few moments of your time This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvjef0bvondoia7if35lmtr7f0rbrf1d5p54bb3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob6c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5sognvrr166m0fq481lt2rv2s3n09g2b1s0u24g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob6c5h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf3rihrpcn5mnq98putucl75qm5t7nk5cblvfru8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpj66ob6c5h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:

We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda. .

However, we've discovered a more profound reason behind his firing.
Tucker was on the brink of exposing a 1,700-year-old Biblical scandal - a shocking lie that has caused immeasurable pain and suffering throughout the ages.
This deception, carefully guarded by the Democrats, has shaped the course of history, often leading to wars and conflicts.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsinlvp3l04d1gpvv69o5fb0fkbe1pcmf66h40jg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpgm0o34cph2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zok38aqv48s94dpbj3t3815i7tvn142hmcdo7pj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpgm0o34cph2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zspp5qu6jnrko0idonfln4a1jbdos86ipuodndoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cpgm0o34cph2bs)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. subject: 🚨ALERT🚨 Dems Toss Maps & Fairness
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
We must put an end to this.
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xtritjl-didthutlhu-n/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtritjl-didthutlhu-r/)
### Friend,

We've officially reached a breaking point. This afternoon, the liberal-controlled Wisconsin Supreme Court made a shocking and unethical decision to overturn legislative maps set by the same court just last year. This move by the Democrats threatens the very fabric of our democratic processes in Wisconsin.Now, they are ordering the creation of new district boundary lines to create a gerrymander to elect as many Democrats as possible. This move is to directly appease the Democratic Party of Wisconsin who bought and paid for extreme liberal Justice Janet Protasiewicz's seat on the Court.
[FIGHT BACK AGAINST THIS DEM ATTACK](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtritjl-didthutlhu-y/) In her first case, Justice Protasiewicz has shown that her only bosses are the union bosses and coastal liberal elites that flooded money into Wisconsin earlier this year. It's clear that this is a politically motivated attempt to weaken the strong Republican majorities that we have worked so hard to build over the past decade. In fact, a majority of Wisconsinites that were polled just last month by Marquette University wanted the current maps to REMAIN until 2030. Justice Protasiewicz, who has been hellbent on destroying our maps since before she was elected, has now played the key role in striking them down, continuing her baseless claims of the maps being "rigged." We need to stand united against this liberal corruption and ensure that our grassroots movement remains strong. [HELP US KEEP FIGHTING](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtritjl-didthutlhu-j/) This decision comes less than a year before the crucial 2024 election in our battleground state, where the margins are razor-thin. The stakes are high, and we must act swiftly to protect the integrity of our electoral system.This is why we need you now more than ever, friend. We need you in order to combat the influence of extreme liberals and safeguard the future of Wisconsin. Your help, whether it's $5, or $50, will go directly towards our efforts to counteract the impact of this ruling and prevent further erosion of our conservative principles.
[RUSH ANY AMOUNT NOW](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtritjl-didthutlhu-t/) Thank you for standing with us in the face of such adversity. With your support, we can overcome the obstacles posed by liberal overreach and build a stronger Wisconsin for generations to come.Team WisGOP [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtritjl-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtritjl-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtritjl-didthutlhu-h/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtritjl-didthutlhu-k/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. # Saturday, December 23th, 2023
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend! **On this day in 1823, _The Night Before Christmas _was published, then known as _A Visit From St. Nicholas. _It was first released as an anonymous poem in a New York newspaper called the Troy Sentinel, and Clement Clarke Moore claimed authorship in 1844. ## Supreme Court Won't Rush Trump Ruling
The Supreme Court has [declined to rule](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuS6yAQBb8GZajQgIQdENxEmW-6oQrByJ4tECoelv33W9544xOc7v66LTdLgfb7fxvR1C0t1lV64jIAB8lBLqrzZkMElB2aQQsplZik7B5mtXYbwF_EKhBWq8ZJj_KqldIg1GUaOzIgQA4AchCjFmPvrmit16tS8rIK3JgS6Kmm3H8n2usDt_BOT8y9S7EL5lHrUZj8x2BmMJ_n2W_pteNZPjuD-UiBKrnCYC7tyBiRu9Ry5R5doB0Lp1Iacnwdnxv0PLePK6-5xYNTjG2n-ubOFuyy8cdJIVCZNFPiHi2FX476d5afAAAA__--gWcs) on President Trump's potential immunity before a Washington D.C. appeals court finishes its own ruling on the case. Special Counsel Jack Smith made a bold legal move by asking the Supreme Court to decide whether Trump can be prosecuted for potential crimes committed while president, essentially leap-frogging the appellate court. Now that his [request has been denied](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHSoyAURp8Gu-vghUgsKLaxy7ZbOojXhB0QBy5x8vY72fpvv6855_x5LA8XYjiev10iy3tenOfwpmVAQAWoFt1tdidCUh3ZwUiltByV6l7WuNXct30yg5n0PiH5ccRxlaMxhrRRXbAoUQ2IapA3I2-9n8i5zaxaq_sqaRda0hY4l_5vDge_aI-f_KbS-5y6aF_MZxXql8BZ4HxdV1-oMZX6_QXOkZ4uCpxbhdrOQonA51YYrnwwlBYJuLR0VggptSPwB3x0IQFKlECRPId8gHeV4MjXd1bwFUeBc1fsdl4hxlBHI7R8JhfifzD-udO_AAAA__8GHmm8), it's unlikely that the case will be heard and resolved before the court's usual summer break.
## Confidence in Medical System Plummets
Americans' confidence in the medical system is [at its lowest in a decade,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQAL8GdWjQHRi5oHiNOr82pQbBSSKDhQbOdvL3GadOvVvs7MdtvvmU07H993dyvJbZB05PmgeQgBJw1l10KxEQduQGqxC1uiB2u1uUMQFh9AopxhXtGAJabcYFrkQxdsmBAhwAcFDGKtOHK3kf7aI1jouiVWhFMXGp_WdJB--05u_ypNqHcu-y25nPJvCfgEnAdNCr9ZvP-XG-uYDpLDkLmIy2Rpm38aiNmlxTbSxjCVxqkzE19gfLRqEcUe7kM-_BV5JnLc8UqcrqOR1b6307v7rq4vlKOad2sUKr7e5T_u3hv_f8BAAA__8C52lP) though consumers still give nurses top approval ratings, according to a Gallup poll. Doctors rank behind nurses, with only 69% of Americans giving them good/excellent marks. Nurses scored 82%. Hospitals themselves were at 58% approval, with 11% saying they provided poor service. At the bottom of the survey were healthcare service companies. More people said drug companies, health insurers, and nursing homes gave poor service, with nursing homes at the absolute bottom: 25% said they were good, and 37% said they were poor.
## Massive Wave Hits Cruise Ship
A cruise ship bound for England nearly capsized after a giant 'rogue wave' [smashed into the ship](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L-O3CAQgPGnsbuxMOA_W7i4xt1ec0XK1QDDenIYVoDXcp4-ipTy6q_6fr_ujzty4Pj8xJ2W6tMDbeU3PXoJUoFUD926xRNJUi0t_SSU0mJUqt0Wd5sGa7UezezUIPzgjDUa51EIKUcrWl6kkKqXUvVimMTQ2RshuslorWYjyDdakOOacvc7cawb-XClN-XOpr0Ny1brqzTqo5FrI9fzPDuHHK4dOXQ2dcd3I9dIZ2nkirmyDQS9nG96nm6NXD92ymwxwpl2jLClnFOG-xfc8XBg88GF4DPlusEXIRS8CnjCTA7Kxi-w-Cr8h8DldEbQQoBJmB04KjazoQLbEb8pc3yCObynChVNoAL4TuzAh-tf8keOXI9M3Vb30ObFvU4Ogcs4NVo8_8_sbf1Z_28AAAD__9a3iuY). The wave knocked out windows on the bridge, and the surge of water compromised the navigation and radar systems. An onboard camera [recorded the moment](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1rwzAQQH-NtMWcdZJVDxoKIVsytqPRxylWUaJgX2zy70s6d30PHrzv83T2pZb79eJv5Di3yUcuG029Oig8KJy0TC4TKUJJrreAqGFAlLMzBmEM42CDj3nMGlOkFI3JoC1YyrI4BQp7pbAHY8F0cSTvkw1a40cAykIDpcJt6X5aufNMub7aRksX201WNzM_VoGfQp2EOu373r3ak5-B3v5NPMdZ4GkTeLzMVsevMLBvQg0s8GhglYtLj73UWtbBCg3Xmy_1L87_v_4GAAD__0w_VH8) when the huge wave rose out of the stormy sea and covered the bridge, and American passenger Elizabeth Lawrence said she feared for her life: "_There were about 20 minutes yesterday where I thought the ship might capsize ... It really hit home when they started handing out orange survival suits to everyone_." No one was seriously hurt, and the ship is being towed to Germany.

clean_body: The Supreme Court has declined to rule on President Trump’s potential immunity before a Washington D.C. appeals court finishes its own ruling on the case. | | | | | | Saturday, December 23th, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 1823, The Night Before Christmas was published, then known as A Visit From St. Nicholas. It was first released as an anonymous poem in a New York newspaper called the Troy Sentinel, and Clement Clarke Moore claimed authorship in 1844. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . Editor's note: If you like The Flyover and would also like a newsletter that focuses on news in the state of Texas, we think you'll love The Texas Flyover. It launches on January 9th, and you can | Supreme Court Won't Rush Trump Ruling The Supreme Court has on President Trump's potential immunity before a Washington D.C. appeals court finishes its own ruling on the case. Special Counsel Jack Smith made a bold legal move by asking the Supreme Court to decide whether Trump can be prosecuted for potential crimes committed while president, essentially leap-frogging the appellate court. Now that his , it's unlikely that the case will be heard and resolved before the court's usual summer break. Confidence in Medical System Plummets Americans' confidence in the medical system is though consumers still give nurses top approval ratings, according to a Gallup poll. Doctors rank behind nurses, with only 69% of Americans giving them good/excellent marks. Nurses scored 82%. Hospitals themselves were at 58% approval, with 11% saying they provided poor service. At the bottom of the survey were healthcare service companies. More people said drug companies, health insurers, and nursing homes gave poor service, with nursing homes at the absolute bottom: 25% said they were good, and 37% said they were poor. Massive Wave Hits Cruise Ship A cruise ship bound for England nearly capsized after a giant 'rogue wave' . The wave knocked out windows on the bridge, and the surge of water compromised the navigation and radar systems. An onboard camera when the huge wave rose out of the stormy sea and covered the bridge, and American passenger Elizabeth Lawrence said she feared for her life: "There were about 20 minutes yesterday where I thought the ship might capsize ... It really hit home when they started handing out orange survival suits to everyone." No one was seriously hurt, and the ship is being towed to Germany. This year's list includes $38 million in Covid stimulus checks for dead people, $12 million for meth studies on monkeys, and an NIH grant to study Russian cats walking on treadmills. body:

| | Dear Friend, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b1ebf116debc4d04a65d120b37a36ba9&_e=38X-im1ZhA5TEkexcaQMF5wD2INqaTFpJeIK5-QDUxOhvev7mlpWV2XaK8zKKE0ZEtJQiVvNa-i1fnqsMw9d5Jg5RpbRHC2QqOrlN5vAlJ7WQc818-kdp9w76sXLJTVqBW2mT-zn_FoUZO6ZXvMClKSLtp8GTZpn-xrZgdsHU1oRi8hhvRKprsJqQNoCh-d1AHXkZ6gIRGIZ-UW4Bgqsbe9fqaekJOmKbEsS1YEYqYF4RlkxKnIAciAvvWzAGnh2j_NnMmHuiTlVEGMJaqq6h7mIkz0m9jpuL-P9vIlaceKTtxFxOK0PEnLNKNBbwZDrrc_tUcX2yb1S-WhVCLxY5oXWUt-UHRJRp7DL64AYBJTyiKODsVUd0Mti-FEJpXahtxc2cfRlxT9TiSxiLtLOvQ%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b1ebf116debc4d04a65d120b37a36ba9&_e=38X-im1ZhA5TEkexcaQMF5wD2INqaTFpJeIK5-QDUxOhvev7mlpWV2XaK8zKKE0ZEtJQiVvNa-i1fnqsMw9d5Jg5RpbRHC2QqOrlN5vAlJ7WQc818-kdp9w76sXLJTVqBW2mT-zn_FoUZO6ZXvMClKSLtp8GTZpn-xrZgdsHU1oRi8hhvRKprsJqQNoCh-d1AHXkZ6gIRGIZ-UW4Bgqsbe9fqaekJOmKbEsS1YEYqYHMn5ipuV2YJWDiDt9fs2inywP4H1WRVoisVcpIw4QR_PJnjduU8BJRrYMwkl8N7cMGV2RX_TalV1Hh7eT_f-gZg7und5Cq4A4492ZGcrGtHXu4Nxn_QvhOWXLswFB4lBJoJ9wCoSywsFhKnexQstCWuv20z9AGy7SWiFU4hnTylQ%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b1ebf116debc4d04a65d120b37a36ba9&_e=38X-im1ZhA5TEkexcaQMF5wD2INqaTFpJeIK5-QDUxOhvev7mlpWV2XaK8zKKE0ZEtJQiVvNa-i1fnqsMw9d5Jg5RpbRHC2QqOrlN5vAlJ7WQc818-kdp9w76sXLJTVqBW2mT-zn_FoUZO6ZXvMClKSLtp8GTZpn-xrZgdsHU1oRi8hhvRKprsJqQNoCh-d1AHXkZ6gIRGIZ-UW4Bgqsbe9fqaekJOmKbEsS1YEYqYELPHJ_uL7XCpKbX8n8B_-GAwUEpr8m8YQY0NSk6PRoFKnf-tXbqYDeFqFwV0zyJQaiQIvAp1nyhkFEKUZwUlfc5JYnz2Vb5644eCHjQfQNnEqyLh1dVeZkfEE1pXz-aZsWNyLdpWZTChCiUOvIMCXhvjnkuo7zflz8chyKt6ThEA%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b70f07009d34fb3b5c69135638e612e&_e=B9Xk5muSVd_RRJfeatZM2FjDUGARl2nIhR2AbBIcuoQ7IAHQ7u1OcH8GbuJQrY9KFHZNTm5fZ3D_JNo17y-m_oZBtP4W3Q7z76S87-A8UfgNNmMNVjbnt4rwtdW-5dwK_j3g3Jamuk9kSy8NLfX78xx4_WSaeMoJxA2UgvvkbpEu3eqASjsmAeFfLBhE7JLCbXWclutBmaU7yyf-z5NIALJnFc9uDqHOaxv-_JWJRnO4jydyCqjYbXCetaxwo74_lVn_ulSZ9KKHhSJtWm3slDbg4k5-Fr4cwslaw2WAOwJWs9LBDu3JqxOSN9W8N6RpB2UMPveWVHNUr1YZTUnN1z--UL2Wizeh4xSZBBs8RPrfctzLJWq-Kjqe6_rXyetyrNDFZ_FkTc8Z0QsQl2hdcQ%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b70f07009d34fb3b5c69135638e612e&_e=B9Xk5muSVd_RRJfeatZM2FjDUGARl2nIhR2AbBIcuoQ7IAHQ7u1OcH8GbuJQrY9KFHZNTm5fZ3D_JNo17y-m_oZBtP4W3Q7z76S87-A8UfgNNmMNVjbnt4rwtdW-5dwK_j3g3Jamuk9kSy8NLfX78xx4_WSaeMoJxA2UgvvkbpEu3eqASjsmAeFfLBhE7JLCbXWclutBmaU7yyf-z5NIALJnFc9uDqHOaxv-_JWJRnMe6-bM4oRyhzaxkf2jpscBTy4Gt1D9jWZ21bp_Hw38LgOTufxmUZEZbFVqhGqRzj_v5meNgeuhcm6yHvm5XJxrdgZ7BaQHAoCEKkL-lRKZ8G-TKsvDn1OBAil-RuZhzySVvFinAnUU8Bw_b6aSOqko9g85iYnp_WhBGdAOI6eVAg%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b70f07009d34fb3b5c69135638e612e&_e=B9Xk5muSVd_RRJfeatZM2FjDUGARl2nIhR2AbBIcuoQ7IAHQ7u1OcH8GbuJQrY9KFHZNTm5fZ3D_JNo17y-m_oZBtP4W3Q7z76S87-A8UfgNNmMNVjbnt4rwtdW-5dwK_j3g3Jamuk9kSy8NLfX78xx4_WSaeMoJxA2UgvvkbpEu3eqASjsmAeFfLBhE7JLCbXWclutBmaU7yyf-z5NIALJnFc9uDqHOaxv-_JWJRnPaAaBLkVxXEXxz8B0xTJ4a5RK09VVYVb1P3fH3VjCgW-Y-qcIKDREeDmtYxuS3Wm0ZUHLOpaTDNvu_F9yafJLKraX9mOGl5PLuv4Ym18jWG1M0j2VSk-BVPbFkvA3IpWKwbwXqBe9f-0JVViaS_8T-qfLkdQdwO8KUUUvRGCF07Q%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99c54338a6fe4a4db21725846b84ec76&_e=_mn2lNgLiLG0wSFbv0WWAwhD7GPxoCsvZAPAkuLUbrGmvrP48GZP8xnXOdn0JaTvdXTdnGcV7ptkuP6EHyN6d5HjbMJNKDurwbYioO3RutRItiFB1GBTjpJsdjT7sKDsXu1IDKD_WTU9tCS2YMlBvyCW-t6CDfzVSEJTwqiiW_N5EEGfrG-EMzKbudieMwNlsRR8i8zlLVE01fvhRE9JX4kCjGc9O8AqRn0jfNykxNqu1QE1BZrM5Yi2lNcspvtxE6rcQ5TJRSA5TU9mu-f3KvlJjMquPB2p85o7YY1UMUdovv5KSzHeamnUy2D9zWQ88fb9m_gOdBMUzmECSPysHX-97Ba33i8i_LT0f2vk9SDR5Mpg7s4s7oNcp7H7W4TRwk8FSNlMu1f0UcbfKkndWyefjuFtHkCwkC4zz5ZYn_8%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99c54338a6fe4a4db21725846b84ec76&_e=_mn2lNgLiLG0wSFbv0WWAwhD7GPxoCsvZAPAkuLUbrGmvrP48GZP8xnXOdn0JaTvdXTdnGcV7ptkuP6EHyN6d5HjbMJNKDurwbYioO3RutRItiFB1GBTjpJsdjT7sKDsXu1IDKD_WTU9tCS2YMlBvyCW-t6CDfzVSEJTwqiiW_N5EEGfrG-EMzKbudieMwNlsRR8i8zlLVE01fvhRE9JX4kCjGc9O8AqRn0jfNykxNqu1QE1BZrM5Yi2lNcspvtxTbBANL7uo4GGf0e38wallUZf_MlyOY3OUfS4zZxsnsMzhuwsogsmRB7e288w_RrnOjRFBnNPDjVqceAjYGGH6fkyP5iTj3BgJriRMOktiX1DdEwPgdbIG7NkrwsQvfOkhggI9ehCk47yDc-cR7PZ-lXvDgHiaa-_oyzQL3mWlzA%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99c54338a6fe4a4db21725846b84ec76&_e=_mn2lNgLiLG0wSFbv0WWAwhD7GPxoCsvZAPAkuLUbrGmvrP48GZP8xnXOdn0JaTvdXTdnGcV7ptkuP6EHyN6d5HjbMJNKDurwbYioO3RutRItiFB1GBTjpJsdjT7sKDsXu1IDKD_WTU9tCS2YMlBvyCW-t6CDfzVSEJTwqiiW_N5EEGfrG-EMzKbudieMwNlsRR8i8zlLVE01fvhRE9JX4kCjGc9O8AqRn0jfNykxNqu1QE1BZrM5Yi2lNcspvtx-NahXBM61zjRwCjXnLiAQLbhEnMs3b6dWELvuEgfdKVDwm-B9dvWJ4ubUOi3zISUMdvhZwkpwzv3GoLbtZxH4Qk_tQXk6_vtJLQa08F3x7onIZldAb7o5KSuVXYwBC5JxE8CpAa_pC514_7wlPPsEPXnSFkUxhd8fXMlpUzt4FM%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba86d63d7ad345d28ad8cecaf3ec2dd0&_e=sDd9_oT-hNxUhYRWaF1SkLq6vl9NUgciaL88JzQE2CU6Wl2sNx7fXUcr2_XdB788Mb4OhAt1yVwq2493tVbxhcoDaho9Hic9PcItIEIIeQ7tFpHYeeE6hwAvBg_ceJRu5zll3IzgCMK37RIjf4tnihFR6WSyXkPKKB1G3jqSGOLd5WxSaE-Jz9qUTiGbqrCPJbTumaoRU_LiR_Sfv9tw1McjPUVQvBoiQbvbcnui3UlXhfUSX9l9v1aOKxXIVgHyzreNHx1mWlWmuaGogUdFlU0jmfNQGkQal40UPDFV-XroOvjaOGGZLAohPcR4fKSJgWsKu2Uq1QcInEhMkWRwYgYtGLLIEroLM_GcZ_m3MGIXy9yjWd3i8h4Fua_iwK5A50NaUoPLypUd2oCR20bs8oGtcF7vrpU3X9c4mCtIVIkZXGwxE3w9ylWxsiBBZp-9)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba86d63d7ad345d28ad8cecaf3ec2dd0&_e=sDd9_oT-hNxUhYRWaF1SkLq6vl9NUgciaL88JzQE2CU6Wl2sNx7fXUcr2_XdB788Mb4OhAt1yVwq2493tVbxhcoDaho9Hic9PcItIEIIeQ7tFpHYeeE6hwAvBg_ceJRu5zll3IzgCMK37RIjf4tnihFR6WSyXkPKKB1G3jqSGOLd5WxSaE-Jz9qUTiGbqrCPJbTumaoRU_LiR_Sfv9tw1McjPUVQvBoiQbvbcnui3UlXhfUSX9l9v1aOKxXIVgHyzreNHx1mWlWmuaGogUdFlZN-NnUnSaVkZBoNxxbMBbEbtPdBEM-GJ8Svnw6tahQjgMm1AAsv1kF6xoG6bWs7q2p5TtufVpViOH13yqaOwTzxhDu4BLTzKui69DShTGkx7scpGV9DY3ZYZjEAUaLbfeHlAAaORhtDQ7bLaW8rVYa17kJrS9BfB2YpG2mTJ9De) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ba86d63d7ad345d28ad8cecaf3ec2dd0&_e=sDd9_oT-hNxUhYRWaF1SkLq6vl9NUgciaL88JzQE2CU6Wl2sNx7fXUcr2_XdB788Mb4OhAt1yVwq2493tVbxhcoDaho9Hic9PcItIEIIeQ7tFpHYeeE6hwAvBg_ceJRu5zll3IzgCMK37RIjf4tnihFR6WSyXkPKKB1G3jqSGOLd5WxSaE-Jz9qUTiGbqrCPJbTumaoRU_LiR_Sfv9tw1McjPUVQvBoiQbvbcnui3UlXhfUSX9l9v1aOKxXIVgHyzreNHx1mWlWmuaGogUdFldeiG67rL4DsyIZBX1OHKSawz2UGZpkhIlHS7gzdU3e9BndXXSAJwnkHIUFWeSlXT44TolQLtC4mogHqv4A-Aini356cCA420k6xABfQwFdsIokRb1hrRAoV9dYz3Og3Xl9W5USexmjxm7udVzXcyYftF5ZQ41vEZ-siuiO7XLzC)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd02e9bbf0a5418f9bc8d231aef138c0&_e=QfP4lgI7_uZGifnCBVH0vvhmLML6Dcvuzx6aoyeIhNKKDnSr92ialKoaL7alvg8pQN2YD12rLqXm2psEYZNYdFPPkbiP-OObaoBU1rbZ1k6mqE9tJhWys8Dq5rG2T8tYpspX7SvSrROX5wnav_czBMrM0qPHx3jOuYOabuRu9oCuxr-6-QBhJ_hFVbcW4PgjsJ_rn4Jaruatc2SffuZRDep4LMwVVRfw4IWb3xdb3u7NwTa_Dh7X8fz6SqgybgE-Cpu10bxKyGEXUQLYv8vHgmI9PiISQUeJ8Ist16uJ_PRlLr5ZdMe7P6RDmZEoKAhX5PlwoetbQxfJVXMJS8P2eqUsO73-U16X3jz2GUcejunEqcK7w8X7-cAF1zYzrtioPvNSMkaIzxyX4GQCD1QwUA%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd02e9bbf0a5418f9bc8d231aef138c0&_e=QfP4lgI7_uZGifnCBVH0vvhmLML6Dcvuzx6aoyeIhNKKDnSr92ialKoaL7alvg8pQN2YD12rLqXm2psEYZNYdFPPkbiP-OObaoBU1rbZ1k6mqE9tJhWys8Dq5rG2T8tYpspX7SvSrROX5wnav_czBMrM0qPHx3jOuYOabuRu9oCuxr-6-QBhJ_hFVbcW4PgjsJ_rn4Jaruatc2SffuZRDep4LMwVVRfw4IWb3xdb3u6J3IRPXPS22rhslHj9iGql0Xv6Ws3qGi_O9jLWFQ-DjWDvPM53mAyxsH_8L77XB5O7DUgCVNZYGgodT-_WPIRiODCL0kqaQGGU8xEHwz0KI-eFviPBVgb7oYXsIScLGwmLtfz6-1oL2aC7eNwwz8pmju6WZGQsXfnNARDvl0x6GQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd02e9bbf0a5418f9bc8d231aef138c0&_e=QfP4lgI7_uZGifnCBVH0vvhmLML6Dcvuzx6aoyeIhNKKDnSr92ialKoaL7alvg8pQN2YD12rLqXm2psEYZNYdFPPkbiP-OObaoBU1rbZ1k6mqE9tJhWys8Dq5rG2T8tYpspX7SvSrROX5wnav_czBMrM0qPHx3jOuYOabuRu9oCuxr-6-QBhJ_hFVbcW4PgjsJ_rn4Jaruatc2SffuZRDep4LMwVVRfw4IWb3xdb3u75lLwinKOQyrQSOfaxihv734HRP9G5552-MfalmhbhKFUwgZxm04lvrV779I23Ckqm931QQS85xkFjZtQLQ7s5V87gpiVcRYPqvjpXQ31P7IBIcxQx8Ju6t1Tz7MVKwsOZLLhqzuMXW2ngSi8WPHP6biSQVMdMaH7v9ux4XRnpzg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=dd02e9bbf0a5418f9bc8d231aef138c0&_t=2mTl9Sng6xDjcw99pHstph82-v4KypV761FDF9PP6hSZ59xNPHYCgYS3zO148sJeci-IIMJT03ppEQmTKqPUagYWvIW6vCseTzuPgjqN0UIWhI6iKDt6XjsDWGxpas_HFEiHFJRR1OAT0P70tQkMUqkj_Wyq9-Fv_civFIECJjM%3D)
