name: Ron DeSantis
subject: You deserve a stress-free holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396ad355ae4aa0c08a6ebc1c0712505eb662c9f616d8661e740609e6c5bae43da08facae8b23830ac8c7146b6412d0eb6a91c7a13cac45401ae8d900b4f3ab8c71ae3c2929084751f89e75393d2e8289

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=266a8681197e88fa1570c7db6132555ade0334806bb4464009155f9cc004ed3ff1815c6c58b99c241db29f7925af96b636cb1d21b61668467bf1532b4f402648

Friend,

I know the holidays can be a stressful time for financial strain. Joe Biden has done everything in his power to work against fiscal conservatives—and it's you who has paid the price.

This horrible mismanagement of the highest office in our land is both angering and disappointing, but it's also motivating. Nothing drives me more than standing up for the American people—young and old—when our leaders are failing us at every turn.

If we are to reclaim an economy that works for all Americans, we must fight today for the tomorrow we need. We cannot lower our standards or expectations, and we must demand an end to shallow excuses. It's time, friend. You deserve better than stressing over what you can afford for your family at Christmas, at Hannukah, or in the middle of the summer. You should never be under this much strain because of the leaders you trusted to elect.

My ultimate promise to you is that I will always fight for our citizens, our families, our future, and our way of life—and I will never back down. We will take back control of our destiny, and enjoy the financial freedom that used to be attainable in this country. As your President, I promise you I will never stop fighting to get you the stress-free holiday season that's been taken away from you for so many years now.

Yours in Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=266a8681197e88fa1570c7db6132555ade0334806bb4464009155f9cc004ed3ff1815c6c58b99c241db29f7925af96b636cb1d21b61668467bf1532b4f402648

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=266a8681197e88fa1570c7db6132555ade0334806bb4464009155f9cc004ed3ff1815c6c58b99c241db29f7925af96b636cb1d21b61668467bf1532b4f402648
SUPPORT RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=266a8681197e88fa1570c7db6132555ade0334806bb4464009155f9cc004ed3ff1815c6c58b99c241db29f7925af96b636cb1d21b61668467bf1532b4f402648

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=266a8681197e88fa1570c7db6132555ade0334806bb4464009155f9cc004ed3ff1815c6c58b99c241db29f7925af96b636cb1d21b61668467bf1532b4f402648

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, I know the holidays can be a stressful time for financial strain. Joe Biden has done everything in his power to work against fiscal conservatives—and it's you who has paid the price. This horrible mismanagement of the highest office in our land is both angering and disappointing, but it's also motivating. Nothing drives me more than standing up for the American people—young and old—when our leaders are failing us at every turn. If we are to reclaim an economy that works for all Americans, we must fight today for the tomorrow we need. We cannot lower our standards or expectations, and we must demand an end to shallow excuses. It's time, friend. You deserve better than stressing over what you can afford for your family at Christmas, at Hannukah, or in the middle of the summer. You should never be under this much strain because of the leaders you trusted to elect. My ultimate promise to you is that I will always fight for our citizens, our families, our future, and our way of life—and I will never back down. We will take back control of our destiny, and enjoy the financial freedom that used to be attainable in this country. As your President, I promise you I will never stop fighting to get you the stress-free holiday season that's been taken away from you for so many years now. | | Dear Friend, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63d6767e206e4f7db852c7d7e99669d1&_e=TWzEaHC89yOrBGNdJGlht7sZVOPnQmjR0F4RPE__G3z_02fWCVVuAjPnlndkjRjkkrbV15v57NcQfggYPLc6YUeRBD_ff3-eF7NrAtQ8usFkUtdAPuKxuOjV-ztFDIqlF6JJ0mfPt0vuqSw53kGU-ASUoHhhXBwhlRO8kOeBebiMAlzGuwXAltkpwT99X1jkX_zCqi41eyu1xYonwOyBDk4WKlKymGw4yJInm-9TG63tZVcgpVM94imELOJTGkHwRr_eAqXeTUG4kuDMDbVN90U0if8kiJE634QHe_J9u61fOr6D6BA62RmyNXpy6-4CuKVrYwJKyBfO0wCqXAPMDy4h6la4LWxfPprEAe12nqgUW2v73CDgZDaz0W76Z86fEXqdScaMHlgbCrlVNDtSrQ%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63d6767e206e4f7db852c7d7e99669d1&_e=TWzEaHC89yOrBGNdJGlht7sZVOPnQmjR0F4RPE__G3z_02fWCVVuAjPnlndkjRjkkrbV15v57NcQfggYPLc6YUeRBD_ff3-eF7NrAtQ8usFkUtdAPuKxuOjV-ztFDIqlF6JJ0mfPt0vuqSw53kGU-ASUoHhhXBwhlRO8kOeBebiMAlzGuwXAltkpwT99X1jkX_zCqi41eyu1xYonwOyBDk4WKlKymGw4yJInm-9TG63uTYwpm0xweUzW6y2WlDwr31KMmW1hZ1Rc3v33dXWcS2VQA1GjJRt_ndsw-AUwHhP-guZozk8s0d-t0Hc3UJ8odj7fm9k_zC0xwwjOxbiIE0vzUsY1I24nMUKxL9O3NtE6R08-QuD7NlFelPE1xqLTPlDmsZZ84ibnprY-UPcL1w%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63d6767e206e4f7db852c7d7e99669d1&_e=TWzEaHC89yOrBGNdJGlht7sZVOPnQmjR0F4RPE__G3z_02fWCVVuAjPnlndkjRjkkrbV15v57NcQfggYPLc6YUeRBD_ff3-eF7NrAtQ8usFkUtdAPuKxuOjV-ztFDIqlF6JJ0mfPt0vuqSw53kGU-ASUoHhhXBwhlRO8kOeBebiMAlzGuwXAltkpwT99X1jkX_zCqi41eyu1xYonwOyBDk4WKlKymGw4yJInm-9TG615HeBrd6-NAqGqAsvxBDj6suw1Ld6raaFuUEy7RQsmEko4c2ug1xI6eEZrJuNThzf7Su6ZPlpxwLjuYsOJKsIdRrMaE3S5BE2qlAmGOZwL-0BaSxPlwyPvOmuqTDMPeo_aY9STiSB9cT83air4LZnunlheke_fFy4Tp79Pvz14Ag%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

Pharmaceutical companies are delaying, or outright canceling, the
development of new medicines following new drug rules signed into law
by President Joe Biden, Bloomberg reported. The Inflation Reduction
Act (IRA), which passed along partisan lines in Congress August 2022,
introduced provisions that allow Medicare to negotiate prices for new
pills nine years after they’ve hit the market and new biologic drugs

| | Dear Friend, [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/btGLgq2jTkafyv7-rYwTHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnaXa4P0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyMyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZYPqyIZlr-cRyFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/btGLgq2jTkafyv7-rYwTHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnaXa4P0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyMyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZYPqyIZlr-cRyFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/btGLgq2jTkafyv7-rYwTHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnaXa4P0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIyMyZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZYPqyIZlr-cRyFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad4d55ec4b214243b124c28d89268f3e&_e=sYf7GYkza1GzjwvflhUoI1Ny07PHvMbLan8gP16LRCWi_213_hRGWEXxWD3W3_bE1KBZ0v69celBYLdRilsHjlTKf6Z_9alYBw0e95_LLk_iwx6Kyiw_AB6JPTR6GiWkQ1YetqJ61fgpreMq0EC7VtQdyxbhiKn_UNZa5hSFBvo178r3sWg6HDMMUXypNmBQQyV2GqfPEXfohVBhnACGE9U4vc-UGimo1dq84-tl5FFctTnRMpC21v0anmXZNirCweOIr-eCbIkZtErTqfE9Ms9IM3uoHu4jF0sjYOfCr2wGkpp7oSSQZI1vBoskczU3fpVnAHGW1TE3mYeE18cMpBEQ9fN_slB5vRBU4YWq-92ZBTMRZZ5VqlsOQE0Px9NRO3224HAxWyY1ftc4L_WqXx4DTsXlU8dyCIWFp5bgk7E%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad4d55ec4b214243b124c28d89268f3e&_e=sYf7GYkza1GzjwvflhUoI1Ny07PHvMbLan8gP16LRCWi_213_hRGWEXxWD3W3_bE1KBZ0v69celBYLdRilsHjlTKf6Z_9alYBw0e95_LLk_iwx6Kyiw_AB6JPTR6GiWkQ1YetqJ61fgpreMq0EC7VtQdyxbhiKn_UNZa5hSFBvo178r3sWg6HDMMUXypNmBQQyV2GqfPEXfohVBhnACGE9U4vc-UGimo1dq84-tl5FFctTnRMpC21v0anmXZNirCweOIr-eCbIkZtErTqfE9MhnGyAd8tUKmFZfd0nAhEAVXxSpMq0426ymFg59J8VrVjzMcarhJ6kc2uYCy3JuvSKyKBMUWK2-fg5GSs1F7ZAHpAISiZB_vh2fNasjUjB3Nw5ljA1sXXFfmoeyc8nIWCgiP8Rnv-C5UxCWGeuAakw4%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ad4d55ec4b214243b124c28d89268f3e&_e=sYf7GYkza1GzjwvflhUoI1Ny07PHvMbLan8gP16LRCWi_213_hRGWEXxWD3W3_bE1KBZ0v69celBYLdRilsHjlTKf6Z_9alYBw0e95_LLk_iwx6Kyiw_AB6JPTR6GiWkQ1YetqJ61fgpreMq0EC7VtQdyxbhiKn_UNZa5hSFBvo178r3sWg6HDMMUXypNmBQQyV2GqfPEXfohVBhnACGE9U4vc-UGimo1dq84-tl5FFctTnRMpC21v0anmXZNirCweOIr-eCbIkZtErTqfE9MjrBAD6bgvB0INVw4QHQQgMLLsq1XLKm3fvRdGCQ0f_8UCpuYC2gBE-ev2FDUTrahvg9s79qKdV1QNvOm64wQBHU7lbQvGgKzR_oopMW9DcUE7-hoBYygU0a19gFsYcMa_ocGrbDnbya27CqjshhkeU%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=ad4d55ec4b214243b124c28d89268f3e&_t=rSb76YV1dXgfJLsgv1Ij74tFTkkvf0uLuIbVGuHjjWclI-6mIIbfG8ZVNwcGM1xHQ1m1pMxDob9HowgtF9GGI9soyC9oFrZkw8tUxeCDz14%3D)

---
Peter, should calling for the genocide of Jews be considered harassment and bullying? Anyone with a sliver of decency knows the answer is emphatically 'Yes'. Yet when the presidents of Harvard and MIT testified regarding the rampant antisemitism infecting their institutions, I couldn’t believe their inability to condemn such abhorrent rhetoric.
---
**[TELL THEM TO RESIGN.>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c20d01868a9d48409ecc0a5138721d0a&_e=XEUqZ1gfD4wrD3l0pB9RB11Cn648a0BfXJKaGYwlc8RTgV-O0HT-LcmjDrzU4TnFOdtz4GMALjAXTqwXEkAp-28ShbTUMViUQSIwT9QMLZaOEeHmxZc_H_3-5IsfMaZP4iInk-lP6QXTUfVTsM02nEKBMXQRB387pBAVOb-hOYVIwNDLJ8aNwgL9lqeWZzrXKZh0p0zgJm5-QMAB4xdVOvDRLx35FOsT2QDFzcGRXHHNbHBfD6Xd4rd_BfvCADuofYoY_nSXS-lqDhueb00HgeqUOQ_yByS139bz3zNt-N_1jejRMjFJiBC68Jk_ZfgdM61x-pe0nn_Dj4BD26HcweIjXAKczRfkDtpN302Jf8uJyG5gT5dr6JsDyEDT64MbTbaFTiTjKbsOCpCuD2KWiB3YwhvXTIDpOCZCBNRUwlQeLm0UskOUmGWPIxG5aVVvQs1GD7y05hO5_Bq7ckzivPe_kR8txRDfXh2egYU0BQg%3D)**
---

clean_body: Their leaders need to be held accountable...| | | Peter, should calling for the genocide of Jews be considered harassment and bullying? Anyone with a sliver of decency knows the answer is emphatically 'Yes'. Yet when the presidents of Harvard and MIT testified regarding the rampant antisemitism infecting their institutions, I couldn’t believe their inability to condemn such abhorrent rhetoric. Higher education has long been a hotbed of leftist hatred, and rooting out the moral decay in our nation’s finest institutions will require accountability at the very top. | | | | Thank you, | | | | | Congresswoman Elise Stefanik Paid for by the Republican National Committee. Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee. .

name: Rebekah Bydlak
subject: Why Catholic schools?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
In many communities, Catholic schools are the sole option for families seeking a robust educational foundation for their children.

| | | ****
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cade202b29614f9eae932ee61e8f461d&_e=Pdogmkjcq-NQyxXSkqE1IT0heJSt-I0mTl9he69PKhOFyePfE_XHjn5rWpOvFlD9YVKa6cvZpjwwyKgOj7rX3G5R1kQSq8icGjT8HlIu5T6MUEzeK3ePzh18PDXE-RoIf90JSd3TGAIXtBUS555GQHkDHClBORsQg0SxLs4A2H20r8SqzKK6tIrgltjkUwlx_-ztngyYYFeO822lB64ZWvvaAd0E3U4_0r34MpOcTkoAYdN4YlG-b7llIx1n98XT4qW0ir-da0aFnxUMrC5HpQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, Throughout the United States, Catholic schools are __**_instrumental_** in reigniting students' and communities' passion for learning. Whether it's the strong academic foundation offered by urban Catholic schools or the fundamental education accessible through new classical Catholic schools, Catholic education holds a profound intellectual and spiritual legacy for students and their families.
In many communities, Catholic schools are the sole option for families seeking a robust educational foundation for their children. **[Sadly, financial challenges are leading many Catholic schools to close their doors, leaving families with limited alternatives.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cade202b29614f9eae932ee61e8f461d&_e=Pdogmkjcq-NQyxXSkqE1IT0heJSt-I0mTl9he69PKhOFyePfE_XHjn5rWpOvFlD9YVKa6cvZpjwwyKgOj7rX3G5R1kQSq8icGjT8HlIu5T6MUEzeK3ePzh18PDXE-RoIEo6ZTF8I7wnWkSvOp_jDcP-fKRFju7xbkK7w6PGHRLuTIxneGxcH318HxfrV1FcWWtZ1iYJFiDj-J2loKiCsZJdMjRUy99-6Xm61YFRwzrbkogoKOf3io5SyIp79v3OBCoONIp0n4ibN3M2QNPH6cg%3D%3D)**
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cade202b29614f9eae932ee61e8f461d&_e=Pdogmkjcq-NQyxXSkqE1IT0heJSt-I0mTl9he69PKhOFyePfE_XHjn5rWpOvFlD9YVKa6cvZpjwwyKgOj7rX3G5R1kQSq8icGjT8HlIu5T6MUEzeK3ePzh18PDXE-RoIUAplaAWDOGJCaJuWgu9Ou-nSp_GEM_jzyUkXzrZ3BfhlQtcl-Frxtnu0GTDNeNssoR3GEkDd3QUYsHaiZ4AP6--aqPeRBUpAsm6hUwgUdcQ-eWd2eKAMOWHLGyh3z9tp_nNF15wCOy8m7_d2qfKyAA%3D%3D)
---
As the school choice movement expands, this story will no longer need to be told. Instead, we can embrace a story of resurgence, with schools reopening and growing to provide a quality education to families of all income levels. **[If you believe families should have access to Catholic education through the school choice movement, please add your name today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cade202b29614f9eae932ee61e8f461d&_e=Pdogmkjcq-NQyxXSkqE1IT0heJSt-I0mTl9he69PKhOFyePfE_XHjn5rWpOvFlD9YVKa6cvZpjwwyKgOj7rX3G5R1kQSq8icGjT8HlIu5T6MUEzeK3ePzh18PDXE-RoI0WyKWlS-dFfpTa8gpQYie8ELoM33xKx7F41ip3STMtcY0aMODo6zCWBTanSp30-SiNs_YV1lMylj2uGcwnvGTIfofHclxKe6814PZQelvhXhCwFxIr94ZNkr3gaFlC0MN_GysixNQKymAFGjMpv-oQ%3D%3D)**
---
[**SIGN TO STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cade202b29614f9eae932ee61e8f461d&_e=Pdogmkjcq-NQyxXSkqE1IT0heJSt-I0mTl9he69PKhOFyePfE_XHjn5rWpOvFlD9YVKa6cvZpjwwyKgOj7rX3G5R1kQSq8icGjT8HlIu5T6MUEzeK3ePzh18PDXE-RoICeWtTwUvdyeFlak8FtYxW4kbgk1DYz62zhqFWSXz4rvZGnJAaBhcrQ1UczDBOjtOm_KZ_QHxJrxevKjzSNwLU-RjW81CHihcPDxs62L3MeQVY6Qef8ZBSuyRy6KGy3jUq81yKK9SW2hnmHlWVjcK3A%3D%3D)
---
Onward, Rebekah Bydlak American Federation for Children

name: Team DeSantis
subject: What's the difference? This is.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Ron DeSantis works for ALL Americans. Joe Biden isn't working at all. This is why we need a change today.
---
| | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click [**here**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ddb5b57148c14fe280da24c48a6eb1bd&_t=JEWqYkr405NQDpVrSGoy2P6xmq-ddcnann3p5holGgkladB5fXW4hfjz1dpGZV1UVTPYOo1w62bA8md-5xVinjVCtj-hSPB1d2ViGK54iyo%3D)[
](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ddb5b57148c14fe280da24c48a6eb1bd&_e=Lv3RZlQi5W9rLsIrVPMXL9WcJM-MEj1858vT0IAX4Xvrzo_33O7W8NJOm_qswl4Mn7Xdr2swH8J_F7ejQofAkvWcAo0tpVRmLUxK5ll93T6OPaeajh_EhdDmBgCqYC8W-yDBvkAyi1y0vraCJXoJP2Tv-zCrR0-lZfuXj6e7OQ9YgXr9hmxr95DQxGS4JFD-IDCWn6096GzeLbT-VWprYSeFUA3RDn2ATIFjhH8rPkoo3o3d8L8mJW2L3L1y6Cc-5MALuxBjYLf4U8X4pmgXipzt2frYC7yC-XU9K36TXDeFFpf_-3JYHTyB6vUvXx_Xs9dzN-GS2EfSGHTNgWRvE_2dyCM_uZ9k3FkHGG535-l7rysNdI9xRjxl_K4zOSocbLdZBTsyK3Oo4OW5uAjd4wljbhXpHT9t9X8h41SuXdeWWgPD-Vs0g2utAwf2bPeHT-IvQgcR1_pcBhgvcAzoBQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter, **These are the facts:** 1) Ron DeSantis is a leader who turned the state of Florida from purple to Republican red. 2) Ron DeSantis saved the Florida economy and has run a consistent budget surplus every year in office. 3) Ron DeSantis has fought and WON against bureaucrats during Covid and woke radicalists trying to indoctrinate children. 4) Joe Biden has proven that he has no idea what he's doing and driven our economy into the ground. 5) Joe Biden has allowed our cities to go up in flames and called the ones lighting the match "brave." 6) Joe Biden has put our national security and survival at risk by refusing to stand up against threatening foreign adversaries like China. _In a time of rapid decline and critical tipping points in our history, while families across America suffer and federal economic, immigration, and social policies cripple our way of life, Biden has continued to fail the American people._ **One more fact:** With 2024 right around the corner, it's time to get the Republican party ready to win. We cannot risk leaving this country in the hands of the radical Left any longer. We won't sugarcoat this--Ron DeSantis is this country's only hope. We cannot allow Biden to win next year's election. We need the one candidate who CAN and WILL defeat him. He needs the support of this party to unite NOW. We have no time to wait, Peter. Please, we're asking you to do your part if you're able. **[Chipping in just $5 or $10](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ddb5b57148c14fe280da24c48a6eb1bd&_e=Lv3RZlQi5W9rLsIrVPMXL9WcJM-MEj1858vT0IAX4Xvrzo_33O7W8NJOm_qswl4Mn7Xdr2swH8J_F7ejQofAkvWcAo0tpVRmLUxK5ll93T6OPaeajh_EhdDmBgCqYC8W-yDBvkAyi1y0vraCJXoJP2Tv-zCrR0-lZfuXj6e7OQ9YgXr9hmxr95DQxGS4JFD-IDCWn6096GzeLbT-VWprYSeFUA3RDn2ATIFjhH8rPkoo3o3d8L8mJW2L3L1y6Cc-5MALuxBjYLf4U8X4pmgXipzt2frYC7yC-XU9K36TXDd25vvr7AvsQRRB-JmBp-BYyFcgesu33VoMharqtJA-bTqfVFCfsd0LkElb2mPQ0reFsMa-x-CRkluEQT_ad9ePeWouletrLl-xKnuOayLDbCyDaqZP4CZPqdhTjuZuLSqsm_6n_YGGmv1lzzmSuLVcrQSScmOFWzCfyHF0x-I3b0pM02OXC37959Yjy8PdGjY%3D)** goes so far in this critical race.

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ddb5b57148c14fe280da24c48a6eb1bd&_e=Lv3RZlQi5W9rLsIrVPMXL9WcJM-MEj1858vT0IAX4Xvrzo_33O7W8NJOm_qswl4Mn7Xdr2swH8J_F7ejQofAkvWcAo0tpVRmLUxK5ll93T6OPaeajh_EhdDmBgCqYC8W-yDBvkAyi1y0vraCJXoJP2Tv-zCrR0-lZfuXj6e7OQ9YgXr9hmxr95DQxGS4JFD-IDCWn6096GzeLbT-VWprYSeFUA3RDn2ATIFjhH8rPkoo3o3d8L8mJW2L3L1y6Cc-5MALuxBjYLf4U8X4pmgXipzt2frYC7yC-XU9K36TXDeFFpf_-3JYHTyB6vUvXx_XY7qitzmHxKihAIYtzBKCbR4quhejFRsS4HEQedTOYHuyfmUTNwTcfJrZme6CrVoFQq7tu0AA78s1EUgCqN_FXiM4jzP3tno92dqxg9Kq-dlWEsCEcJNH6Onxh5FuqV3JtYuvXtIzytScukdoLN45YQ%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ddb5b57148c14fe280da24c48a6eb1bd&_e=Lv3RZlQi5W9rLsIrVPMXL9WcJM-MEj1858vT0IAX4Xvrzo_33O7W8NJOm_qswl4Mn7Xdr2swH8J_F7ejQofAkvWcAo0tpVRmLUxK5ll93T6OPaeajh_EhdDmBgCqYC8W-yDBvkAyi1y0vraCJXoJP2Tv-zCrR0-lZfuXj6e7OQ9YgXr9hmxr95DQxGS4JFD-IDCWn6096GzeLbT-VWprYSeFUA3RDn2ATIFjhH8rPkoo3o3d8L8mJW2L3L1y6Cc-5MALuxBjYLf4U8X4pmgXipzt2frYC7yC-XU9K36TXDeFFpf_-3JYHTyB6vUvXx_XCiJiLGZ_0HsIO_1_5hfjxNRl9BZD93sfD6zrwaptx9mVC59BWtyMQx_KI9zDhkk8vwhr6oWP0jzOgyiG1YhPsQ46CrHEv1JHjPI94yYmCkRFMOCBqSryyrGfIe6zsw3xW9fs4LOD8j0oEWGhy25SHw%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e4198946dd34a729a7c6efb8b026365&_e=qzJzfXHrhk3ob74ky0NsibQRoRHoy0TVO9yI5vkYIlIwAq-w_b6XwsRCd85lQe4u8gWMzrWWMxv8UXsewEX5Cmr2Peh8PTwau90lcXNQrAuzKGTBSbmMWtu1cZuW37j020nq4Pcq2CmTZ99AHL5-MJ1d0eRWBsQxJYzguEv6N1D3pAca-6g2wWfP7EPineYKBirSxNrMbURWOk1hkEMtG4tstZBzXxPSsp8t7TvQ9ZwFxXe7PNyF1HDDPrfbMpGcGsxBVuYXG7qjCGLtwRzgpk8uEUwK2KGp5jpmErJ1Q_iimD3PeMAOd5wQi8R_sfm89lviVAQqLdPeNtgGipNsbIbbjo-u4LG_yTmcrS4VBYUofYSfHWLJqTzINGj_ZNPtdLdUt_SN28UmyLKk_jLn1X6VhrQT86SRFYnbc0qvHrI_ggtx_zPoceJg1ODIV1CH)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e4198946dd34a729a7c6efb8b026365&_e=qzJzfXHrhk3ob74ky0NsibQRoRHoy0TVO9yI5vkYIlIwAq-w_b6XwsRCd85lQe4u8gWMzrWWMxv8UXsewEX5Cmr2Peh8PTwau90lcXNQrAuzKGTBSbmMWtu1cZuW37j020nq4Pcq2CmTZ99AHL5-MJ1d0eRWBsQxJYzguEv6N1D3pAca-6g2wWfP7EPineYKBirSxNrMbURWOk1hkEMtG4tstZBzXxPSsp8t7TvQ9ZwFxXe7PNyF1HDDPrfbMpGcGsxBVuYXG7qjCGLtwRzgpk8uEUwK2KGp5jpmErJ1Q_hepAKDJqic3rRpDraZ2zisHf_Mrnzx9iTn-Z__XhUXoqFkNREtLiT0hQoaJCzEXgi3Z0DfryctFAv-SDQ2MYATLjXdohv63tGdVXOtmEAcUhVw1pd0eA5Cdm3rZMYzbxAVIUoXXq1h3wsi3_jNsPiA) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e4198946dd34a729a7c6efb8b026365&_e=qzJzfXHrhk3ob74ky0NsibQRoRHoy0TVO9yI5vkYIlIwAq-w_b6XwsRCd85lQe4u8gWMzrWWMxv8UXsewEX5Cmr2Peh8PTwau90lcXNQrAuzKGTBSbmMWtu1cZuW37j020nq4Pcq2CmTZ99AHL5-MJ1d0eRWBsQxJYzguEv6N1D3pAca-6g2wWfP7EPineYKBirSxNrMbURWOk1hkEMtG4tstZBzXxPSsp8t7TvQ9ZwFxXe7PNyF1HDDPrfbMpGcGsxBVuYXG7qjCGLtwRzgpk8uEUwK2KGp5jpmErJ1Q_iGVLfM-01ELWa4YDy6zjvtvKGMrc7h3yEYPesSngs64PVfeszbfpmQPsKE6xM6XgXk8sz7nQS4uNAXjHEUnzXZC_12NI3f92shmCGRxKXaO96noX4CYQcnJ-rM7mb-4-BKTacq8Vb8m5Ips7_f0ueW)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: How you can defeat radical leftism
body:
Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4be37583c42e43f3b842533e66c401d5&_e=oiDisDKMtpF_vchtXXUrHyxR25zsmjLwKO8wsjt8-7nBVrJ4zV0C8Ol8oyMbuQXrH7fPoCillE3bJ2ie2EG-n-GznNxhCjAvHjWI4yvVEhvdsyTyhGvDNu-yLh784GLSaD1YaMguvfRuxnr3E0lma5C8zwhEv-Ifn4CM7-1OHuRQc7Sx0ZfIt7AUiv63PawfkC-Anqnx5dlBPOLXwyTpxui0ied1VPdSdcf5Tc5Oq3uFg_rwN1WF49TAUKowrF0bOy7QKyz1Cy1CPL-H48MDjZJIRXo5gJkaBrRDzrnimq5OWciGEcbu424lemo2EeIYUfS4fcW8iJRJe0WxVENs4J6Ay4dh8d5RtRuuXdRCges%3D)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,

The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country.

After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles.

Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country.

That's because today, the deep state controls D.C.

**Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas.

** In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives.

The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025.

**Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan.**

Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration.

These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation.

Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state.

**The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025.**

But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target.

As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear.

Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today?
**
****If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/eoy-campaign/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4be37583c42e43f3b842533e66c401d5&_e=oiDisDKMtpF_vchtXXUrHyxR25zsmjLwKO8wsjt8-7nBVrJ4zV0C8Ol8oyMbuQXrH7fPoCillE3bJ2ie2EG-n-GznNxhCjAvHjWI4yvVEhvdsyTyhGvDNu-yLh784GLSaD1YaMguvfRuxnr3E0lma5C8zwhEv-Ifn4CM7-1OHuRQc7Sx0ZfIt7AUiv63PawfkC-Anqnx5dlBPOLXwyTpxuPK_UU7KjbGdrpI1JNx3kcpAHBSO_Ac2vWLYhxNvydmNu6Yk6ynwRbI8fOB9xE-p4LBU1t3jUPoJJwFgpjWIg1_Dj_9tx9RAQ1TdpJJ-kUnkOIqGTVTcDLuy0LeWebbHWtDvxPL906AAVJnq_rgTaI%3D)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Next year is a critical year and here at The Heritage Foundation, we 're ramping up our Project 2025 efforts to save America. clean_body: Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country. | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, The next presidential administration could be a turning point for our country. After years of inflation, open borders, reckless spending, and rampant crime, America desperately needs effective governance grounded in our founding principles. Unfortunately, a conservative victory in the next election is not enough to save our country. That's because today, the deep state controls D.C. Regardless of who is in office, career bureaucrats in our federal agencies like the Justice Department, Environmental Protection Agency, and the State Department independently push their own leftist agendas. In order to implement common-sense, conservative policies, we must have a plan to rein in these agencies and replace these leftist bureaucrats with principled conservatives. The Heritage Foundation has that plan--called Project 2025. Through Project 2025, The Heritage Foundation has united 80 conservative organizations and is leading the charge for the next presidential transition plan. Heritage's policy scholars created a comprehensive policy book and a plan to implement it starting day one of the next administration. These policies include securing our borders, ensuring election integrity, and reversing the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation. Additionally, we're identifying and training qualified patriots to staff the next administration and replace the leftist bureaucrats - ending their control of the deep state. The radical leftist mainstream media has published several panicked articles attacking Heritage and Project 2025. But as we like to say, if the leftist media is angry at you, you're over the target. As 2024 rapidly approaches, we're kicking Project 2025 into high gear. Will you help us make this much needed program a massive success? Will you support Project 2025 with a special gift today? If you 're ready to ensure the next presidential administration can enact conservative policies you and I believe in, please make a tax-deductible year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation using the secure link below. Friend,
On Tuesday night, Donald Trump posted on his failing Truth Social network his endorsement in the GOP Ohio Senate primary to try and unseat Sen. Sherrod Brown: he is fully behind MAGA candidate Bernie Moreno, a former used car dealer from Cleveland.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SUsAhEHuLlTFNfCZWprF1l5i-m_ljDZcgq4oYLYUSeWQyHfKU3UYYIwqVVqziV4nhEjfCI6FSPMlc9FwML_jmJ18cz-o-Uwm1gsY0xaqnZJJmkU4idI3MZ6rQhM-UJZQqNuggFrgI1oiqnLI4WpBAG5Gxf1XwH2JErl5sfMdMvzMQ1FzhWuEAKzYy7BRgXOCGORHdKFfFALNOAxLLJzV2FaVOy7lOyC1&c=6nVvnIyn3vroVKWuG4bYaoS7k-9erZxPx4Wpavp7B3gbRYj_9nzvSg==&ch=R1MYX2ypci6mTtWoM7bWcxJ2YahYbllHIN3w_CSA-zhGxBfog0Xvcg==)

| Trump proudly boasted that Moreno will "fight the corrupt Deep State that is destroying our Country." And Moreno reciprocated and endorsed Trump's presidential bid--a sharp break from 2016, when Moreno reportedly said that Trump was a "lunatic invading the party."
The reason why I am writing about this is because without campaigns like ours running to win and driving up turnout in competitive counties across Ohio, Sen. Brown would be in danger of losing and the Senate will flip.
If Sherrod Brown--who I know as a thoroughly good person and a genuine leader for the people of Ohio--is going to be reelected next year, we need strong, well-funded Democratic campaigns up and down the ballot.
I am running to defeat Troy Balderson, another former used car salesman whose family business has a well-documented record of defrauding Ohioans. Balderson will be an automatic rubber stamp for any and all of Trump's darkest authoritarian impulses.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ebf3be98aeb47c4a022b5feebb6b49e&_e=5gASVAPbATAtB0bjR4P6q4BfvKFzRZ7EM-bfGINBBOb8-KVPv3rQStXOtwCQ5TuprQryf2U7VUCzFuRdHaFt23xYKP6CYup8qFjr_le8TO7QS1Tll7fPGVj-0lRKOnJ6qVpEjNwIySsnk8rJRVRFmr0vUbd1MuEXvnH1rYW5W174j-FFacstmKTdyx8s7ySpzLFLAEDwQ-pHVWObNzobEzujKeBHExD0oeC48z9KRjG5DwqmBF_z4NJMTG33gtlDqQGrJPuOfknt0T1k8_D7njrqmMY24tpAhqJ3QFNJ6cac1gb-uEcZkwKGK0Sd75wj). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ebf3be98aeb47c4a022b5feebb6b49e&_e=5gASVAPbATAtB0bjR4P6q4BfvKFzRZ7EM-bfGINBBOb8-KVPv3rQStXOtwCQ5TuprQryf2U7VUCzFuRdHaFt23xYKP6CYup8qFjr_le8TO7QS1Tll7fPGVj-0lRKOnJ6qVpEjNwIySsnk8rJRVRFmlDIRHQa6EHJ1aLPH_OZ4lbj_u4iHGQ8apXfgwW01RJXuzBwRUSJ1svoCzJLnIMKFdS2Pi8vGdXkXlbg1D8jYEV1Caf7wnIwhQJoA1fBMlFgJR89P-DLwwad94x0vUvWMW9PdBYsrZ12Gy4cIPZuvWXpaKGm3D7t4Li5nSenjFj1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: The Success Sequence is not so simple – update from Mississippi's conservative voice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**We’ve all heard of the ‘success sequence’, right? **

**This is the idea that if someone manages to achieve three things - finish high school, get a full-time job and get married before having kids – they will avoid poverty. **

According to lots of robust research, anyone that passes these three milestones stands a 97 percent chance of not being poor.
---
|
---
_The Success Sequence_
| **Does this mean that the success sequence is therefore the answer to America’s socio-economic problems?** Surely, if we could just get every young American to do those three things, poverty would soon be a thing of the past?

I am certain that encouraging young Americans to graduate from high school, find gainful employment and marry before having kids is a great and worthwhile thing to do. **I am less convinced that prescribing the ‘success sequence’ as some sort of magic solution will get us very far.**

Why? Because finishing high school, getting a job and investing in relationships are an indication that someone has what it takes to make a success of their life as much as anything else.

**Sociologists may be right when they point out the correlation between the success sequence and avoiding poverty. But might that be because the kind of person who gets their life together is also the type of person likely to get it together when it comes to school, work and relationships?**

I imagine that every US company with a market capitalization in excess of, say, $ 1 billion has impressive corporate head offices. But shiny corporate offices are an indication of success. Big corporate HQs do not themselves explain why successful firms are successful.

It is something else – having lots of happy customers, perhaps – that accounts for both the high market capitalization and the impressive corporate offices.
---
|
---
_Grand corporate offices do not make businesses successful._
| Similarly, it is not the success sequence itself that is the engine of a person’s accomplishment, but rather a reflection of it. **What might the engine of personal accomplishment be? **

**When people talk excitedly about the success sequence, I suspect they are really talking about one of the most important (and often overlooked) ideas in economics; time preferences.**
---
|
---
_One marshmallow now, or two in ten minutes?_
| **Several decades ago, a professor at Stanford, Walter Mischel, conducted the famous marshmallow experiment.** He offered kids one marshmallow right away, or two marsh mallows if the child chose to wait a while before eating it.

Mischel’s marshmallow experiment measured the extent to which each child was prepared to delay gratification. Those that were willing to wait had what we call a low time preference. Think of them as being ‘tomorrow people’, prepared to wait for what they wanted.

Those that preferred one marshmallow, but right away had what economists would call a high time preference. Think of these as ‘today people’, more inclined to want things right away.

**Over the years that followed, Mischel discovered a remarkable correlation between the time preferences of the kids, and their subsequent achievements in life, not only academic but in terms of relationships, too. **

**‘Tomorrow people’ tend to have brighter tomorrows than ‘today people’.**

Those that invest the time and effort in graduating high school, starting out in the jobs market and forming permanent relationships, I would venture, have lower time preferences than those that don’t.

**Rather than see the success sequence milestones as the solution to poverty eradication, policy makers ought to think instead about how we might encourage us to be better ‘tomorrow people’.** Many government policies encourage us to be ‘today people’. High inflation, for example, discourages savings and incentivizes us to spend. Low interest rates encourage us to borrow. Welfare programs risk incentivizing dependency.

**If we want to see more young Americans follow the success sequence, we should implement policies that encourage them to invest their time and efforts in the future.** That means stable prices, but it also means taking steps to ensure young Americans can afford to buy a home of their own.

It means lower income taxes, so those that work get to keep more of what they earn. It means taking more active steps to reduce long term welfare dependency. It means giving young families school choice so that they can ensure their children get the right education for them.

**Politicians should not just talk about the success sequence. They need to make changes to public policy so that it is easier for young Americans to do the right thing.**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f6e6f65000&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=7d08548805) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=7d08548805).

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c160a42314b4d94bca1e080696da0d4&_e=MuRCOj9t7UElHLAjZa_tQXHLdMp-392hARCdou6AAtp_22-ml_viCWzcAswjSsY4WeT-DX8WZUBxysA_hLqQeEJJu3-yQsw7KLGs4pluzP5axPp-U7gKcZ8yOA0Qz76PirLpt8aPb37awFWc3pATGEHfyxzZB65ALjiWBn0f-DD2DHAsbx9doFv7KV1CcQ7atIa-yw5SHpXcpPcRHv94oHegSixtdjShrZZQbDoEUIXN7lMOF7RNwBp2rd8204-f94ttgyUliMxObcvKvMikqQOT1PcVWJvuKKoxVQ6RY0XoywVHneAGFXhA8LnM1DGgk-IpAM2SOCYalbfRzP0b4opQpanwgecMgebfokZKA0cjcVqRi2IwxxT21p3cMA5Rz_EPoDC4VOsR8LjJjlraTXrgPse-svW9NduVvgZvYpgFNkheUMwSioY_DxP1QXIK)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c160a42314b4d94bca1e080696da0d4&_e=MuRCOj9t7UElHLAjZa_tQXHLdMp-392hARCdou6AAtp_22-ml_viCWzcAswjSsY4WeT-DX8WZUBxysA_hLqQeEJJu3-yQsw7KLGs4pluzP5axPp-U7gKcZ8yOA0Qz76PirLpt8aPb37awFWc3pATGEHfyxzZB65ALjiWBn0f-DD2DHAsbx9doFv7KV1CcQ7atIa-yw5SHpXcpPcRHv94oHegSixtdjShrZZQbDoEUIXN7lMOF7RNwBp2rd8204-f94ttgyUliMxObcvKvMikqQOT1PcVWJvuKKoxVQ6RY0XbG5qPjQ0doSNI5diQ27-ajXgB0BE-gXHLDGphd-UH_Tn22f5z-HO7hXBBj311dleCkmzapTkI6VVlVyR_XtBXYP2mwIZS0T-JCdDhHTfbY1xC-GtfsBS1pupfyaBTy1IF_Mof3x04PZZO0Nuv7PYo) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c160a42314b4d94bca1e080696da0d4&_e=MuRCOj9t7UElHLAjZa_tQXHLdMp-392hARCdou6AAtp_22-ml_viCWzcAswjSsY4WeT-DX8WZUBxysA_hLqQeEJJu3-yQsw7KLGs4pluzP5axPp-U7gKcZ8yOA0Qz76PirLpt8aPb37awFWc3pATGEHfyxzZB65ALjiWBn0f-DD2DHAsbx9doFv7KV1CcQ7atIa-yw5SHpXcpPcRHv94oHegSixtdjShrZZQbDoEUIXN7lMOF7RNwBp2rd8204-f94ttgyUliMxObcvKvMikqQOT1PcVWJvuKKoxVQ6RY0W278yEAuCK-lH7IvwUKuaOpRF-M2OEs6AnQrNq9dvauWgdhneQ_8ANNdsEbbnZlBzHYSvL43JisK9omuIC3Pq9LLmPqv-Y5cIST1Vek-QF9Dp3wLslGe0NbWaMsDM0ehmI_UlfVfwGOqRBY2zqnguH)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. I would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, __ | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Dear Peter,
I have been vocal in my condemnation of the Colorado Supreme Court’s removal of President Trump from the Colorado ballot.
It was wrong and it is extremely dangerous.
_In a democracy,_ _it is the voters who are supposed to decide who takes office_. In authoritarian countries, voters only get to choose from a roster of government-approved candidates. We must not let America move further in that direction.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=take_12_23_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=4)
If the Democrats don’t like Trump, then great — beat him at the ballot box.
With your help, that is exactly what we will do. We will beat both President Trump and President Biden on Election Day 2024.
_To do that, we have to get onto the ballot._
The two parties’ candidates are on the ballot automatically. Not me. We have to muster a 50-state ground game to be listed.
**_And we will face the same sort of legal shenanigans that Trump does to keep us off._**
But we are overcoming each obstacle as it arises as we quickly gain momentum. [That’s why it is critical that we hear from you with your best gift today.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=take_12_23_23_email_1rs_2_nd&n=5)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I'll never hide from my record.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I don't think that my opponent can say the same.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75677825/445429647/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk524-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4ZGRiMmQtOTNhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xx-GL4Fmq6Do2D9QXNGkldbJ-ubwlulH10GkC5tkiw0=)
Hi, friend, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team to flip Florida blue. Your support truly means so much to me.
**I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about my record and why I'm in this race.[(Polling data shows that this race is tied, so if you're already all in to flip Florida blue, you can make a gift here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75677826/445429648/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk524-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzg4ZGRiMmQtOTNhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xx-GL4Fmq6Do2D9QXNGkldbJ-ubwlulH10GkC5tkiw0=)**
My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to win our American Dream. **That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much.**
I worked at several nonprofit organizations across Florida, helping to **protect our wildlife and preserve our coral reefs**. During my time working at Florida International University, I helped lead a new program to **improve access to affordable health care for** more Floridians.
In 2018, I decided to take these fights to Washington. I ran for Congress in a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, **I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare Advantage coverage,** to ensure that more Americans could get the vital care they deserve. I also worked with Republicans to provide **economic relief to families and small businesses** and secured $200 million for **Everglades restoration. **
Throughout my time in Congress, **I fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms** , serving as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. This issue is deeply personal to me: When I was 24, my father died from gun violence. After leaving Congress, I joined Gabby Giffords' advocacy group as a senior advisor and continued to fight for safer communities and an end to the gun lobby's grip on Washington.
I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But I don't think that my opponent can say the same. **Rick Scott has spent his time in power writing the plan to cut Social Security and Medicare, attempting to undermine our elections, attacking our rights, and making it harder for working families to get ahead**. It's no wonder his approval ratings are tanking.

clean_body: I don't think that my opponent can say the same. | | | = Hi, friend, thank you for being a part of this grassroots team to flip Florida blue. Your support truly means so much to me. I want to take a moment to tell you a bit about my record and why I'm in this race.= My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to win our American Dream. That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much. I worked at several nonprofit organizations across Florida, helping to protect our wildlife and preserve our coral reefs. During my time working at Florida International University, I helped lead a new program to improve access to affordable health care for more Floridians. In 2018, I decided to take these fights to Washington. I ran for Congress in a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare Advantage coverage, to ensure that more Americans could get the vital care they deserve. I also worked with Republicans to provide economic relief to families and small businesses and secured $200 million for Everglades restoration. Throughout my time in Congress, I fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms , serving as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. This issue is deeply personal to me: When I was 24, my father died from gun violence. After leaving Congress, I joined Gabby Giffords' advocacy group as a senior advisor and continued to fight for safer communities and an end to the gun lobby's grip on Washington. I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But I don't think that my opponent can say the same. Rick Scott has spent his time in power writing the plan to cut Social Security and Medicare, attempting to undermine our elections, attacking our rights, and making it harder for working families to get ahead. It's no wonder his approval ratings are tanking. My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024, but I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f49bf3d09e8146c0b4cd99d8858d05cc&_e=_LciKcTTsqA19k1UTNeqyD6PmX4hHp2fZyTg5pV5XLF7vSdP4GOmgkcFXCRXab081PMN3_KXbBfvC-AKbjelRIbW-FhbU4Smhc18afC4V97mywU_YZ1xe16JEr7IEaMkteMTg3EyDF8iOypWKZTzHEcSs-SI9vNy1jfemgxU8tU0JjahE4OeVZepYpl3893G82MQifEEICkX3iVhOF5V80hFI-VDdyJG0f8g_UzxGSGQg8CMGeYPO8G7XP7ITshS9Rz96rbDsOkfe8Ck5I9UN_VhH1CLU9A4qyu7qyw3HZe7cBqUaPs_OPmkBilO25-0). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f49bf3d09e8146c0b4cd99d8858d05cc&_e=_LciKcTTsqA19k1UTNeqyD6PmX4hHp2fZyTg5pV5XLF7vSdP4GOmgkcFXCRXab081PMN3_KXbBfvC-AKbjelRIbW-FhbU4Smhc18afC4V97mywU_YZ1xe16JEr7IEaMkteMTg3EyDF8iOypWKZTzHH-7CHZRPbAgcd4AkAwJArYYynZ5UkNrk0RE5wGPdbfU_MW9LpeV0ZlJtdNfKSxdLffmHCLK6mmgWx1jM3xrjS_WB9U5EX8clqyZ3T6a-7LwViCt8kaIDY77qUEkLY1sJo20-ZMX3pNmQO4lfSBBAoLQ2kbn8zHPryJ6vgJ76AFw) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f49bf3d09e8146c0b4cd99d8858d05cc&_e=_LciKcTTsqA19k1UTNeqyD6PmX4hHp2fZyTg5pV5XLF7vSdP4GOmgkcFXCRXab081PMN3_KXbBfvC-AKbjelRIbW-FhbU4Smhc18afC4V97mywU_YZ1xe16JEr7IEaMkteMTg3EyDF8iOypWKZTzHHRc3kF_hfUg9aT57DTW5XDs4Cr1n1Jg---lT8DONKRFO9HX8yyGO53nzMEOiA_Wbv5_zGpAwr4oVqjhb2wVCVRqqPU0RLdP2ZAF-sNNo_6Gl-IAnJRGcjN2EXFjiKKreIbp0plysS2zpEojc04KLbTTbHbFieaZ30O1NNuA7MWE) on these survival food kits while you can.

The Wisconsin Supreme Court overturned Republican-drawn legislative maps on Friday, ordering new ones be drawn ahead of the 2024 election. The court sided 4-3 with the Democrat-backed coalition who filed a lawsuit challenging the maps the day after the court flipped to a liberal majority in August, when the newly-elected Justice Janet Protasiewicz joined the court. body:
Senate Republicans confirm their #1 choice to flip Wisconsin’s Democratic Senate seat will run against Tammy Baldwin.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22bbc5ff-a497-493a-b0ba-4000fe4f2604/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | 🚨 BREAKING: National Republicans just confirmed GOP megamillionaire Eric Hovde will run against Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin’s Senate race 🚨 Mitch McConnell’s #1 choice in Wisconsin’s Senate race, Eric Hovde, is going to run — a multimillionaire California bank owner who pledged to spend at least $20 million 💰 of his own personal fortune to buy Tammy’s seat. [We need your help to ensure Tammy Baldwin has the resources to fight off the GOP’s self-funding recruit, defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat, and keep our Democratic majority. Split a donation between Blue Amp Action and Tammy’s campaign now:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fa5c1b2-4af4-4d2d-a36f-610df97fa829/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb310b70-6885-4eef-a947-9190d11b7e12/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republicans spent an eye-popping $77 million to buy their way to a 1% victory in Wisconsin’s last Senate race, and Mitch McConnell is sure they can flip Tammy’s seat this time around. That’s why the GOP is calling multimillionaire California bank owner Eric Hovde back to Wisconsin to self-fund a run for U.S. Senate. It’s clear Republicans will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat Tammy and elect another anti-choice extremist to the Senate who will push their radical agenda forward. We can’t let Wisconsin’s Senate seat be bought by the highest bidder. But running against a self-funder with a virtually unlimited war chest at his disposal means this could be Tammy’s toughest and most expensive race yet. If we’re going to compete with Eric Hovde’s major cash advantage, we’ll need LOTS of grassroots donors like you to step up right now. [Will you rush a split donation of any amount to ensure Tammy Baldwin has the resources to defeat her multimillionaire GOP opponent and keep Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat blue? We can’t let Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate buy this race and cost us our Democratic majority.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6709e7eb-0d53-4672-8ef5-d83f764318d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far, Peter, and we’re counting on your support to protect this seat. Thanks for your support on this. — Team Baldwin

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
