name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Molinaro?=
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/af6224c7106b/molinaro-meets-with-schoharie-locals-on-inflation-law-enforcement-9418527?e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| |
---
|
---
| This past year has been the honor of a lifetime, serving you as your representative in Congress. It was definitely an eventful year, but through it all I always kept my commitment to fight for you and give Upstate NY a voice in Congress.

I look forward to year two and appreciate all of your support along the way. There's plenty of work still to do, but together we can continue to deliver results on the things that matter most.
---
|
---
| |
---
**A Holiday Tradition**

Let's have a little fun and start things off with one of my favorite traditions - Festivus and the Airing of Grievances!
---
| **10.** Money can’t buy you love or apparently a pennant #LetsGoMets

**9.** If I had a nickel for every time I was asked to explain Bidenomics, I’d have less nickels because of Bidenomics.

**8.** If I had a nickel for every Speaker vote I took, it might make up the difference.

**7.** 233 years of New Yorkers coming here for work, and yet no one in Washington can figure out how to make a decent slice of pizza.

**6.** I had a comment about the Giants not even knowing how to tank right, but Tommy DeVito’s agent convinced me it would be in my best interest not to make it.

**5.** Stop asking me if I like Mirabito or Stewart's more. I love both of my gas stations equally.

**4.** We should keep an eye on Andrew Cuomo. He might be up to something.

**3.** Can pervert Al Franken stop emailing me about donating to Josh Riley? Josh is a millionaire! He has enough money.

**2.** My five-year-old caught stealing a cookie answers questions more directly than the presidents of our most prestigious universities. It’s really not that hard to say antisemitism is bad!

**1.** Redistricting. Seriously. Again?
---
|
---
|
---
A lot of Representatives sit back their first year and don't push on many issues. Not me. I went to Congress to fight for you and am proud to have delivered some key results already.

✅Passed Lower Energy Costs Act to lower energy costs.

✅Passed the Secure the Border Act to secure the border, end the migrant crisis, streamline asylum process.

✅Passed my first bill, the Schools Not Shelters Act, which prevents Governor Hochul from housing migrants in schools.

✅Expanded mental health and substance use treatment, broke down barriers for individuals with disabilities, and fought to deliver relief to farmers.
|
---
|
---
New York 19 is a big district. But in order to best represent you, I have made it a priority to get out and spend as much time throughout the entire district as possible. It's been a lot of miles, a lot of coffee, and a lot of fun.

**11+** Town Hall meetings to hear directly from you
**23,284** Miles on the car, driving to each county as often as possible
**225** Cups of coffee from amazing coffee shops throughout the district
**23** Pizzas flipped

|
---
|
---
We accomplished some good things this past year, but as we look ahead there are some key issues that we are still fighting on.

**Securing the Border**
The Biden Administration's open border policy is devastating communities across the country. Here in New York, we've seen how it not only hurts us economically, but it puts our communities in danger. We must secure the border.

**Affordability**
Middle Class Americans are struggling. The cost of everything continues to go up, while the value of every dollar earned goes down. Despite the Biden Administration's contrary claims, we see the truth every time we go to a grocery store, as simply feeding our families is becoming a challenge.

We need to slow down inflation and we need to restore economic opportunity.
|
---
| Thank you again for all your support throughout this year. From my family to yours, I wish you a Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays and a Happy New Year.

\- Marc
---

But in order to best represent you, I have made it a priority to get out and spend as much time throughout the entire district as possible. It's been a lot of miles, a lot of coffee, and a lot of fun. 11+ Town Hall meetings to hear directly from you 23,284 Miles on the car, driving to each county as often as possible 225 Cups of coffee from amazing coffee shops throughout the district 23 Pizzas flipped | | We accomplished some good things this past year, but as we look ahead there are some key issues that we are still fighting on. Securing the Border The Biden Administration's open border policy is devastating communities across the country. Here in New York, we've seen how it not only hurts us economically, but it puts our communities in danger. We must secure the border. Affordability Middle Class Americans are struggling. The cost of everything continues to go up, while the value of every dollar earned goes down. Despite the Biden Administration's contrary claims, we see the truth every time we go to a grocery store, as simply feeding our families is becoming a challenge. We need to slow down inflation and we need to restore economic opportunity. | | Thank you again for all your support throughout this year. From my family to yours, I wish you a Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays and a Happy New Year. \- Marc | | | Paid for by Marc for US Inc. | | | | | | | | | | | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Survey Alert via Team Williams
subject: What matters to YOU?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
As we end the year and get closer to the 2024 elections, Brian wants to hear from this campaign's strongest supporters. | | Peter — We have a small favor to ask:

As we end the year and get closer to the 2024 elections, Brian wants to hear from this campaign's strongest supporters about the issues that are on the top of their minds...That's you!

**[If you're ready to share your thoughts, please, take this end-of-year priorities survey now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75681408/445434072/-1455566814?ms=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&refcode=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&source=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=r/431oVp3bJ4mQasxXBMfA322iXz2tJEPwDiW0kfdhcBPUs+6oqzl3C9Cv/qjhhrr7sVT1vGDfIm0fXnQMAweNtYv1ZAaUGlaFvhjZgP+v8U4oJMr2/6hyDrvLiTNNZLSQ+rLQXTE9IICO2/9tkM1w==&refcode2=cc5da977-99a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1ZGE5NzctOTlhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jAJkQjzt-tLR7QejVmUCG4xRbDI3TZjaTR0E9q1I2wo=&emci=652877c9-bf9a-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=cc5da977-99a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=13153572)**

The work we put in now is critical to winning TX-32 in 2024. We have the opportunity to keep making strides on issues including gun violence, reproductive rights, climate resilience, affordable housing, and so much more.

That's why Brian wants to hear directly from you. Understanding your priorities helps him ensure he’s focusing on the issues that matter most to you and your community.

**[Will you take our brief end-of-year priorities survey and share what issues are at the top of your mind? We’re going to share the results with Brian, and it’d mean a lot to him if your response was included.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75681409/445434073/-1455566814?ms=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&refcode=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&source=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=r/431oVp3bJ4mQasxXBMfA322iXz2tJEPwDiW0kfdhcBPUs+6oqzl3C9Cv/qjhhrr7sVT1vGDfIm0fXnQMAweNtYv1ZAaUGlaFvhjZgP+v8U4oJMr2/6hyDrvLiTNNZLSQ+rLQXTE9IICO2/9tkM1w==&refcode2=cc5da977-99a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1ZGE5NzctOTlhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jAJkQjzt-tLR7QejVmUCG4xRbDI3TZjaTR0E9q1I2wo=&emci=652877c9-bf9a-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=cc5da977-99a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=13153572)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75681410/445434074/-1455566814?ms=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&refcode=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&source=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231223_survey_esrv_gq_act___SAtw_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=r/431oVp3bJ4mQasxXBMfA322iXz2tJEPwDiW0kfdhcBPUs+6oqzl3C9Cv/qjhhrr7sVT1vGDfIm0fXnQMAweNtYv1ZAaUGlaFvhjZgP+v8U4oJMr2/6hyDrvLiTNNZLSQ+rLQXTE9IICO2/9tkM1w==&refcode2=cc5da977-99a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2M1ZGE5NzctOTlhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jAJkQjzt-tLR7QejVmUCG4xRbDI3TZjaTR0E9q1I2wo=&emci=652877c9-bf9a-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=cc5da977-99a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=13153572)

Friend, You have an opportunity to help correct one of the worst injustices of the Covid era. **Thou****sands of hardworking, competent people were fired –– all because they refused to get the Covid shot.** Doctors, nurses, teachers, members of the military, and many more. It’s the natural tendency of the authoritarian left to punish people for refusing to go along with its schemes. And now that we know more of the truth about Covid, the vaccine, and the shady collusion between government organizations, Big Tech and Big Pharma......they’d love nothing more than to sweep this all under the rug and pretend it never happened. **That’s why I’ve instructed our attorneys at the Center for American Liberty to initiate legal action to hold them accountable.** For starters, we filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID vaccine._Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade._ **[**And if we can win this critical legal battle, we can put employers across the country on notice that they should reinstate victims of their COVID vaccine firings.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9nLJvf50HAZlv41pT96VJQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnaZL2P0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvMmQ0NWU4NjEtM2I2YS00NTgwLTgxYWMtM2VlNGM2ZTA3MzZlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTIyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QSDNfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplgwnlhmUzHH6zUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** When the Symphony introduced their vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions.Dovid, Chris, and Rachel each held sincere religious beliefs, filed for exemptions, and expressed a willingness to take other measures—like regular COVID testing—to ensure safety.But the Symphony rejected ALL of them and put them on a year of UNPAID LEAVE. These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish.**To you and me, the freedom to practice your religion is a sacred right.****So is your right to bodily autonomy.** But in the eyes of the cultural Marxists who control so many institutions in America today, your body doesn’t belong to you – it belongs to them.They’ll decide where you go... They’ll decide what you need... They’ll decide what you can have... They’ll decide what vaccines you must take...In other words: _Your individual liberties_ will cease to exist. The good news is that while cultural Marxism is popular on college campuses, legacy media press rooms, the boardrooms of woke companies and inside government bureaucracies......the vast majority of Americans are against it. This is a fight we can win – and we must win. **[**You can join me today by making a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty to fund this lawsuit for medical and religious freedom, and set a precedent nationwide that puts these radicals on notice.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9nLJvf50HAZlv41pT96VJQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnaZL2P0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvMmQ0NWU4NjEtM2I2YS00NTgwLTgxYWMtM2VlNGM2ZTA3MzZlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTIyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QSDNfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplgwnlhmUzHH6zUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Even after the North Carolina Symphony lifted its vaccine mandate, it refused to give these musicians their jobs back.Because it was never about “science” or “health” – it was always about control.And it’s time to tell the cultural Marxists who want to control every aspect of your life that we aren’t backing down.I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. DhillonFounder & CEO

Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment would legally end gender-based discrimination once and for all — allowing us to protect reproductive rights, enforce equal pay and so much more. And now, it has finally been ratified by the required 38 states.
But even though the vast majority of Americans support it, an arbitrary deadline is preventing us from adding this amendment to the Constitution. Kirsten's joint resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and _finally_ certify the ERA.
This is our best chance to stop the GOP's far-right attacks against women, restore reproductive freedom nationwide and defend our civil rights**. But the harsh reality is that we can't get this done if Democrats lose the Senate majority.**
Republican extremists in New York are emboldened like never before: Last year, they won enough House seats to flip the chamber RED. ** And they're already targeting Kirsten's seat to take back the Senate. **
Now, more than ever before, we need Kirsten's bold, relentless voice in the Senate to keep fighting for gender equality. [ Please, will you rush $5 before midnight tonight to help defend her seat and continue the fight for equality? Kirsten refuses to accept money from corporate PACs, so she's counting on your help to reach her critical $20,000 weekly fundraising goal to go toe-to-toe with the GOP's megadonors. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75681788/445434235/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4666-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmI3ZDEyOC05YWExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QH_fm9wIDFsJaUJW7D_jHHXU71_6JqejLsh7SeJ0GdQ=)

clean_body: did you see the news? | | | This is AMAZING news, friend: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a joint resolution to finally codify the Equal Rights Amendment into the Constitution after 100 YEARS! = But Kirsten cannot pass this resolution without a strong Democratic Senate majority — and Republicans are targeting her seat for defeat! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment would legally end gender-based discrimination once and for all — allowing us to protect reproductive rights, enforce equal pay and so much more. And now, it has finally been ratified by the required 38 states. But even though the vast majority of Americans support it, an arbitrary deadline is preventing us from adding this amendment to the Constitution. Kirsten's joint resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and finally certify the ERA. This is our best chance to stop the GOP's far-right attacks against women, restore reproductive freedom nationwide and defend our civil rights. But the harsh reality is that we can't get this done if Democrats lose the Senate majority. Republican extremists in New York are emboldened like never before: Last year, they won enough House seats to flip the chamber RED. And they're already targeting Kirsten's seat to take back the Senate. Now, more than ever before, we need Kirsten's bold, relentless voice in the Senate to keep fighting for gender equality. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 - and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682278/445435121/1433674199?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231221_na_xmas_cand_kw_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U1ZGJkOGItOWJhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eX_lPLCQbelwVFNbMJRhDw-bswwoDZ87cN1enhJIz8k=)
---
**From my family to yours, Peter, we wish you a Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays, ... and Happy New Year!!** Before you gather around the Christmas tree, yule log, Menorah or whatever your traditions are this season, with family and loved ones, I wanted to share how much I appreciate your support throughout this journey. **You’re the reason why I’m in this fight and why I’m running for Congress** — for our democracy, for our freedoms, and to put power back into the hands of Upper and Northern Michiganders. I also hope you get your holiday bake on. Every Christmas, we get out the festive cut outs, bake cookies, and wait (impatiently) for them to cool (maybe) and then we frost what is left over together. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682280/445435123/1433674199?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231221_na_xmas_cand_kw_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U1ZGJkOGItOWJhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eX_lPLCQbelwVFNbMJRhDw-bswwoDZ87cN1enhJIz8k=)
---
I hope you are also making memorable memories! And, safe travels to those hitting the road (someone's grandma once got ran over by a reindeer). 🎄🎅🤶
Tuebor,
Callie

clean_body: | = From my family to yours, Peter, we wish you a Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays, ... and Happy New Year!! Before you gather around the Christmas tree, yule log, Menorah or whatever your traditions are this season, with family and loved ones, I wanted to share how much I appreciate your support throughout this journey. You’re the reason why I’m in this fight and why I’m running for Congress — for our democracy, for our freedoms, and to put power back into the hands of Upper and Northern Michiganders. I also hope you get your holiday bake on. Every Christmas, we get out the festive cut outs, bake cookies, and wait (impatiently) for them to cool (maybe) and then we frost what is left over together. | = I hope you are also making memorable memories! And, safe travels to those hitting the road (someone's grandma once got ran over by a reindeer). 🎄🎅🤶 Tuebor, Callie | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682360/445435205/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY1ZGJkOGItOWJhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1wuJnZJlX2kt71no-lYLztK_bN0mHhyoTYsE1zykTUU=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682362/445435207/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20231223_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY1ZGJkOGItOWJhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1wuJnZJlX2kt71no-lYLztK_bN0mHhyoTYsE1zykTUU=) Folks,

Have I ever told you how I got into public service?

**I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers.** My family lived in a small trailer in rural California where my brother and I shared a bed that in the daytime converted into a kitchen table.

When I was a teenager, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me and my dreams of a college education. I made them a promise that I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician in return for their trust in me.

I not only returned to serve as an emergency physician, but eventually was elected to serve my community in Congress. For more than a decade, I’ve fought every day for my family, friends, and neighbors who dream the same dream my parents had for me.

**Those memories have come flooding back lately.** Because I’ve spent the last few weeks listening to the MAGA circus go round after round, attacking each other, blaming Democrats, and doing everything they can _EXCEPT_ serving the American people.

**And that’s part and parcel for the extreme MAGA caucus.** Instead of doing the hard work of reaching across the aisle to build consensus, they grind our government to a halt to play partisan games.

Instead of building progress and promise for the next generation of Americans, they desperately scratch and claw their way to their own power, everyone else be damned. **They’re not public servants – they only serve themselves, and I’m sick of it.**

**They need to get their house in order. They need to end the chaos. They need to do their jobs. But I’m not waiting around for them, team, I’m taking action.**

[**I’m taking a lesson from my teenage self here – together we can defeat the MAGA chaos caucus and win back control of the House. But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you here, friend. Can you pitch in $10 (or anything you can afford) toward our 1,000 donation goal today and help us take back our House Majority and end the MAGA chaos? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682364/445435209/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20231223_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY1ZGJkOGItOWJhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1wuJnZJlX2kt71no-lYLztK_bN0mHhyoTYsE1zykTUU=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682376/445435221/417269932?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RRFC_20231223_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY1ZGJkOGItOWJhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1wuJnZJlX2kt71no-lYLztK_bN0mHhyoTYsE1zykTUU=)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Yes, this is my baby photo….
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
The story of why I’m running for Congress starts with my mom.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682473/445435671/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231223_EOY1_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231223_EOY1_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=845dbd8b-9ba1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDVkYmQ4Yi05YmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMD--YR5p0dJAHKsh3HqwPB1Y_tcLg3sIlkF7GgPndI=)
---

Team, the photo of that little baby is me with my mom. The story of why I’m running starts with her. [**(If you’re ready to flip NY-17 and retake our majority, you can contribute before my campaign’s first end-of-year fundraising deadline here.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682474/445435676/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231223_EOY1_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231223_EOY1_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=845dbd8b-9ba1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDVkYmQ4Yi05YmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMD--YR5p0dJAHKsh3HqwPB1Y_tcLg3sIlkF7GgPndI=)

Growing up in the Village of Spring Valley, my mother told me that I could be anything I wanted. It was a radical idea. My mom, who struggled with mental illness, had dropped out of college and was working multiple jobs just to make ends meet—even as we relied on Section 8 housing and food stamps.

Despite our financial insecurities, my mother’s radical idea that I could be anything I wanted helped me dream big—big enough to be elected to Congress and fight for working families like my own.

Everyday people deserve members of Congress in their corner who will fight for them, their families, and their futures. Every child deserves the opportunity and encouragement to dream, just like my mom taught me. That’s exactly why I’m running.

[**Our campaign is facing our first end-of-year fundraising deadline this Sunday and I need to raise $50,000 to start the election year strong. The truth is, my story should not be the exception, but thanks to Republicans in Congress and a broken political system rigged to benefit those on top, **it is.**

Corporate lobbyists from Big Oil to Big Pharma spend billions trying to influence elected officials like Republican Mike Lawler—himself a former oil and gas lobbyist. They want to maintain the status quo and keep our government working solely for the wealthy and well-connected.

It’s created a system that’s worked handily for corporations, banks, and billionaires, but it’s forced everyday people to remain locked in a struggle just to make ends meet. With the rising costs of health care, housing, child care, education, and so much more, the situation is only getting worse.

We _can_ create a government responsive to working people, expand access to health care, lower prescription drug costs, and ensure wages are high enough to meet the costs of living and so much more.

But we need more leaders from backgrounds like my own. We need to fight for and elect more leaders for whom policy is personal.

[**Legislation that helps working people isn’t a pipe dream. With your support, we will flip NY-17, retake our House majority, and create a government that works for everyday people. Chip in $5 ahead of our campaign's first end-of-year deadline on Sunday to send me back to Congress. Let’s make our dream a reality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75682492/445435704/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231223_EOY1_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231223_EOY1_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=845dbd8b-9ba1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDVkYmQ4Yi05YmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMD--YR5p0dJAHKsh3HqwPB1Y_tcLg3sIlkF7GgPndI=)

Mondaire

clean_body: The story of why I’m running for Congress starts with my mom. | = Team, the photo of that little baby is me with my mom. The story of why I’m running starts with her. = Growing up in the Village of Spring Valley, my mother told me that I could be anything I wanted. It was a radical idea. My mom, who struggled with mental illness, had dropped out of college and was working multiple jobs just to make ends meet—even as we relied on Section 8 housing and food stamps. Despite our financial insecurities, my mother’s radical idea that I could be anything I wanted helped me dream big—big enough to be elected to Congress and fight for working families like my own. Everyday people deserve members of Congress in their corner who will fight for them, their families, and their futures. Every child deserves the opportunity and encouragement to dream, just like my mom taught me. That’s exactly why I’m running. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- The truth is, my story should not be the exception, but thanks to Republicans in Congress and a broken political system rigged to benefit those on top, it is. Corporate lobbyists from Big Oil to Big Pharma spend billions trying to influence elected officials like Republican Mike Lawler—himself a former oil and gas lobbyist. They want to maintain the status quo and keep our government working solely for the wealthy and well-connected. It’s created a system that’s worked handily for corporations, banks, and billionaires, but it’s forced everyday people to remain locked in a struggle just to make ends meet. With the rising costs of health care, housing, child care, education, and so much more, the situation is only getting worse. We can create a government responsive to working people, expand access to health care, lower prescription drug costs, and ensure wages are high enough to meet the costs of living and so much more. But we need more leaders from backgrounds like my own. We need to fight for and elect more leaders for whom policy is personal. = Sincerely, Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: The federal government is a mess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWEpnNliGN)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62609312:WEpnNliGN:m:1:2625680565:86550023E87B46347DA56247AEA8487C:r)
---

Friend, We're going in the wrong direction. Have you seen what's happening in Washington? It's absolute political failure theater and it's time to put pressure on representatives to actually work for the American people. **2024 is our chance to usher in a reckoning to these swamp creatures who have treated politics as entertainment.** In Washington, it's a cesspool, and they've let it suck them in. I know, when you're up there representing the people who put you in office, most times, the media is going to want you to fail, the bureaucracy is going to be against you, obviously, the institutional Left... It's more important than ever to support leaders who know where true north is, and don't lose sight of that. Instead, we've got leadership that's weakening by the day. I am tired of seeing Republicans lose, and our party is being shot in the foot because of the theatrics in Congress. We should have had a Red Wave in 2022. Instead, Florida delivered. We united and drew people into the party while the rest of the nation let us down and just barely won the majority in the House. Here's what I know: you've got to be focused, you've got to be disciplined, and you can't get distracted by flailing theatrics and side controversies.**It's all about the mission.** When I was in the military serving in places like Iraq, I learned quick that you check everything else at the door, and put one thing first. I promise you, I will be a very determined President, and the issues that I pursue will be the issues that matter to you. I will get the job done; hitting the ground running on Day One. No more fanfare. No more underdelivering. But what we do today matters for what we can accomplish in the future. I'm asking for your donation to my team so we can win, friend. With this link << **[https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62609312:WEpnNliGN:m:1:2625680565:86550023E87B46347DA56247AEA8487C:r "https://RonDeSantis.com/donate-today")** >>, your contribution will go directly toward turning the tide on Washington politics being entertainment, wasteful, and performative. Let's get it done, together.
---

The virtue signaling will go down right alongside the woke nonsense. We'll end it all in 2025. I'm a leader, I'm not an entertainer. My job is to turn this country around and to make sure that you, your kids, and grandkids have a shot at the American dream. And I will get that done. I hope to earn your support in this critical mission.

In Freedom,

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This is the boldest campaign Missouri has ever seen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re throwing out the rulebook and running this campaign the right way.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I wanted to take some time today to share with you why I’m so proud of the people-powered campaign we’re building here in Missouri — and why it’s already the boldest grassroots movement our state has ever seen.
**Please let me explain.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40475?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k)**
For decades, lying politicians have let massive corporations strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat.
I can’t accept a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business. And I won’t stand for another twenty years of members of Congress who’ve never worn a uniform sacrificing American lives and tax dollars on forever wars, while refusing to invest into the everyday people who make our country strong.
Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country.
They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers. And they’ll even raise their fist to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy.
**We don’t need any more frauds in Congress.** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. It’s why I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. **[And it’s why today, I’m asking you to make your first donation of $10 or whatever you think is best toward my campaign before our next major FEC fundraising deadline next week. Can I count on you?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40475?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40476?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40476?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40476?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40476?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40476?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40476?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40475?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k)
---
Our mission of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some mega-donor being upset.
More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — **I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done.**
More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — **I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us.**
More than just breaking up Big Pharma — **I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people.**
And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — **I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether.**
This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to fundamentally change who has power in our country. **And I want you to join our team:**
**[So if you’re ready to help us take back power for everyday people in Missouri and across the country, please add a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can to help us end this quarter strong and defeat Josh Hawley next November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40475?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40475?refcode=em20231223-4444&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k)**
For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231223-4444-footer&t=12&refcode2=4444_614464_OOkN9k&akid=4444%2E614464%2EOOkN9k)**

Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The American people deserve better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We depend on the Postal Service for essential needs. Accessing medicine. Receiving paychecks. Getting sensitive mail on time. DeJoy doesn’t care about the USPS's future.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4786%2E5257348%2EE07rzU)
Derek —
Thanks to Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, who is _still_ leading the U. S. Postal Service three years after Trump left office, millions of folks around the country will find their packages never make it to their intended destination this holiday season.
But more ominously, we are months away from the start of voting in the presidential cycle, and DeJoy is a clear and present danger to vote-by-mail programs around the nation.
[**Enough is enough. If you agree that it’s time for DeJoy to go, add your name today to my petition calling on President Biden to nominate the USPS Board of Governor replacements necessary to remove Louis DeJoy.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231223-dejoy-petition-em.I11sHn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231223_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4786%2E5257348%2EE07rzU)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231223-dejoy-petition-em.I11sHn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231223_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4786%2E5257348%2EE07rzU)
---
Louis DeJoy is a former RNC finance chair who has donated millions to Republican candidates.
His family owns a company that was once a direct competitor with the USPS — until under his leadership, USPS awarded his company a $120 million contract.
He was the subject of an FBI investigation into an alleged straw donor scheme to support GOP candidates.
And after removing mail ballot drop boxes and decommissioning mail sorting facilities during the 2020 election, his 10-year austerity plan is on track to close 400 mail sorting facilities across the country — right as we head into the holiday season and another presidential election.
If you are alarmed by the idea of a Trump appointee, who has enriched himself at the taxpayers’ expense and been the subject of an FBI investigation, administering a national election in which the guy who gave him the job and incited a violent insurrection when he lost is running again as the challenger, you’re not alone.
[**And if you agree that we need to do something about it, join me and sign my petition calling on President Biden to nominate the two replacements needed to the USPS Board of Governors, the only body that can remove the Postmaster General.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231223-dejoy-petition-em.I11sHn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231223_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4786%2E5257348%2EE07rzU)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20231223-dejoy-petition-em.I11sHn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231223_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4786%2E5257348%2EE07rzU)
---
Thanks,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3294?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231223_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4786%2E5257348%2EE07rzU)

name: Tammy Murphy
subject: Have a happy holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
body:
|
---
Hi, As we’re settling in for the long holiday weekend, Phil, the kids, and I want to wish you a happy holiday and joyful New Year! Serving as First Lady and now as a candidate, I’m incredibly fortunate in that I get to see the very best that New Jersey has to offer. We’re a state of incredible stories, rich personalities, and strong people, and I’ll be thinking of everyone I’ve met as I celebrate and reflect this week. I hope you have a fantastic holiday weekend and an excellent start to the New Year. I’m excited for what we’ll accomplish together in 2024. Happy holidays,
Tammy
* * *

name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: Our Motown Momentum Was Driven by You
body:
Prayers Up for Palestine and Blessings to You.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dearborn_followup&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, This week our people-powered movement took a major leap on our journey to bring truth, justice, and love to all corners of our nation. This week we had the blessed honor to spend the day in Dearborn, Michigan where we were afforded numerous opportunities to meet with community leaders, grassroots organizers, and social justice champions that embody the spirit of this campaign.
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/gaza_endures?amount=10&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dearborn_followup&n=2)
---
We met with representatives from over 30 organizations and formations representing a full gambit of the intersectional initiatives including environmental justice, gender justice, increasing visibility for our precious Asian siblings, and a fantastic collection of young folk who plan on ensuring that their voices are heard and their votes have a major impact on next year’s election. We learned so much from all of the conversations we took part in, and that was just the beginning of a day that will be seen as one that catapulted this campaign to a new level. The day culminated with the Gaza Endures event sponsored by over 40 local organizations and organized by our family at the Michigan Task Force for Palestine. Oh my siblings, it was a sight to see and bear witness to precious Muslims, Jews, and Christians of all ages coming together to declare with one voice that we must have a ceasefire and an end to the brutal Israeli war crimes, crimes against humanity and genocide that has taken far too many precious Palestinian lives including nearly 8,000 children. We demonstrated what a movement of Love Warriors can and will look like when we win this election next year.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/gaza_endures?amount=27&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dearborn_followup&n=3 "DONATE NOW >>") [DONATE NOW >>](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/gaza_endures?amount=27&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dearborn_followup&n=3)
---
I can’t think of a better way to conclude our events for the year - but we know this is just the end of the beginning. We need to hit the ground running in 2024 and show the people of our nation and the world that they don’t have to choose between a derelict duopoly that turns blind eyes to the suffering of Palestinians and so many abroad, just as they turn blind eyes to so many suffering here at home. The pundits know it, the Democratic Party knows it, and so many others can see this campaign is in it to win it - we are capturing imaginations of people who desire a polity rooted in truth, justice and love. They can feel it and with your help we will carry our momentum in 2024 so that we can all realize it collectively. Please click here and donate what you can and let’s show the world what grassroots power can do. **So, I ask you Peter, will you stand with us? Will you help fuel this movement with a**[**$5 donation**](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/gaza_endures?amount=5&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dearborn_followup&n=4)**today? Click any link below to make your contribution, and together, let's continue this beautiful journey towards a future filled with truth, justice, and love.**
---

Peter, During this holiday season, I'd encourage you to reach out to those who may feel lonely or down from the loss of a loved one. Let’s all do something to show kindness even to people we don’t know as it can make a real difference in their lives.

From my family to you and yours, wishing you a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays! -John

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left doesn’t want you to see this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
Protect Free Speech!

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=da876d7ddf6043779a8d41bbf3febf28&_e=FRaPU-IcGxsP2TpYQKX8QUER--f-ukFOxtDiU3xlH5psYUnosoaMc0xb4Bd9RERcEQUpEP7Ze2R9scroEl7fqaTdBVtOZ24b0N62T2tUE-e2ZocIstOq_AxKsfStp-X3SV9kknl5U88_QgudTOoSF1JSylY0_FR4nWQfzlWwE3yGDxG_0QLyb7mnMNjnKLXTOSDl0bkdbO1mjPKSJxQr28p4UZ6VgcOBKt2pWrxpGSQhHAPVjxt-P1XML_tFQP_fZF0nj3rrFMWKs6rOb9z9hBqlYJUL0wwGT-fPyBbV5z0MHFmbwfYzqfmv2BAfLK2mrXPZGkt5Mq_z3VSewW9vx_oxaZRn2qGNA_nUyU2SupOAY_GkIeiaTIGmaMCk8pG0GfYydjWvyhEmOS-qE80zJw%3D%3D)
---
The Left is panicking.

They went after Free Speech by trying to cancel Elon Musk and his platform, X, and I don’t think they expected us to fight back like we have.

[**I put my money where my mouth is and am willing to stand up against cancel culture and protect Free Speech, are you?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=da876d7ddf6043779a8d41bbf3febf28&_e=FRaPU-IcGxsP2TpYQKX8QUER--f-ukFOxtDiU3xlH5psYUnosoaMc0xb4Bd9RERcEQUpEP7Ze2R9scroEl7fqaTdBVtOZ24b0N62T2tUE-e2ZocIstOq_AxKsfStp-X3SV9kknl5U88_QgudTOoSF1JSylY0_FR4nWQfzlWwE3yGDxG_0QLyb7mnMNjnKLXTOSDl0bkdbO1mjPKSJxQr28p4UZ6VgcOBKt2pWrxpGSRGfYL-KvFiZMfzKhH10sV78FIndM9-5c48L6r8CxBj6lFPCZLzC57ivA10PayhalXI8_sXUXfOoF8dFqolN8jDNKTvLn91cqOjPryLpaV_cHvhoLhenP8AB7sIdNxtxK98XFM6yPcSaCx0JypnBUFTMuYUvwZ62GobSXK2C1WD-A%3D%3D)

I’ve launched an ad highlighting the unAmerican agenda the left has for America. The Left wants this ad off the air AS SOON AS POSSIBLE and is doing everything they can to ensure it comes down.

The truth is they don’t want this country to know the truth about their cancel-culture-first crusade against our fundamental American liberties. The First Amendment is NON-NEGOTIABLE.

I launched this new ad because the American people deserve to hear the truth, NOT what the media wants you to see.

X is one of America’s last bastions of free speech; my campaign will continue to advertise on the platform so we can end the tyranny of Big Tech and keep one of this country’s last open forums up and running. [**Unfortunately, my ad is running out of money, and I’m asking if you can help me.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=da876d7ddf6043779a8d41bbf3febf28&_e=FRaPU-IcGxsP2TpYQKX8QUER--f-ukFOxtDiU3xlH5psYUnosoaMc0xb4Bd9RERcEQUpEP7Ze2R9scroEl7fqaTdBVtOZ24b0N62T2tUE-e2ZocIstOq_AxKsfStp-X3SV9kknl5U88_QgudTOoSF1JSylY0_FR4nWQfzlWwE3yGDxG_0QLyb7mnMNjnKLXTOSDl0bkdbO1mjPKSJxQr28p4UZ6VgcOBKt2pWrxpGSRpDzskC6o6pkpKwt5kq_B0qGu_WU4eeTjdM4O7k_-Yr6vjHNqB7k-J4UndeF2paut09LcLFRxh17bGbKGJwGcOaWTvIrEcyw1j-JquWQjZx9uq9LRgOahmMgvbeXHr4lhpOEsxrbeJIZy7HhnagpRXdLinqJE6Kuf_TYo3Yk-4CA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Protect Free Speech! | The Left is panicking. They went after Free Speech by trying to cancel Elon Musk and his platform, X, and I don’t think they expected us to fight back like we have. I’ve launched an ad highlighting the unAmerican agenda the left has for America. The Left wants this ad off the air AS SOON AS POSSIBLE and is doing everything they can to ensure it comes down. The truth is they don’t want this country to know the truth about their cancel-culture-first crusade against our fundamental American liberties. The First Amendment is NON-NEGOTIABLE. I launched this new ad because the American people deserve to hear the truth, NOT what the media wants you to see. X is one of America’s last bastions of free speech; my campaign will continue to advertise on the platform so we can end the tyranny of Big Tech and keep one of this country’s last open forums up and running. | My ad will run out of funding SOON, and if you could rush ANYTHING by midnight, we can keep it up so the American people KNOW CONSERVATIVES STAND WITH FREE SPEECH. clean_body: This request won’t cost you a cent. | Folks, there’s nothing more important to Gloria than connecting with supporters like you. That’s why we’re in your inbox (and your texts!) so often — and it’s why we have an extra special request today. Endorsing Gloria is one way you can have an impact on this race without spending a cent. Defeating Marsha Blackburn starts and ends with YOU, the people of Tennessee. So, are you ready? | Thank you! Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: BC4S
subject: RE: Gavin Newsom on Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter —
Did you see what Gavin Newsom said about our must-win race?
**With an open seat in West Virginia, the fate of our Democratic Senate majority could all come down to what happens here in PA.**
Mitch McConnell and his dark money super PACs are gearing up to spend record-breaking amounts of money to unseat Bob Casey and flip the Senate red.
**[We can stop Mitch McConnell and David McCormick from buying this seat, but it’s going to take all of us working together. So please, if you can, rush $5 to Bob’s re-election campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?refcode=em20231223-1&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?refcode=em20231223-1&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl)**
— Team Casey
_\---------- Forwarded message ----------
__From: Gavin Newsom
_ _Subject: Pennsylvania_
Peter:
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution directly to Bob Casey’s re-election campaign in Pennsylvania.
If you’re ready to do your part to protect this critical Senate seat and our Democratic Senate majority, you can use this link to contribute now:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20231223-1&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl)
Otherwise, please let me explain why this request is so important.
With an open seat in West Virginia likely to go red, Democrats have absolutely zero margin for error if we’re going to hold the Senate. This means we can’t take a single seat for granted. But right now, I’m worried people aren’t taking Pennsylvania’s race seriously enough.
Here’s why you should be: The Commonwealth has a long history of deciding Presidential elections and Senate control. It happened in 2016, in 2020, and again in 2022. I have no doubt that PA will once again be the linchpin that decides the Senate and the White House in 2024.
On top of that, Bob Casey is facing the toughest re-election race of his career. Mitch McConnell named Pennsylvania one of his top four targets, and with West Virginia out of the picture, he will focus his full attention and resources on replacing Bob.
[**That’s why I’m asking if you can make a $5 contribution to Bob Casey’s re-election campaign today. Control of the Senate is at stake, so every donation makes a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20231223-1&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20231223-1-el&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20231223-1-el&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20231223-1-el&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20231223-1-el&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20231223-1-el&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20231223-1&refcode2=1478_552475_pLkXOl&akid=1478%2E552475%2EpLkXOl)
---
The biggest mistake we can make right now is to sit on the sidelines and risk losing this seat to Mitch McConnell and his hand-picked candidate.
Thank you in advance for chipping in.
Gavin Newsom
Governor of California

name: James Carville
subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania... >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12964%2E9716520%2EqHXpcY)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12964%2E9716520%2EqHXpcY)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewDecember/](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12964%2E9716520%2EqHXpcY)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12964%2E9716520%2EqHXpcY)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231223-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=12964%2E9716520%2EqHXpcY)

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: This is a defining moment for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
and I’ll be counting on your support more than ever before.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75694169/445471551/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTYxZTIyMC1hOGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef8IEZjpsqCd8qQHPb_znZ6if5_tFFuaB-31EUlGHN4=) Dear Peter,

I wanted to take a moment before the holidays to explain why the next week will be a defining moment for our campaign, and why **[I’ll be counting on your support more than ever before.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75694171/445471552/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTYxZTIyMC1hOGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef8IEZjpsqCd8qQHPb_znZ6if5_tFFuaB-31EUlGHN4=)**

**December 31st marks the final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2023.** As you may remember, at the end of the quarter our campaign has to publicly report all of our internal fundraising data to the Federal Election Commission (FEC).

**And we know that when our FEC report is made publicly available, all eyes will be on us.** Washington Republicans have put a target on Northeast Ohio, and political pundits are already counting out our grassroots team. They will use this report to gauge whether we have what it takes to bring home another historic victory next November.

**It’s time to come together to prove that our grassroots team – composed of hard-working folks who chip in what they can, when they can because they know Ohio is worth fighting for – is more powerful than any amount of Republican dark-money.**

**[I hope you can support my reelection campaign ahead of this critical goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75694172/445471553/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTYxZTIyMC1hOGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef8IEZjpsqCd8qQHPb_znZ6if5_tFFuaB-31EUlGHN4=)**

I am eternally grateful to have you in this fight with me. Thank you,

_Emilia_

PS. I know the holidays can be a hectic time, and many of us use this time of the year to unplug and reconnect with family and friends. **[If you would like to spare your inbox from our end-of-quarter fundraising emails, please consider chipping in via this email today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75694173/445471554/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_es_all-syi-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTYxZTIyMC1hOGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef8IEZjpsqCd8qQHPb_znZ6if5_tFFuaB-31EUlGHN4=)** Thank you for your support! | [**SPARE YOUR INBOX**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75694174/445471555/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_es_all-syi-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTYxZTIyMC1hOGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef8IEZjpsqCd8qQHPb_znZ6if5_tFFuaB-31EUlGHN4=)
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75694175/445471556/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTYxZTIyMC1hOGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef8IEZjpsqCd8qQHPb_znZ6if5_tFFuaB-31EUlGHN4=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75694176/445471557/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTYxZTIyMC1hOGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ef8IEZjpsqCd8qQHPb_znZ6if5_tFFuaB-31EUlGHN4=)

Hi there, it’s Tom Suozzi. I’m the Democratic nominee for the special election on February 13 to replace George Santos. Fight for Progress sends you Season's Greetings, and so do I. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!

I love the holidays, and I hope that you and your family enjoy this special season. I will spend time with my family as well, but unfortunately, I can’t take as much time off as usual.

**That’s because, in just a few weeks, there will be a must-win, toss-up special election in NY-03 to replace George Santos.**

This election matters so much for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. People are looking for leadership that can deliver for families, solve problems, and rise above the endless fighting that has consumed Washington in recent years. _And February 13 will be a critical day in getting America back on track!_

**So, while we’d all rather take more time to log off, hang out with our kids, and enjoy the holiday season, I had to write you this note because we can’t waste a single day between now and February 13.**

[_**I really need your help today. Can you rush a split donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress before the end of the year so we can start off 2024 strong and win on February 13?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75696164/445475931/-349024568?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-12-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxMjI1Nzg4LWE5YTEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wT35nl0kjncD8FNhL3Hz9B-Fka_rbDudQUaRoIiZZ6c=)

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Zn4vTkhqCKB8RBqyrhJgdQ~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Zn4vTkhqCKB8RBqyrhJgdQ~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Zn4vTkhqCKB8RBqyrhJgdQ~~/AARclAA~)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KJ_aQ-TWqgv0aqisUzUWBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnaa8WP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWDJAGHZbhCwBhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4P3Ffu4qEHaH9i5q91O_1A~~/AARclAA~/RgRnaa8WP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplgyQBh2W4QsAYUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: A personal story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
A picture is worth a thousand words. But I had a bit more I wanted to say about this particular one. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75696753/445477727/-1209416704?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231223_fr_storyresend_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTkwMGVkOC1hYWExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsoCYEQc_ZnM2Ppy4YowieRkipUwtM7cdOsWKMPPLGY=)
---
Co-pilots, I was the ONLY woman in my Apache Longbow helicopter class. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75696754/445477728/-1209416704?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231223_fr_storyresend_cand_mf_30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTkwMGVkOC1hYWExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsoCYEQc_ZnM2Ppy4YowieRkipUwtM7cdOsWKMPPLGY=)
---
As you can tell from that photo, to say it's a man's world is an understatement. Apaches are basically airborne tanks, and the program to fly them is the Army's equivalent of Top Gun. **But if there's one word I could use to describe what the Army taught me to be, it's TOUGH.**
Joining the Army at just 17? Tough.
Keeping up my grades at West Point? Tough.
Flying an airborne tank in combat? Tough.
Training with 21 guys who sure as hell weren't going to cut the only girl a break? Tough.
**I joined the Army as a way to pay for college. I stayed, becoming a pilot and commander, because I knew I had the strength to lead and protect when lives were on the line.**
Compare that with my opponent, Brian Fitzpatrick, who was born with a silver spoon in his mouth and rode his brother's coattails into office. Since joining Congress, Fitzpatrick has let MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz and Mike Johnson walk ALL over him.
I got into this race because I've seen how Fitzpatrick's weak leadership is hurting working families, LGBTQ+ folks, women – really any of us who aren't his rich donors. I wouldn't put up with that from anyone under my command in the Army, let alone someone holding one of the most powerful offices in our country.
So I'm running to defeat Brian Fitzpatrick and be the protector PA-01 folks need and deserve.
[I know I've got the strength to do this job. But getting there isn't easy... or cheap. That's why I'm asking you to please pitch in $10 or whatever you can right now to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75696755/445477729/-1209416704?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20231223_fr_storyresend_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTkwMGVkOC1hYWExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsoCYEQc_ZnM2Ppy4YowieRkipUwtM7cdOsWKMPPLGY=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks for being in this fight with me as my co-pilots,
Ashley

| Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

clean_body: A picture is worth a thousand words. But I had a bit more I wanted to say about this particular one. | = Co-pilots, I was the ONLY woman in my Apache Longbow helicopter class. | = As you can tell from that photo, to say it's a man's world is an understatement. Apaches are basically airborne tanks, and the program to fly them is the Army's equivalent of Top Gun. But if there's one word I could use to describe what the Army taught me to be, it's TOUGH. Joining the Army at just 17? Tough. Keeping up my grades at West Point? Tough. Flying an airborne tank in combat? Tough. Training with 21 guys who sure as hell weren't going to cut the only girl a break? Tough. I joined the Army as a way to pay for college. I stayed, becoming a pilot and commander, because I knew I had the strength to lead and protect when lives were on the line. Compare that with my opponent, Brian Fitzpatrick, who was born with a silver spoon in his mouth and rode his brother's coattails into office. Since joining Congress, Fitzpatrick has let MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz and Mike Johnson walk ALL over him. I got into this race because I've seen how Fitzpatrick's weak leadership is hurting working families, LGBTQ+ folks, women – really any of us who aren't his rich donors. I wouldn't put up with that from anyone under my command in the Army, let alone someone holding one of the most powerful offices in our country. So I'm running to defeat Brian Fitzpatrick and be the protector PA-01 folks need and deserve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for being in this fight with me as my co-pilots, Ashley | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. _—Begin forwarded message from Quentin James—_
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZY4kz5O8wXB9hohHj-tRc90tqREUsKxPeCMY5Y_Ynqw1EFJrB6WEzE1Sl4PW3CT5-lL8B5rO-YytmDpugSjjNmXf_RAD_8oSFbLSi9bgWzO2rWPtXsANrrC-MtnDqtiMLaAIUKecvxFePCvTpa5uh1lvAQYRk_-D_dgbik3-ugM1CEpJ-O3uGpQM2vTmvTClH08pugwT3md1NV89h5uagkfvyy3PcSEVX2RbtqOgEDWZpNjTOPBWonbbFCxNQvCGsaIT2SisppT2eE-dwNvzUzMd7LmRUs8Ng97POrolsh1OhO5NKOcGe9z3GClBnyAcwXjSiAFQVmLx9kZ_vn4gMsxu5pZHh-7qHu3oNWS83edw/42d/clNkU_kFT5qA74vRQIhzsg/h9/C4c0dL3qKnQbpENzs96v6wAgqRRPZw3Rs8fDiXYnBaQ)
Peter,

I wanted to reach out to talk about 2024. This next election cycle is a **_critical_** test of our collective strength. Winning in 2024 means electing a Black woman to the US Senate, beating far-right extremists like _Ted Cruz_ and _Ron DeSantis_ , and uplifting Black Democrats up and down the ballot.

**Losing in 2024 to a fascist like Donald Trump would spell disaster — and quite literally an end to democracy as we know it.**

That’s why I’m reaching out now to talk about our end-of-year push. We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise **$50,000** by December 31 at midnight — and it’s going to take all of our grassroots supporters stepping up and chipping in to get there. [Can I count on you to make a contribution of $10? We’re already falling behind on our goal and we can’t afford to come up short with so much at stake >>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZY4kz5O8wXB9hohHj-tRc90tqREUsKxPeCMY5Y_Ynqw1EFJrB6WEzE1Sl4PW3CT5-lL8B5rO-YytmDpugSjjNmXf_RAD_8oSFbLSi9bgWzO0mE1HYL0MSMCLvr7lh0YzjZ9Rqt3uyXxHkjI5I9WHMHgXmb5Ci_8RrrvCyKva4W94FvQBSCQF2RfH49zAGfJ0QnDZW4iz73BuCmsyLj9Pyp2ebojo3oMz8kKD8ea385Vk9oTuS1DB8VTXKNoXEIRmP0BO6Zt1hWEiJom7ag2AfX9kX5l09fRX8w3kO8baSiPFheOlRTJe4elaNfd14kuB5jdN9csRL0zKtpAu9oFS2wBOY3A3bwKE6q5wKVHOnN4M/42d/clNkU_kFT5qA74vRQIhzsg/h10/YI8PUxnmwFmHJ90eAvcYgPou3Pvq80I5qI1Sxyg7m20)
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZY4kz5O8wXB9hohHj-tRc90tqREUsKxPeCMY5Y_Ynqw1EFJrB6WEzE1Sl4PW3CT5-lL8B5rO-YytmDpugSjjNmXf_RAD_8oSFbLSi9bgWzO22URFr2w2z-vEQXdSE-zx4pcTDz9Dl_K1wRTUPLifQUh7abE0qJp4dYh3jaHAbYTZ7sTBm5lkhiRChGb5UdO5Gzr0sxbcJmJwKxawP2pd8BMykO8Fxq3e2u9j2pIFNEf2gfC_OiphmaynheGYiou9AT436zE0Kl9NoZ6hTjVFOz7gGsvFHuK_p_RqKbSVod7QFBNLJVoxds4IZR3hDZ05jWs_lxAH9jPNQm81m6ZyPwRSJByxzqdbfAQ13ADV1aA4/42d/clNkU_kFT5qA74vRQIhzsg/h11/oWkiELDf1B7ir_LoQQAgxWSs3jxHSLw75m3_U6xX-WQ)
When you invest in The Collective PAC, your dollars go straight to work uplifting the next generation of Black Democratic elected officials and voters. Some of the money we raise goes towards registering voters, providing free rideshares to and from polling locations, and contacting voters. The rest goes **__**straight to our Democratic candidates.

If we fall short of this goal, we can’t register as many voters, and our candidates lose out on the resources they need to compete. In an election as competitive as 2024, and with the stakes this high, hitting **_our $50,000 goal could be the difference between winning the majority and losing to a fascist like Donald Trump._**

We have a choice to make: Do we **fight as hard as humanly possible** to elect champions like **Barbara Lee, Colin Allred, Angela Alsobrooks** , and **Lisa Blunt Rochester?** Or do we roll over to extremist Republicans who have called us **_vermin_** and are gutting voting rights across the country?

[I’m in this fight to win it, Peter. That’s why I’m asking: Will you make a contribution of $10 or more to crush our 2023 goal and unleash the full power of our grassroots army in 2024?
