This next election cycle is a critical test of our collective strength. Winning in 2024 means electing a Black woman to the US Senate, beating far-right extremists like Ted Cruz and Ron DeSantis , and uplifting Black Democrats up and down the ballot. Losing in 2024 to a fascist like Donald Trump would spell disaster — and quite literally an end to democracy as we know it. That’s why I’m reaching out now to talk about our end-of-year push. We’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 by December 31 at midnight — and it’s going to take all of our grassroots supporters stepping up and chipping in to get there. When you invest in The Collective PAC, your dollars go straight to work uplifting the next generation of Black Democratic elected officials and voters. Some of the money we raise goes towards registering voters, providing free rideshares to and from polling locations, and contacting voters. The rest goes straight to our Democratic candidates. If we fall short of this goal, we can’t register as many voters, and our candidates lose out on the resources they need to compete. In an election as competitive as 2024, and with the stakes this high, hitting our $50,000 goal could be the difference between winning the majority and losing to a fascist like Donald Trump. We have a choice to make: Do we fight as hard as humanly possible to elect champions like Barbara Lee, Colin Allred, Angela Alsobrooks , and Lisa Blunt Rochester? name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Why is our opponent buying attack ads in Florida?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend, we're focused on the people of Northern Ohio. Not West Palm Beach, FL.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75697093/445478987/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231223_mk_florida&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWJkMjI5ZC1hYmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y_kB3vxizE4gtArAgS65rtWsaaH5fFYD_OtgBXZHjlU=)
---
Team, Recently, the news broke that one of our Republican opponents is **buying 40 TV ads in West Palm Beach, Florida**. After being recorded criticizing Trump, he's doing everything he can to curry favor. **Friend, this is just embarrassing. Pandering to one man in Florida does nothing to help working people in Northern Ohio.** While our opponents are busy fighting over an endorsement from Florida, we're going to work every day for the Heartland. We're renewing and rebuilding our aging infrastructure, bringing down costs for life-saving prescription drugs, investing in good-paying jobs in the industries of the future, and building an economy that actually works for workers. As long as I'm in Congress, our communities will _**always**_ be my priority. Not the political games. Friend, right now, I need your support to defend our district and continue this work. We're one of the national GOP's top targets, and we have just 8 days left before our critical fundraising goal. [**If you can chip in even just $5, it would make a major difference for our grassroots campaign — and it would mean the world to all of us here on the team. clean_body: Friend, we're focused on the people of Northern Ohio. Not West Palm Beach, FL. | | = Team, Recently, the news broke that one of our Republican opponents is buying 40 TV ads in West Palm Beach, Florida. After being recorded criticizing Trump, he's doing everything he can to curry favor. Friend, this is just embarrassing. Pandering to one man in Florida does nothing to help working people in Northern Ohio. While our opponents are busy fighting over an endorsement from Florida, we're going to work every day for the Heartland. We're renewing and rebuilding our aging infrastructure, bringing down costs for life-saving prescription drugs, investing in good-paying jobs in the industries of the future, and building an economy that actually works for workers. As long as I'm in Congress, our communities will always be my priority. Not the political games. Friend, right now, I need your support to defend our district and continue this work. We're one of the national GOP's top targets, and we have just 8 days left before our critical fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = I'm so grateful to have you with me. — Marcy | Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Who is more likely to get coal this year? | Fellow Patriot, I am curious. Who do you think is MOST likely to receive coal in their stocking this Christmas? It’s a tough call. I think it’s going to be a tie. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Our critical end-of-the-year deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Without your support, I won’t be able to reach my ambitious end-of-year goal, so I hope you’ll stick with me in the final push.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75697513/445480329/-1341413768?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2I3MWI1My1hY2ExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=baVFLysVv3VieasAo-C4dMZ_HMB2Ajrj5qETYr3Gv78=) Hey there, Greg here.

You’re going to hear a lot from my team later this week, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why. **Next Sunday at midnight, we’re facing the biggest deadline of our re-election campaign to date – _the biggest deadline of the year_ – and I’m going to need your support to reach our goal in time.**

Here’s what happens: We are __required by law__ to publish our fundraising data, dating back all the way to October 1st.

And since OH-01 is one of the most competitive seats in the country, we know that the report we put forth will be read by my far-right opponent and the Washington Republicans backing him.

This is our last chance to show that we put in the work in 2023 and have built a campaign that will win in 2024, so it’s especially important that we report a big number after December 31st.

**That’s why I’m reaching out now. In the coming days, I’m going to be relying on our grassroots team more than ever before, and I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me about how important you are to this team.**

**Without your support, I won’t be able to reach my ambitious end-of-year goal,[ so I hope you’ll stick with me in the final push.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75697517/445480342/-1341413768?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.12.23_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2I3MWI1My1hY2ExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=baVFLysVv3VieasAo-C4dMZ_HMB2Ajrj5qETYr3Gv78=)**

Successfully defending this seat won’t be easy, but OH-01 is worth fighting for. And with this team on our side, I know we’re up to the challenge.

Appreciate you,

_Greg_

clean_body: Without your support, I won’t be able to reach my ambitious end-of-year goal, so I hope you’ll stick with me in the final push. = Hey there, Greg here. You’re going to hear a lot from my team later this week, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why. Next Sunday at midnight, we’re facing the biggest deadline of our re-election campaign to date – the biggest deadline of the year – and I’m going to need your support to reach our goal in time. Here’s what happens: We are required by law to publish our fundraising data, dating back all the way to October 1st. And since OH-01 is one of the most competitive seats in the country, we know that the report we put forth will be read by my far-right opponent and the Washington Republicans backing him. This is our last chance to show that we put in the work in 2023 and have built a campaign that will win in 2024, so it’s especially important that we report a big number after December 31st. That’s why I’m reaching out now. In the coming days, I’m going to be relying on our grassroots team more than ever before, and I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me about how important you are to this team. Without your support, I won’t be able to reach my ambitious end-of-year goal,= Successfully defending this seat won’t be easy, but OH-01 is worth fighting for. And with this team on our side, I know we’re up to the challenge. Appreciate you, Greg PS. My team is going to be reaching out to our top supporters a lot this week, but we know that the holidays can be hectic. = If you make a donation today, my team will make sure you don’t receive any other emails until January. Peter, when Roe v. Wade was overturned, the entire landscape of reproductive health changed drastically.
**Since June 2022, _14 states_ have enacted near-total abortion bans, and two states have imposed six-week limits**. Even though the American people have overwhelmingly voted to protect this fundamental right each time it has been on the ballot, reproductive freedom remains at stake across the nation in 2024 because of a few GOP extremists.
**And just last week, the ultra-conservative Supreme Court that dismantled __ Roe v. Wade announced that they will hear a challenge to the widely used abortion pill mifepristone. **
GOP extremists have made it abundantly clear that the fight to overturn Roe v. Wade was _never_ about a state's rights – it was always about _control._ Now, they are terrifyingly close to getting their way.
Peter, let me make myself clear: I vow to _never_ relent in my fight for reproductive freedom. I vow to do everything in my power to ensure that New York _remains_ a safe haven for all those seeking abortions. And I vow to use my position as New York’s attorney general to support and defend people struggling with abortion restrictions in other states.

**But we’re stronger together. That’s why I’m counting on _you_****to take my pledge to defend reproductive rights with me in the new year.**

**[So will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my pledge before midnight tonight to protect reproductive rights? We must act NOW, before more people lose their rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75698808/445483965/-457037143?code=jtk1287-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-reproductive-rights%3Fcode%3Djtk1287-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjIxZTQwMS1hZGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fv-Mg4eUg_hWt_0vdO4-QDqp660-y2oIPtsFyObgu4I=&emci=bd00f3b1-7c9f-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=4621e401-ada1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=25369504)**

clean_body: When Roe v. Wade was overturned, the entire landscape of reproductive health changed drastically. | | | = | | NEWS ALERT: Supreme Court will hear challenge to abortion pill access. Peter, it's time to stand our ground for our reproductive rights. | | Peter, when Roe v. Wade was overturned, the entire landscape of reproductive health changed drastically. Since June 2022, 14 states have enacted near-total abortion bans, and two states have imposed six-week limits. Even though the American people have overwhelmingly voted to protect this fundamental right each time it has been on the ballot, reproductive freedom remains at stake across the nation in 2024 because of a few GOP extremists. And just last week, the ultra-conservative Supreme Court that dismantled Roe v. Wade announced that they will hear a challenge to the widely used abortion pill mifepristone. GOP extremists have made it abundantly clear that the fight to overturn Roe v. Wade was never about a state's rights – it was always about control. Now, they are terrifyingly close to getting their way. Peter, let me make myself clear: I vow to never relent in my fight for reproductive freedom. I vow to do everything in my power to ensure that New York remains a safe haven for all those seeking abortions. And I vow to use my position as New York’s attorney general to support and defend people struggling with abortion restrictions in other states. But we’re stronger together. That’s why I’m counting on youto take my pledge to defend reproductive rights with me in the new year. | | Thank you for standing with me during this vital moment in our nation’s history. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

**In the spirit of giving, a unique appeal, A chance to contribute, to make a real deal. Riley Moore's campaign, a beacon so bright, Bringing change and hope, like a star in the night.**

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Wishing yinz and youse happy holidays ❤️🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
From our family to yinz and youse, wishing you all very, very happy holidays! ❤️🎄
**We’re feeling so incredibly grateful for each and every person who’s shown us support this year that we really can’t even put it into words.** 2023 has been a wild ride of ups and downs and through it all, having the support of not only our family and friends, but all of you, has made all the difference.
The incredible amount of support never stops being surprising and we don’t take it for granted for a minute -- and we really do want to take a second to express our huge care + appreciation for all of you.
You each mean so so SO much to us, and you’re the reason we get up and fight for a better future each and every day.
So thank you, and HAPPY HOLIDAYS, from the very bottom of our hearts!! ❤️
Lots of love,
John + Gisele (+ Karl + Grace + August + Levi + Artie)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231223-8721-footer&t=1&refcode2=8721_434096_07OHqr&akid=8721%2E434096%2E07OHqr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Thank you in advance
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I hope when you think of the organizations you want to support this holiday season, you think of GIFFORDS and our work to save lives from gun violence.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231223-1-30&refcode2=7086.3935704.9GGLdI&t=1&akid=7086%2E3935704%2E9GGLdI)
---
Hi friends, it’s Gabby.
The team and I will be taking a break to spend time with loved ones over the next few days, and I hope you take some well-deserved time to rest too.
However, even a short break means our fundraising will slow down drastically over this holiday weekend. With our end of year FEC fundraising deadline approaching rapidly, we need to do everything we can to set ourselves up for success to reach our goals for the year ahead.
[**So I’m asking you respectfully: Before we head offline for the holidays, will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231223-1-30&t=2&akid=7086%2E3935704%2E9GGLdI)

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec23.sy2DIk&refcode=em231223-1-30&t=24&akid=7086%2E3935704%2E9GGLdI)**
---

---
****
I know that at this time of year, you’re receiving asks from many different organizations and campaigns. But I hope when you think of the organizations you want to support this holiday season, you think of GIFFORDS and our work to save lives from gun violence.
We couldn’t do any of our work to make our communities safer without you.
[**So please, if you can, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231223-1-30&t=27&akid=7086%2E3935704%2E9GGLdI)
Thank you in advance for chipping in. Your support—especially today—is instrumental in our ability to reach our 2023 goals.
Happy holidays!
All my best,
Gabby Giffords

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: Not all TV markets are the same
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The LA media market is the country’s second most expensive
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35256%2E3422442%2Emn6DTn)
Derek, we’ve sent a few emails this week telling you we’ve had to delay our TV ads due to a slow down in fundraising.
**Here’s some added context: Running TV ads in California is incredibly expensive.** The LA media market is the second most expensive in the country, and the San Francisco-Oakland-San Jose market is #8. Not to mention those two markets only cover a fraction of our state’s voters—from Eureka to San Diego, we have millions of voters to reach.
**[Can you help us ramp up our advertisements across the state?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231223-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_TVA_20231223_V2_F&refcode2=35256_3422442_mn6DTn&akid=35256%2E3422442%2Emn6DTn)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231223-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_TVA_20231223_V2_F&refcode2=35256_3422442_mn6DTn&akid=35256%2E3422442%2Emn6DTn)
TV ads won’t be the only way we’ll reach people. From organizing, to events, to texts and digital ads, we’ll be reaching voters of all backgrounds in a variety of ways.
But the reality is we’re running against the best-funded opponent anyone could have. **As of the latest public filing, our opponent had more money than any Democrat in the country—including President Biden’s campaign!**
We know we can win this even if we raise a bit less, and Katie is committed to doing this the right way: without a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil, Big Pharma or Big Bank CEOs.
**[So if you have a few bucks to spare, we’d truly be so appreciative.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231223-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_TVA_20231223_V2_F&refcode2=35256_3422442_mn6DTn&akid=35256%2E3422442%2Emn6DTn)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231223-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_TVA_20231223_V2_F&refcode2=35256_3422442_mn6DTn&akid=35256%2E3422442%2Emn6DTn)
Onward!
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_TVA_20231223_V2_F&t=5&refcode2=35256_3422442_mn6DTn&akid=35256%2E3422442%2Emn6DTn)**
---

* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=35256%2E3422442%2Emn6DTn)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Merry MAGA Christmas
subject: We have a Christmas surprise for President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Don’t tell him
[](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1b620cbf617744dab6472764a1107208&_e=78ukdmrDJ6YczPvVGbe7DtgGIccuKU5b8bLztx2jBACP836bd7WlL1ijFH8USVZ6A2UQvwNQMCBiLmLHEIwgQsIwg_DwjuVdaa0PLjTxSCbUUHSuwK58Zg_hHF3gfR86eN4eVZlr6FyYSJvSm2gceLVzeRMWRx7_-flix9wV_EIjBbkTX2x4usnXLGWt1AoXcwPSV_OzUqrA5-qV4Qp80Km5L4SayHnhihfycXDCc-QNGym8UVp1fYtTcI5D9JddkGD8rc25l11kPetTrH6cZOSBvAx6tp-P4BtzID1-8hqiKVbHQkSfZ0LHSPDdO8W1q1k8D_JC48mQP2wi7b5TOV9jLErLUbv9rBIP7MagWDCI_64ArfmGqsQXpIne8gL2PUTPnRH7U5jbhJV6L0D-AgZ_xLKRcU9z7yyL64BNG65C8wDFU6o3EKuYlrNhhP-yTynIvzyisPjvOyfxuEmKGhCUsgIcBHy2cfZLeQeVNsA%3D)

Fellow American,

It's the most wonderful time of the year.

Our team has been brainstorming ways to **[wish President Donald J. Trump a Merry Christmas,](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1b620cbf617744dab6472764a1107208&_e=78ukdmrDJ6YczPvVGbe7DtgGIccuKU5b8bLztx2jBACP836bd7WlL1ijFH8USVZ6A2UQvwNQMCBiLmLHEIwgQsIwg_DwjuVdaa0PLjTxSCbUUHSuwK58Zg_hHF3gfR86eN4eVZlr6FyYSJvSm2gceLVzeRMWRx7_-flix9wV_EIjBbkTX2x4usnXLGWt1AoXcwPSV_OzUqrA5-qV4Qp80Km5L4SayHnhihfycXDCc-QNGym8UVp1fYtTcI5D9JddkGD8rc25l11kPetTrH6cZOSBvAx6tp-P4BtzID1-8hqiKVbHQkSfZ0LHSPDdO8W1q1k8D_JC48mQP2wi7b5TOWLMr920wdAU06X7hkXifVw-YQ0AA_7Mugo3-Mn1v-2Uq0i0aRerObl7ym5Yp-pv2SHIGwMtLJh4o4epack_UK3mb3VWXBCwj4DXrbTsahxwnHcHEyNI3pkiWg8A_b3G4hxcp6Zn_WhBaI28CmLKdAs%3D)** and we thought: _what better way to surprise him on Christmas morning than with a letter signed by MILLIONS of MAGA patriots?_

**[Add your name to the letter NOW to wish President Trump a Merry Christmas and let him know you are standing with him 100%.>>](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1b620cbf617744dab6472764a1107208&_e=78ukdmrDJ6YczPvVGbe7DtgGIccuKU5b8bLztx2jBACP836bd7WlL1ijFH8USVZ6A2UQvwNQMCBiLmLHEIwgQsIwg_DwjuVdaa0PLjTxSCbUUHSuwK58Zg_hHF3gfR86eN4eVZlr6FyYSJvSm2gceLVzeRMWRx7_-flix9wV_EIjBbkTX2x4usnXLGWt1AoXcwPSV_OzUqrA5-qV4Qp80Km5L4SayHnhihfycXDCc-QNGym8UVp1fYtTcI5D9JddkGD8rc25l11kPetTrH6cZOSBvAx6tp-P4BtzID1-8hqiKVbHQkSfZ0LHSPDdO8W1q1k8D_JC48mQP2wi7b5TOau2ECxfhHmFC7a3enc2tjjlHs00hw-1cH1U8_LWBwRULs8LbMWLK1jA-sqEFF8CsdTCYTDDQIHripJYojoMBjtAbN21hQDS7Z82YPym9_3fcvGO26zr5U-RoHlqR01PKIJdatZnuF76FS6wIo88ppE%3D)**

**Dear President Trump,

MERRY CHRISTMAS!

We, the American people, want to wish you and your family a happy holiday season.

Millions of American patriots are standing by your side against the far-Left's witch hunts during these dark times. We're with you 100%.

Despite the corrupt Democrats' best efforts, the America First movement is UNSTOPPABLE. Under your leadership, we're going to take our country back from the radical Marxists and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.

NEVER SURRENDER!

Sincerely,

The Silent Majority**

name: Jon Tester
subject: political games and backroom deals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
I won’t lie to you, team:
I’m stressed out . My finance team just called me to let me know we’re still about $50,000 short of our end-of-year fundraising goal.
Before I explain any more, I wanted to ask: Could you split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help us close the gap before our December end-of-year fundraising goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Look, Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals.
We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.
Folks, I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.
Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs that think they should be in charge. Instead, I listen to and depend on grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I’m grateful you even opened this email. My team assures me that emails like this one make up a big part of our budget—and chipping in five or ten bucks goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
So, here’s the part where I ask: Can you make a contribution of $17.77 (our average online donation) today to help us meet our fundraising goal? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us respond to the onslaught of out-of-state money coming in to attack my record. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
These deadlines are always stressful, but we’re close to the finish line, and your support right now really helps me out.
—Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=NtrVevpIp%2Bu4%2FENgv89Ce6Ewd0WAMDjWHnTKucLGa2Xk7u0aDvJX55zdaPWqi7Wj9Gkuz8HIkEIjAz4NXqOLMJutNL09DB3YCyUDDFA5RvKs6IkEm2uVJWRT3kgJXuHVeyANikL2hFPcWQ9Nj9f007cJIy6%2BEv7hr5TyWEbdst%2FLt%2FYzDvfAp3Yu4Qr7ziDUg2lYSA5OT337qrnKauL3lHOII8s9SwTFwLAeEdUiMlHpgQ7we4VMxIdO4AzS6Q54VEoju%2BJipCHr6DfnMxrMhyDvWCTaKelsXjVfMpO4jm8KPIVQkfuOfgb4YztUJMSJQ3twXlf0vF7PTKYl9kH1vQf3jeEbKq9qQd5CKUANg%2BKs7d6sh90jKaAhZ9MMzNACRYYZuIxp9LtWBSKuQypy36JSSRtSVnkHDUckQUUMBBw%3D .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawnna=20Bolick?=
subject: Investments in education
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

During the first week of December, I spent the bulk of my time in Washington, DC learning more about different education policy topics, including early childhood education, school funding, curriculum, standards and assessments, accountability and improvement, workforce development, and school choice to name just a few topics as a Hunt-Kean Fellow. I was in DC because earlier this fall, Senate leadership selected me to participate in [cohort 10](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2ba51e3154&e=a7ab36849c) representing Arizona as an education policy expert and as a proven leader who will continue to pave the way for good education policy reforms.

The cohort that I am part of include the likes of Republican Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears in Virginia and the North Dakota Attorney General Drew Wrigley. I especially enjoyed meeting many of my fellow Republican legislators from Arkansas, Missouri, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, South Carolina, Tennessee, and West Virginia – all states hoping for big school choice wins! I had a chance to make some new education reform connections, as well as, see some reform experts I have known since the 1990s.

Several months ago I invested several hours to listen to a podcast called [Sold A Story:](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f8ad6e0336&e=a7ab36849c) _How Teaching Kids to Read Went So Wrong_. If you care deeply about our kid's future and the importance of having a literate society, you should take the time to listen to Emily Hanford's series on how an entire generation of kids went from having teachers use phonics to learn how to read to shifting to teaching cues to teach children how to read. If our kids don't exhibit a strong foundation in reading, how do you expect them to learn how to solve complex math problems or have those necessary critical thinking skills in order to make those tough decisions.

Our family has been blessed with two children who learned how to read at an early age. In fact, last week my oldest kid graduated a semester early with a [B.S. in Mechanical Engineering](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=beabb81e3c&e=a7ab36849c) with Honors distinction from ASU’s Barrett, the Honors College and the Fulton engineering schools. We are excited to see what his future holds!

Meanwhile, on the campaign trail, I have been spending a lot of my free time meeting and talking with potential supporters at their door steps. On many occasions, I had to dispel the myth that the Republican led legislature over the past several years had not invested in public education. In fact, for the past several years, the Republican Majority between the House and Senate focused on investing in our K-12 public schools. In 2018, the Republican Legislature passed a 20% teacher salary increase by 2020 (aka 20 by 2020). In 2022, the legislature included an additional $1 billion in new funding for education. This past legislative session, the Arizona budget that was produced and designed so it would be signed into law by a Democrat governor.

I have also met many new families opting to use an Empowerment Scholarship Account (ESA) to educate their kids. As you may recall, in 2022, the legislature passed universal ESAs for all school-aged children. More than 70,000 Arizona families are tapping into this program. Don’t listen to the governor about the program not being a good investment for our kids. In the spring, the Joint Legislative Budget Committee responded to this non-sense in one of their [reports](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=cf5f37a781&e=a7ab36849c). The number of students enrolled in the ESA is nearly on par with their projections.

At the end of the day, it is awesome to know so many Arizona families know school choice is working for their kids. During the 2023 legislative session, the GOP House and Senate caucuses ensured the state budget didn’t include any restriction, cap, or repeal of the ESA program—and prioritized fully funding the program’s growth.

Here are just a few budget highlights from the past several legislative sessions:

**FY 2020**
* $165 million for 5% for teacher salary increases (the 20x2020 plan)
* $68 million for restoration of District Additional Assistance
* $30 million to increase payments for Results Based Funding
* $20 million for the school counselor/school resource officer program

**FY 2021**
* $136 million to fully restore District Additional Assistance
* $125 million for the final funding for the Teacher Salary Increases (final year of the 20x2020 plan)

**FY 2022**
* $65 million to further pay down the K-12 rollover
* $50 million for special education funding

**FY 2023**
* $389 million to increase the Base Level by 6.8%
* $330 million to eliminate the State Equalization Tax Rate and fund through General Fund
* $100 million increase to special education funding
* $60 million to increase District Additional Assistance
* $50 million increase for school counselor/school resources officer program
* $50 million to establish a new poverty weight to the formula
* $1 billion in new education funding
* Passed universal Empowerment Scholarship Accounts (ESAs)

**FY 2024**
* $300 million in one-time state aid to supplement for Districts/Charters to be distributed on a per-pupil basis, this flexible funding can be used for operations or capital needs.
* $20 million in ongoing funding to increase District Additional Assistance serving school districts
* $15.3 million to K-12 alternative transportation serving families seeking more transportation options who might not otherwise be eligible to have access to the normal yellow school bus model
* $2 million to continue to help hold our publicly funded schools accountable by investing in the School Financial Transparency portal that has been funded for the past several years
* $800,000 for alternative teacher development program to cultivate and retain teachers

Please don’t be fooled by misleading soundbites from the local mainstream media and how the House and Senate Republicans haven't been investing in our public education system. As a new member to the Senate's Committee on Education, I look forward to working with you to ensure our kids are learning to read and excelling in writing and arithmetic. It's time to get back to the basics. Teachers need to be able to teach our kids science and history, not just the parts particular teachers want to focus. After all, we continue to learn from the past. We want our school aged kids to fully understand why we don't embrace ideas like communism.

On that note, I hope you and yours have a safe and happy holiday season!

Take care,
---
|
---
| Shawnna LM Bolick
---

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Freedom Fighters, During the first week of December, I spent the bulk of my time in Washington, DC learning more about different education policy topics, including early childhood education, school funding, curriculum, standards and assessments, accountability and improvement, workforce development, and school choice to name just a few topics as a Hunt-Kean Fellow. I was in DC because earlier this fall, Senate leadership selected me to participate in representing Arizona as an education policy expert and as a proven leader who will continue to pave the way for good education policy reforms. The cohort that I am part of include the likes of Republican Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears in Virginia and the North Dakota Attorney General Drew Wrigley. I especially enjoyed meeting many of my fellow Republican legislators from Arkansas, Missouri, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, South Carolina, Tennessee, and West Virginia – all states hoping for big school choice wins! I had a chance to make some new education reform connections, as well as, see some reform experts I have known since the 1990s. Several months ago I invested several hours to listen to a podcast called How Teaching Kids to Read Went So Wrong. If you care deeply about our kid's future and the importance of having a literate society, you should take the time to listen to Emily Hanford's series on how an entire generation of kids went from having teachers use phonics to learn how to read to shifting to teaching cues to teach children how to read. If our kids don't exhibit a strong foundation in reading, how do you expect them to learn how to solve complex math problems or have those necessary critical thinking skills in order to make those tough decisions. Our family has been blessed with two children who learned how to read at an early age. In fact, last week my oldest kid graduated a semester early with a with Honors distinction from ASU’s Barrett, the Honors College and the Fulton engineering schools. We are excited to see what his future holds! Meanwhile, on the campaign trail, I have been spending a lot of my free time meeting and talking with potential supporters at their door steps. On many occasions, I had to dispel the myth that the Republican led legislature over the past several years had not invested in public education. In fact, for the past several years, the Republican Majority between the House and Senate focused on investing in our K-12 public schools. In 2018, the Republican Legislature passed a 20% teacher salary increase by 2020 (aka 20 by 2020). In 2022, the legislature included an additional $1 billion in new funding for education. This past legislative session, the Arizona budget that was produced and designed so it would be signed into law by a Democrat governor. I have also met many new families opting to use an Empowerment Scholarship Account (ESA) to educate their kids. As you may recall, in 2022, the legislature passed universal ESAs for all school-aged children. More than 70,000 Arizona families are tapping into this program. Don’t listen to the governor about the program not being a good investment for our kids. In the spring, the Joint Legislative Budget Committee responded to this non-sense in one of their . The number of students enrolled in the ESA is nearly on par with their projections. At the end of the day, it is awesome to know so many Arizona families know school choice is working for their kids. During the 2023 legislative session, the GOP House and Senate caucuses ensured the state budget didn’t include any restriction, cap, or repeal of the ESA program—and prioritized fully funding the program’s growth. Here are just a few budget highlights from the past several legislative sessions: FY 2020 $165 million for 5% for teacher salary increases (the 20x2020 plan) $68 million for restoration of District Additional Assistance $30 million to increase payments for Results Based Funding $20 million for the school counselor/school resource officer program FY 2021 $136 million to fully restore District Additional Assistance $125 million for the final funding for the Teacher Salary Increases (final year of the 20x2020 plan) FY 2022 $65 million to further pay down the K-12 rollover $50 million for special education funding FY 2023 $389 million to increase the Base Level by 6.8% $330 million to eliminate the State Equalization Tax Rate and fund through General Fund $100 million increase to special education funding $60 million to increase District Additional Assistance $50 million increase for school counselor/school resources officer program $50 million to establish a new poverty weight to the formula $1 billion in new education funding Passed universal Empowerment Scholarship Accounts (ESAs) FY 2024 $300 million in one-time state aid to supplement for Districts/Charters to be distributed on a per-pupil basis, this flexible funding can be used for operations or capital needs. $20 million in ongoing funding to increase District Additional Assistance serving school districts $15.3 million to K-12 alternative transportation serving families seeking more transportation options who might not otherwise be eligible to have access to the normal yellow school bus model $2 million to continue to help hold our publicly funded schools accountable by investing in the School Financial Transparency portal that has been funded for the past several years $800,000 for alternative teacher development program to cultivate and retain teachers Please don’t be fooled by misleading soundbites from the local mainstream media and how the House and Senate Republicans haven't been investing in our public education system. As a new member to the Senate's Committee on Education, I look forward to working with you to ensure our kids are learning to read and excelling in writing and arithmetic. It's time to get back to the basics. Teachers need to be able to teach our kids science and history, not just the parts particular teachers want to focus. After all, we continue to learn from the past. We want our school aged kids to fully understand why we don't embrace ideas like communism. On that note, I hope you and yours have a safe and happy holiday season! Take care, | | Shawnna LM Bolick | UPCOMING EVENTS 1/3/24 Fundraiser in downtown Phoenix from 8:30am to 10am. subject: From my family to yours, happy holidays!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75703852/445495286/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFjNzEwZDktYjRhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R6lDsL2ThLpUCiZqBPjhBTCheQ2eXtHYwDguRkXqx90=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75703856/445495316/-381882994?refcode=em-12.23.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFjNzEwZDktYjRhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R6lDsL2ThLpUCiZqBPjhBTCheQ2eXtHYwDguRkXqx90=)
Hi there,

Happy holidays! I hope that you and your family are enjoying time together.

This year, I am especially grateful for your support of our grassroots campaign to flip AZ-01 from red to blue. With your help, we are in a great position to defeat David Schweikert and give this community the representation it deserves.

So before we dive into our election year, I want to personally thank you for your support – whether you have contributed to our campaign, volunteered, or spread the word to family and friends.

During the Thanksgiving holiday, I sent around my famous Cuban flan recipe. I’m attaching the recipe again below in the hopes that you will enjoy a sweet treat this holiday season.

Thank you,

Marlene
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75703858/445495319/-381882994?refcode=em-12.23.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFjNzEwZDktYjRhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R6lDsL2ThLpUCiZqBPjhBTCheQ2eXtHYwDguRkXqx90=)****
---
**_Here are the ingredients you will need:_**
* Vanilla extract
* Six eggs
* Two cans each of evaporated and condensed milk
* Sugar
* A large mixing bowl
* A large roasting pan
* A measuring cup

**_Here is how to make this wonderful dessert:_**
1. Measure one cup of sugar and melt inside the thick mixing bowl. Do this on the stove on a low heat until it bubbles up and melts -- this will take 6-7 minutes until it turns into a caramel. Coat the inside of the bowl with the caramel. As it gets thicker it will be easier to coat the sides. Put the bowl with caramel in the refrigerator for at least one hour or until firm.

2. Crack your six eggs into a separate mixing bowl and add your cans of evaporated and condensed milk. Add a splash of pure vanilla extract to taste, then mix.

3. Pour the custard mixture into your chilled caramel. Fill your large roasting pan 2⁄3 with water and place your bowl with the mixture inside. Cover the bowl with two layers of aluminum foil. Bake at 350o for about 90 minutes or longer until a knife placed in the center comes out clean.

4. Once removed from the oven and fully cooked, cool to room temperature, and refrigerate overnight to cool. To serve, place a plate over the bowl and carefully tip it over until your flan pops out– hopefully in one piece. 🤣 Godspeed!

---

Hi all, It’s Savannah from Team Josh Hawley.

As Josh’s digital manager, it’s my job to make sure we’re staying connected to our grassroots team.

Right now is a historically slow time for campaign fundraising. **I get it - you’re spending less time on screens and more time with your family.**

I’m not asking you to step away from your holiday celebrations, but I will say that right now, we can’t afford to fall behind.

**[Will you take just two minutes today to pitch in during our FINAL push of the year to re-elect Josh Hawley and take back the Senate?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2d88f8de06da45779d604038ef5ccac4&_e=i_2q4ceCTi4_V8nLsYoDyF-Vy5olRTVO-8nUDQ5l5P05Kj0wdWAGg1QhtEElAyE1p5P1wD3qrU2yHAGqJh_fIj5wkvA-nTohPR6vcO7psANpoIYPNaY6HVr1OLZlDD7N43drui-Q23p5ynj35JcFRLBANAqIHnRavF__yJKj3TT9lNhQb9THI4XPUc_s5ePH-8prhCNuORsGkP5nfVM1qVgYrGTcMgn_GMO0GFPxzK2LbPep7M8zlEQFeueFDe00NXXL4x53MkCrLC1uJgwt4Y5PweRJtJALjDmKIzLGZyiVKTuvAC0lQHNXgFjQKCV2EdRFCSarKYMu5647y_LXPkyuaG2oUJoHB9fuLMdCp7GRXnkifE1XAEKrr5ezgStf)**

This is our _**final chance**_ to build our war chest before we’re officially in an election year.

Once 2024 starts, it’s going to FLY by with how busy we’re going to be making sure we can re-elect Josh.

The more prepared we are now, the more likely it is that we’ll win next year.

We don’t have hundreds of billionaire donors, so we’re counting on patriots like you to step up.

**[In just two minutes, you can change the outcome of this election. clean_body: | | | Hi all, It’s Savannah from Team Josh Hawley. As Josh’s digital manager, it’s my job to make sure we’re staying connected to our grassroots team. Right now is a historically slow time for campaign fundraising. I get it - you’re spending less time on screens and more time with your family. I’m not asking you to step away from your holiday celebrations, but I will say that right now, we can’t afford to fall behind. This is our final chance to build our war chest before we’re officially in an election year. Once 2024 starts, it’s going to FLY by with how busy we’re going to be making sure we can re-elect Josh. The more prepared we are now, the more likely it is that we’ll win next year. We don’t have hundreds of billionaire donors, so we’re counting on patriots like you to step up. Thank you and have a Merry Christmas! Savannah, Team Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

# Christmas Weekend Update
Merry Christmas! I’ll keep this update short(ish).
**Thank You.** To everyone who opened, read, donated through, or helped by forwarding our last email - thank you. Never in our history have we seen such an outpouring of support from one email. Over $300,000 was donated or committed. [We are halfway to our goal.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HfjZt-BPNqgA3ijwg_5Jj_OlHnCTnA95yf3sUe8HbeyMcSJ-6s4zE6j7cXPO7LStuMPWP9ysirak2NstXCAaOEeFCApHadEg3osZTOLgU4YSXhRVCqjc_JZJGg70xe-4fNk4EFM8m4zkQtBr0SKX3EkkBSWyUwBKkbtBvOX90MVb/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h1/mPm5grynIOvOu5c0pLsjLZqSaJ45SaleMKbetyt2aqo) That’s incredible. And to me, even more important than the dollars was the show of solidarity for the cause. We don’t often make such a direct ask, but we asked and you answered. It’s reason for great hope. Together we will continue to soldier on.
**Our New Logo and Website.** Today we’re introducing our new logo and website. Going into 2024, we wanted a new look and feel that expresses the beauty and remarkable history of our beloved America. I hope you like it. We also significantly upgraded the platform to feature our trainings, resources, and volunteer opportunities (of which there will be many over the coming months). Check it out at [truethevote.org](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/cO17LDUZDq1kcaID3zRFaYYREftgiUuXVoOXugRiHtmu-AVAaXG513tQSdSoBOLlzIlgasopyU97C6rsvnvYFinQVjNqOD8NRrx_GzbehTBIp3XlKS8y9lmfToJC16iwCmHNs9eBigj9J2SGqh6MtHf90R_GsXzEcyVSnb_N8MU/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h2/DYFmxq86FLlIFr2RuvL9V6XmiPboeprnSwdCq84Pgv8).
**In the News.** It was another whipsaw week, from[ Georgia](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsRMsfC-2PTsr_wiNivxO0t1h7v7roV3xo369gVsFcrI27vLbK75JpBTcJDlKyM1mRe4ZjZ_PXnpJl6yI26tjIss1_RJ8rQuwuvlwT3Lw7RU7_dJXIQj55LDrYVEQaekdCksfA91GwVu3Av5xAs0Qy5hqPJcQFXSRa2vlWM-zTw41Ov9RaynjYm0QH2S6cwAp_yQzxMRoDBm_JyhxtoPiWGHEAGD5K7inXKDoCJ2jjM57km1vfm_nJrSCBbt8eSr_mQw-8y6BojX5JBvoe6MO41J8ekihplr3yikOFQHVlmIvHZYdNy0k9ZIIv0jj6pbXEw/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h3/Ap9t5bG_UFFRKrrxR6AyyLKIjU7uLv6gZ5eA67XxByE) to [Colorado](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HWjRSzQjLQBxLGVjeHnaGMfG1h9Em2HdHfb5yn-seLOJmLMFQd9L-4tJ2oR-zin64lCiNe9QzWJjnopzqnPBFolWMcuSJYyVtNBAEYO8akAFc4to8xL6Y78fpcqd1OXMFBqAzT6Ejd41YW_Ly9ROOUgrnuTCsYlDrK3SEg-AgY2o0NE_OgLbxt5qwawa7yKhadTavbNMColOjvKR7zwG2Xs/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h4/PSOxF1vLGEUDsWekJizE8b0uvS-myp_Tlq_W59Rvg6w) to the [Supreme Court of the United States](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/SCyHX0Wroz1z7wbvqPM-jNThAAtDoqWGZ_76DeoGguO4lTFArZdD-9wsiYBs1BHfLUEAmH_xNpbSBVljbWLPDkn6uypqSw-DN1RG-CQTgaFNtGgFPdKebiDkZ1VpLGFE3JMVFV1RoOsERRPCIDo6-xG9_IkE3blImX_vjBFOkgephZe7xK3fNYUb5G8tdui0p7Ltod28UsS8sEKhfMPNu_NowljP5FRQH3876PNgsTR5SryfhtJrOwRLEu4gthbnnACA3hqGSCJGrMb_kC5ES3K4_OpOpVjqdjaQDAaE8I22eXUp1WbnFwCnkMaQEnZn2exsAPmSrACc8IojE3K24VxIezxzcVnD1-8z2ljy-x4STKoqr96RnzvijiV20WsF/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h5/2ltLxQwNLZr0-5benQxXpgEa9aHNiBUeSq7AnBTeWoY), all about election subjection. It’s hard to keep up, harder still to come to grips with the depth of abuse the deep state is willing to go to in its quest for control. We are closely engaged on many of these fronts, so I can confidently tell you that this rollercoaster has only just begun. What’s ahead will challenge us to dig deep, stick together, search for channels of truth, and, above all, keep moving forward.
Here are a few sources I read/listen/watch and are 100% worth subscribing to. _(Please note: this list is NOT exhaustive; I will continue to make recommendations, and we will add them to our website.)_
* Sam Faddis @ [AND Magazine](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/4xkviejVe2bcNHdbmWFEFtmXViZQdbwiqfwqkpSx-pXRfg6awC4njcqEmXL5-rH9p2mRT3O-SjKC2a5JJK0frB0C8EllX8r8Gi7V2CsiN-zKhFy4k_Dwn-R72GAzsaPELpEPOeP8ImYgADHMixixa8BEYtgBpbGn5tDgx1KYvRxJYxny0vH33Xu17fd-VkhWg_1oFxtX2WKr8V0bv3j39A/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h6/N2UDc_yghvGcLLdFTg_gBehFANnmZ4J_9-UNefYCAAg)
* Sundance @ [The Last Refuge](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HabULjJg5Ue7nOhi5Rmwx9Hntr2K-s1V1jSszdBb521kSLDcBo3otBbmlf-ylnOIHdWG9G4SMt682_x9aZpr8xU8wCbCRn_87NjqTq_F2EHlNfN3YTHW-bhN9CVrmI_9QyozLQdm1RuXisRU9yfo0G-evnYyY2o5Ru1VqwZ33cSv/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h7/Wbu5vnQK7b4AdFkahrAn2sl1vocjP4N1-blv7fS0oC0)
* [Open.Ink](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p8Z6nRqryKYuBDl71oDlkE5_CDt6tJPCaf8TgAcluO3CU26bQKU3rPoYuZt_2vnTGHa_XJiDGd3ku42Ey_xFy81ItEkVgeKwMMP0n4ZRvnXOivMs0U1WIlXCsytH31SHzteyNpnkfd2Don3IXwNd7IA/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h8/yhNWDgBsLiRdZwrklolGoD_WiY7KYoV6Vc4jmgtpNGw)
* Michael Shellenberger @ [Public](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/BNhqJdY5f2S0uME4U6wabMTrxdd1XQuarZQtGeRtt-YQbQJTqLGmCzLMxxiL7edGwhom1orgtHN-uO-KSiFIIFRCP79IBkv8b-rQ2OOuhrr4KR7-yTlv7I6lvdsphE_Oy3J-AYAkK6v2dlmgWBQdyzSQxBQU2fhES5qiz3qBjCdKYkiT5A5zXc1s2AQ4Bj-Y/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h9/gx4uQX2PjSWCnhefv9t5Ftc9iXMprNrURpVscHs1y-A)
* Matt Taibbi @[ Racket News](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsYNZDtU_25h5O_F9PPOrvwt2cLIoEX7yiDAjwXWKa7pX2a_xb4TD-lpl7vzmTISDQFyhB1UzfEJtb8KQzdX1Y1-h2K62Cvx91ujLd2uITDzAjDE69UerVSlcMBRtfQgXGwZgPlx_oz9O5ToZ2cMJ-QKbnRHYYwtL1IEdHFTIygmqYToJ9E6HTMorxhGm3TM8cA/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h10/x5zmB5o2TOoAoneCVnfMGT3ppSIFLvvyMN9Ub19bN0g)
* Tucker Carlson @ [TCN](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HTsExUaOT7__9bYm6_iYhQ5YTlDjZeb08dhrvEKdpSS6qXegJ0kc3DN3ASxaMC25GWymcam9-tst1Nsu6rjytBdkBvpO3GLmhMM1u2mhOb_6IlyWafT-eOFf1N2Utsyap-4oQihJN5lrgfw6weta1yn0NQjPe7DyqsfI9yMuVOcs/42d/50213Ye5QkKnnGtnGL1MBQ/h11/ZJPCese5dAysOt4jaLftQwsxbtCvlaLYAe1PmSg3iz0)

I would describe each of the above as “puzzle assemblers”, exposing pieces of information and fitting them into the bigger emerging picture. Suffice it to say a lot of lies have been told, for a very long time. But bit by bit, the truth is being revealed.
The darkness is very dark. It will grow darker still. Let not your heart be troubled. Hearts and minds are changing, eyes are opening. We will walk through these days together. Strong. Courageous. And we will emerge victorious.
**“If there must be trouble, let it be in my day, that my child may have peace.” Thomas Paine**
Pray for peace, keep the faith, let’s roll.

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: how donuts will save our Senate majority 🍩
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
the cost of a dozen donuts
| | |
---
Friend, I wanted to reach out again before the holidays because we have an important deadline coming up, but I want to make sure I don't bother you next week. I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $150,000 fundraising goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about donuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority.
**[(If you're short on time and ready to retire Rick Scott next fall, you can chip in here to help me make up this fundraising gap and flip Florida blue.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75705485/445497667/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk517-fr-nd-g2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZlNWNiNjMtYjVhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q9bKfdl9_qhvWkohAOH6aiD9k-khuVy6_-lHNX03F48=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75705486/445497669/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk517-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODZlNWNiNjMtYjVhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q9bKfdl9_qhvWkohAOH6aiD9k-khuVy6_-lHNX03F48=)
When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and _still_ struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
**So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local donut shop.** It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality.
We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. **I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate.**
**Making donuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. ****I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change._And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign next November._**
[**That's why I'm asking you to chip in just $10 — about the cost of a dozen donuts — to send me to the Senate. Can you chip in before midnight to help me meet my end-of-quarter fundraising goal and defeat Rick Scott? subject: We’re officially on the ground in New Hampshire
body:
Exciting news!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75705576/445497758/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2VmYjI4N2MtYjVhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5QAGgmjQnbxSLiGlt4Zb0p3mHrEk3yjqIoE8hgyY-B8=&emci=72fb287c-b5a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=7efb287c-b5a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)
Peter, we have exciting news:
**We just launched our tenth newsroom — the _Granite Post News_ in New Hampshire!**
[_**Can you pitch in $5 toward our end-of-year fundraising goal to ensure our reporters in New Hampshire can hit the ground running—and help us open even more newsrooms in 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75705577/445497759/1803987984?refcode=em20231223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2VmYjI4N2MtYjVhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5QAGgmjQnbxSLiGlt4Zb0p3mHrEk3yjqIoE8hgyY-B8=)
**[Donate $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75705578/445497760/1803987984?refcode=em20231223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2VmYjI4N2MtYjVhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5QAGgmjQnbxSLiGlt4Zb0p3mHrEk3yjqIoE8hgyY-B8=)**
New Hampshire is _already_ playing a critical role in shaping the 2024 elections—just take a look:
**The Granite State is hosting its Republican Presidential Primary in just a few weeks, which means right-wing media and Donald Trump are busy spreading hate, disinformation, and division in the state.**
In fact, at a recent campaign rally in New Hampshire, Trump spewed dangerous white nationalist rhetoric penned by none other than Adolf Hitler, saying that immigrants are **“poisoning the blood of our country.”**
We know this is just the beginning. New Hampshire is a must-win Presidential battleground. That means Trump, Fox News, and other right-wing bad actors will continue to use lies and hate to divide New Hampshire communities without access to trustworthy, factual journalism.
**But thanks to your generosity, we’ll be on the ground and we’re ready to fight back** —debunking misinformation, calling out hate, and spreading essential information about our elections and more to those who need it for free.
[_**Before we close out the year, can you make a gift of $5 or more today to power _Granite Post News_ and help us launch more newsrooms in even more battleground states in the lead-up to the 2024 elections? **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75705579/445497761/1803987984?refcode=em20231223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2VmYjI4N2MtYjVhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5QAGgmjQnbxSLiGlt4Zb0p3mHrEk3yjqIoE8hgyY-B8=)
**[Donate $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75705580/445497762/1803987984?refcode=em20231223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2VmYjI4N2MtYjVhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5QAGgmjQnbxSLiGlt4Zb0p3mHrEk3yjqIoE8hgyY-B8=)**
This work is powered by our supporters—folks like you who believe in our mission. Thank you!

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
Peter,

From all of us at the Indiana Democratic Party, we wish you a very Happy Holidays!

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/HAPPY.png]

During this time of reflection, we’re grateful for your commitment to our state and our party. With your help, we had an historic 2023 election cycle, and we can’t wait to see what is ahead in 2024.

Wherever you are this holiday season, we hope you get to spend it with the people you love.

Season’s Greetings,
Indiana Democrats

Indianapolis, IN 46204

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Introducing Myself
body:
Whether you’ve been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. | |
---

Hi Fellow Conservative,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2df45588a72241168dab62c05d8336d3&_e=3eBHuyX10hArbaL2mPbrZzYLXUE-jmOgbu0iqYUZr-8Dbterfiy-kf6ywL3_eEADcQGU9n5LEJk7grNBpVzfFMM-k40Lz2w8OR9iZ4bAAfJaQPHcjreQnLLlbSEucNqcqi9FYyOhoWlMvGD5JhaFrIDHpsBUcXSxxUNX5uClsW-79CkgnGmhXt7Qy_vurVAAkkRSiIXAspsNSTmfq5j-32K3k2dQqVrXDbpYbSNetO4NIkUpQsccYIrAjyN20IU6M2UeTrfwITCtrvWybZLuTMOwcvGi-HjZLY54uS4y5I95F7JEQCZZmMv1uYNuEaBUIP4YIG1nfB6yzQ6dALcF4-asWvz9ShMsBdMC53fzkTiIlKkLuBIanmYWQpc1NSft)**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable._**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_

---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.

---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.** ➡️

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2df45588a72241168dab62c05d8336d3&_e=3eBHuyX10hArbaL2mPbrZzYLXUE-jmOgbu0iqYUZr-8Dbterfiy-kf6ywL3_eEADcQGU9n5LEJk7grNBpVzfFMM-k40Lz2w8OR9iZ4bAAfJaQPHcjreQnLLlbSEucNqcqi9FYyOhoWlMvGD5JhaFrIDHpsBUcXSxxUNX5uClsW-79CkgnGmhXt7Qy_vurVAAkkRSiIXAspsNSTmfq5j-32K3k2dQqVrXDbpYbSNetO7qYEceMkUT0tQMlUoOfjycNm6h6kTvFCvVa-aySzulRiphfJRr1nFhAwQPzQPdjwNZxEzayd1Flz5B-PFmu-myml4t8kos21jFYB4mFd5yJ0VEhgHB-jrcTxrlNo50nzS97qGEBqy58r084ETE1viw)
---
When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2df45588a72241168dab62c05d8336d3&_e=3eBHuyX10hArbaL2mPbrZzYLXUE-jmOgbu0iqYUZr-8Dbterfiy-kf6ywL3_eEADcQGU9n5LEJk7grNBpVzfFMM-k40Lz2w8OR9iZ4bAAfJaQPHcjreQnLLlbSEucNqcqi9FYyOhoWlMvGD5JhaFrIDHpsBUcXSxxUNX5uClsW-79CkgnGmhXt7Qy_vurVAAkkRSiIXAspsNSTmfq5j-32K3k2dQqVrXDbpYbSNetO760EBuNhmPQJQ6ynEjfI8KKomlBK0KaRBNDWLc_53pAsbcVmY41mUjkiX3AhRkUUB90N44Is8AVW56Ctgkw_yI13c1iURsscLz1Bo09Q7PuAp0lUrNWka_En0yq5nvLxWyFIbehstsvibUy6JDI_0J)
---

Now, our campaign is catching fire, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if _every single person reading this_ could send a donation of just $5 to help us end this quarter STRONG!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2df45588a72241168dab62c05d8336d3&_e=3eBHuyX10hArbaL2mPbrZzYLXUE-jmOgbu0iqYUZr-8Dbterfiy-kf6ywL3_eEADcQGU9n5LEJk7grNBpVzfFMM-k40Lz2w8OR9iZ4bAAfJaQPHcjreQnLLlbSEucNqcqi9FYyOhoWlMvGD5JhaFrIDHpsBUcXSxxUNX5uClsW-79CkgnGmhXt7Qy_vurVAAkkRSiIXAspsNSTmfq5j-32K3k2dQqVrXDbpYbSNetO7NXDSeDq_0DGEf23oE_8lwt2cVCIpNoeLN2tp4Yyjigh4bCc3o8ABlouU3rDjENGs35MWXFvjHI-wE2S9wZicy4Vw-Atg9jN4fGZz6UlkQs8JeQom1mcJlyb-Wv9eUBSxLEu1QlcZ51iHFDPHeneQ6)**

But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. | | When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, our campaign is catching fire, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained! | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: They've put me on their target list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We know what comes next. The Republican mega-donors funding AIPAC's super PACs will flood the airwaves with nasty dark money attack ads.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20231223-3308-footer&t=1&akid=3308%2E420207%2Em6Sj3D)
Peter,
We just got word: AIPAC is taking action on their pledge to spend $100 million against our movement — and they've put me on their target list.
We know what comes next. The Republican mega-donors funding AIPAC's super PACs will flood the airwaves with nasty dark money attack ads.
[**Will you chip in $3 to our campaign as we stand up to AIPAC?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231223.W7P9fO&refcode=em20231223-3308&t=2&akid=3308%2E420207%2Em6Sj3D)
**[Contribute ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231223.W7P9fO&refcode=em20231223-3308&t=21&akid=3308%2E420207%2Em6Sj3D)**
We've seen the AIPAC playbook. They target progressive, working-class candidates of color. They abuse campaign finance laws to spend millions of dollars on misleading attack ads. And they're willing to undermine democracy to slow our progressive movement — they endorsed over 100 Republicans who defend the January 6th insurrection.1
**AIPAC has usually held off from opposing incumbents. Not this time.**
The same Republican donors who give millions to election-denying Republicans including Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Ted Cruz, are now challenging progressives across the country — in hopes of distracting from our efforts to flip back the House majority.
[**It's up to us to make sure our campaign has what we need to defend this seat and keep our progressive movement strong. Will you please help us fight back today with a contribution?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231223.W7P9fO&refcode=em20231223-3308&t=22&akid=3308%2E420207%2Em6Sj3D)
**[Contribute ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231223.W7P9fO&refcode=em20231223-3308&t=23&akid=3308%2E420207%2Em6Sj3D)**
In Congress, I've worked hard to pass bold, transformative legislation. As the first woman of color to serve as the sole chair of the Progressive Caucus, I've organized inside Congress to build power for our movement. I worked to secure the single-largest investment in climate action in American history. I've passed massive bills to create new, good-paying union jobs — all while making sure the wealthy and powerful corporations pay their fair share.
And yes, I've called for the immediate release of Israeli hostages taken by Hamas and a ceasefire in Gaza.
That's exactly why AIPAC and their Republican megadonors have pledged to spend $100 million against our movement and put me on their target list.
**So today, I'm asking you to take a stand.** [**If you can, please donate to help keep me fighting for our movement in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231223.W7P9fO&refcode=em20231223-3308&t=24&akid=3308%2E420207%2Em6Sj3D)

Pramila

clean_body: We know what comes next. The Republican mega-donors funding AIPAC's super PACs will flood the airwaves with nasty dark money attack ads. Peter, We just got word: AIPAC is taking action on their pledge to spend $100 million against our movement — and they've put me on their target list. We know what comes next. The Republican mega-donors funding AIPAC's super PACs will flood the airwaves with nasty dark money attack ads. We've seen the AIPAC playbook. They target progressive, working-class candidates of color. They abuse campaign finance laws to spend millions of dollars on misleading attack ads. And they're willing to undermine democracy to slow our progressive movement — they endorsed over 100 Republicans who defend the January 6th insurrection.1 AIPAC has usually held off from opposing incumbents. Not this time. The same Republican donors who give millions to election-denying Republicans including Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Ted Cruz, are now challenging progressives across the country — in hopes of distracting from our efforts to flip back the House majority. In Congress, I've worked hard to pass bold, transformative legislation. As the first woman of color to serve as the sole chair of the Progressive Caucus, I've organized inside Congress to build power for our movement. I worked to secure the single-largest investment in climate action in American history. I've passed massive bills to create new, good-paying union jobs — all while making sure the wealthy and powerful corporations pay their fair share. And yes, I've called for the immediate release of Israeli hostages taken by Hamas and a ceasefire in Gaza. That's exactly why AIPAC and their Republican megadonors have pledged to spend $100 million against our movement and put me on their target list. So today, I'm asking you to take a stand. In solidarity, Pramila 1 - | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Fellow Americans,

It's the season of giving, so I wanted to give back for everything you've done. I'm truly thankful for all of your assistance over the last year of my campaign. Since last November, I've felt tremendous gratitude, seeing how much each and every one of my supporters has sprung into action to help in a time of need.

**_Thank you._**

I want to keep this momentum moving forward into the new year. We're facing some of the toughest times yet, with the future of our House, Senate, and White House at stake. _The future of our country depends on how we do this next year. If Republicans don 't win, we'll be forced to sit powerless on the sidelines and watch the Radical Agenda take over._ **More spending, more crime, and more border crossings will plague the country we know and love. We can 't let this become a reality.**

I need you to step up just one more time. Take the momentum from this past year and keep it moving forward! | [**SECURE THE 2024 ELECTION**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=27d545940ea74fe0bd16d28ed57929c2&_e=zc9qfCkJ0gWXUHWabQIP1zlG57WR9ilSTQIdXPrN0xpIHsDhO9Sla9cnH3eIhhZ-tY5PGZ-M9NN4qCfCkoUfEwSjVSw12yDVOku28rn87h90nPVcFBu5-TBnU-Y0LImT_05DBRkyRZRFOwLI8Q7QZ08pBDF5K_DTW1rpfjGalhIbSnr3Suldu7s0wvREwO4nBUv55QJ0p9DgBqcmmarVqreUj7l8lvgIE1m5jQ6C7Xs7GXeGZJXxcSgK1w_OFwsK_WCSUI4MFax_9vvqymjs8Vwqhyi3VLxgDqNISIXDQGoMagll9Cr7wcg-DwnJGApI)

subject: Save Vote-By-Mail!!
body:
Ever since mail-in voting became a more accessible and convenient way to exercise voting rights, Republicans have been committed to defunding the Postal Service.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75707036/445501308/444630146?refcode=12-23-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzOTFiMWU2LWI3YTEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7B_SGZIzqq1wFJbmX2vZBryKBUDRnfx0acjZ4yW0Thk=)
---
| | Friend, Ever since mail-in voting became a more accessible and convenient way to exercise voting rights, Republicans have been committed to defunding the Postal Service. They know that the USPS is _crucial_ to voting-by-mail, and they want to destroy it. It’s bad enough that the GOP is threatening mail-in voting by attacking the Postal Service, but they’re doing more than that! The Postal Service is _crucial_ for people to receive medications, not to mention keeping in touch with loved ones and shipping important items across the country. With Christmas just around the corner, the USPS is a _crucial_ service that ensures that everybody’s gifts get delivered quickly and safely. **[**The USPS is a crucial part of the government, and something that every single one of us uses. It should be free from these partisan politics being pushed by the GOP. If you support vote-by-mail and the Postal Service, chip in $10 today so we can keep protecting it from Republican attacks.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75707037/445501309/444630146?refcode=12-23-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzOTFiMWU2LWI3YTEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7B_SGZIzqq1wFJbmX2vZBryKBUDRnfx0acjZ4yW0Thk=)** Trump made his hatred of mail-in voting a cornerstone of his campaigns, saying that it caused fraud. But we know better. Mail-in voting is a cornerstone of our democracy that allows folks all across the country to exercise their right to vote, and there’s _no_ __ proof that it causes any sort of fraud. **[Mail-in voting is necessary for a robust 21st century democracy, and the GOP is threatening the Postal Service to prevent us from exercising our rights. It is a transparent attack on our democracy and they must be held accountable. We know that you don’t agree with these ridiculous attacks, and by contributing $10 today, we can keep working to protect it as hard as we can.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75707038/445501310/444630146?refcode=12-23-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzOTFiMWU2LWI3YTEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7B_SGZIzqq1wFJbmX2vZBryKBUDRnfx0acjZ4yW0Thk=) ** The continuous attacks on mail-in voting are proof that the GOP doesn’t care about democratic principles and our right to the ballot box. These attempts to destroy the Postal Service are just another example of Republicans trying to prevent mail-in voting by any means necessary. **[**These attacks are wrong and need to stop. Please chip in $10 today so we can continue to fight any more attacks on our Postal Service and voting rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75707039/445501311/444630146?refcode=12-23-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzOTFiMWU2LWI3YTEtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7B_SGZIzqq1wFJbmX2vZBryKBUDRnfx0acjZ4yW0Thk=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action
