Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=a2e04ccc966c41ae8305bd28462b30ae&_e=nRRK6H1ZKoaQ_FG_Oeq1kD6prZa5X_I4WGxRUl8e6zJm3tHTTxnOkrICEbVW2MiRDvbbpeE2_tq7q2tFhHLXg0nJjIpKuuHeLA7qSVwpjxWoU9gxkNl7ZM2cBZNmhLY9Devg0wrcGdgy7c5yLlzKPapsSF9ywSBRosS5JhLnAe9VBhdAYy8DFRKUZ_-pceYExSUtVgBZE9L4XcSBT2oWlu0_1cDDIjN9k-91tIKnDdq_xzwDm3Hfkpt37A5gGQAM7dNLWstyqwuvltfB162N2X5N0Rd3j4aumgEJrlIQbjwg5kDOKRSXQ0QpL4Mce9zBHdk-I5gERuZhFeToi8z4_4N_BilPpB-RfU_fH2JqkmCIpZiFgonnLa11HPmOJu_4jONLGvV1FvpT9P3SWgyRhg%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=a2e04ccc966c41ae8305bd28462b30ae&_e=nRRK6H1ZKoaQ_FG_Oeq1kD6prZa5X_I4WGxRUl8e6zJm3tHTTxnOkrICEbVW2MiRDvbbpeE2_tq7q2tFhHLXg0nJjIpKuuHeLA7qSVwpjxWoU9gxkNl7ZM2cBZNmhLY9Devg0wrcGdgy7c5yLlzKPapsSF9ywSBRosS5JhLnAe9VBhdAYy8DFRKUZ_-pceYExSUtVgBZE9L4XcSBT2oWlu0_1cDDIjN9k-91tIKnDdq_xzwDm3Hfkpt37A5gGQAMQ9A8Ye3GRAblFkMMvPPQoK3ZleUBuAfDXcVhSS-XNwQQPzwZYAZV2chX9au3VsFRfSX7VUdF-nVOcWVkFvM-9zetzjhE6GCFCtMbpchgDUSQEaZBlg_JgJKFLnme_TPv88AP3Xu9udekv9LsmV9KvA%3D%3D)

Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today.

I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: we’re taking a break…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, it’s Maxwell Frost.

I know the amount of emails being sent this time of year can be overwhelming – trust me, I get it.

Honestly, this is the best way for me to keep my team in the loop and my fundraising on track. Knowing I can trust people like you to chip in via email lets me stay focused on the rest of the work.

But listen, I’ll say this: This will be the last time I’ll reach out before the holidays.

Spending quality time with family and friends is important to me, just like I know it is for you. We all deserve a break to relax with our people. I won’t keep you from that.

But that means I’m accepting the risk that the far right will keep fundraising – and they could start off 2024 by drowning us in shady money.

That’s why I’m reaching out one more time, to ask if you can give us a head start before we go dark for the holidays. Before everybody logs off, can you give $27 – or whatever you have – to make sure we start 2024 ready to win?

body:
We need to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long. | | | Hi, Peter, it’s Nicolas O’Rourke. I’m a pastor and organizer — **and the newest Working Families Party city councilmember in Philadelphia.** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUGKhNBve-r211KADe6vOZnU6QHrLJYE8ttrb9C6T7dkEZjH89SH8o3e7ScVkmrmTP7I3pEL5Hx2hsO4D4WnUnww7waZXu-ycSa-yD7EbvBrM_v3roSY_xwtGmEwdc4NVyd6J0WhRMSHmWuzAeerdLa4cqaNAUGqFLsAuU3Ep9EP3cPCKM-kbwT7gscVD_QmqjAi1_sf1fMMHrptBpbzvO2qARR8t2NR7llS3cYmtt0vDPHW_RHycw2CdC1CvER_oeT62yOzQliGjse8-QG51H00OL58eR4MKGzClezKt519FTRThtxA565jNgJ3VT5cyJmu4vG5dnaL80cOGTvYZtpA/42d/Wp10rycNT0CdULGYP90BnA/h0/9PWtWvxiIVEEWlssoNXer1fXkBMaEF3sYuDoDYGaXQ0) In a few moments, **[I’m going to ask you to make an end-of-year contribution to the Working Families Party and fuel our shared fight to keep delivering victories for working people in 2024.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUGKhNBve-r211KADe6vOZnU6QHrLJYE8ttrb9C6T7dkEZjH89SH8o3e7ScVkmrmTP_mhLMiY7StUnAcepGcC2vOmS-CRj1Vcih4MqxtRurQL0xsTZiQjHkmd7mSDIHZN67jvhXKQ2hEz6RyT2gQ_k3NbWp1BFHxCnbkFPZZhh_VttbKGZvXR-chrBG1wA1AsV329hnAKkhcExW4s3bPpHogW7s1UckqgVtI_C-JmmfS_iFCKhp91DDn84Ht3kqtl3-J5dmCfRt-k_zodTWqmlBTVqbkJDVxK0bC91b3hvo6j6ImRAArvAYBr9CkASkE2x0rf3WcSRcPf8za9kOw4n-Q/42d/Wp10rycNT0CdULGYP90BnA/h1/GGNBj8kCnUsb_1UfXzphUDTKGG6WGl6jXmR3VJuX4Ck)** But first, I wanted to take a moment to explain why fundraisers like this are so important. This year, we ran a historic, third-party campaign against billionaire-backed Super PACs and an entrenched political establishment to leave Philadelphia’s Republican Party in the _dustbin_ of history, and return power where it belongs — **in the hands of the community.** Together, we showed that when we reach out to our neighbors of all backgrounds, and build coalitions to facilitate real and unified change, we can’t be stopped. **And we didn’t just erode Republican influence in Philadelphia — we laid the groundwork for progressive candidates in other major cities across the country, and for mobilizing the multiracial working class in the 2024 elections and beyond.** But it was _only_ because of the organizing of groups like the Working Families Party and activists like you that a grassroots progressive candidate like me was able to defy the odds and overcome the obstacles that our system puts in front of us. I ran my campaign on a vision for a Philadelphia that leads the nation in local, transformative policy-making that supports youth, houses neighbors, empowers workers, and provides communities with all of the resources they need to thrive. Today, I can proudly say that vision is one step closer to reality. But my work — _our work_ — isn't done yet. We need to keep building a country for the many, with strong schools, good jobs, and safe communities. We need to _transform_ the status quo that has held this country back for too long. **To do this, we need everyone to pitch in. That’s why I’m proud to call myself a member of the Working Families Party.[Click here to join me in making an end-of-year contribution to the Working Families Party now, and help keep growing this movement for cities and towns that work for all of us in 2024 and beyond.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUGKhNBve-r211KADe6vOZnU6QHrLJYE8ttrb9C6T7dkEZjH89SH8o3e7ScVkmrmTPHdU19_iEBysf2U1ZTknSXyDe1L7nj-59z68_nRBEfvpH3ZJiKQdv1JbT6k_t_ziSifhgEJLYCaqM6_s_tJx3tFHke1Y9ep14S86gGPRKdjHclq1qk-HpG58uYUA9brzofKTaW0YPeoHv1QTbOzUPu6lyATkCrZjH6AK1QAI_mESM0qYJj98rxNMe2HsySzoSDIy4stfgPyBxamN8ICBelepcrqzn-SxeffWeCjC0Xt6ej3RGHUDw81KcHL6Kqq5_4GE4DVBH6PlWJ1PjAoNozw/42d/Wp10rycNT0CdULGYP90BnA/h2/Lw1DmA7VYKlIJl1JpM993ilxxdV4F7hLoGgkC5FGSE8)** clean_body: We need to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long. | | | Hi, Peter, it’s Nicolas O’Rourke. I’m a pastor and organizer — and the newest Working Families Party city councilmember in Philadelphia. In a few moments, But first, I wanted to take a moment to explain why fundraisers like this are so important. This year, we ran a historic, third-party campaign against billionaire-backed Super PACs and an entrenched political establishment to leave Philadelphia’s Republican Party in the dustbin of history, and return power where it belongs — in the hands of the community. Together, we showed that when we reach out to our neighbors of all backgrounds, and build coalitions to facilitate real and unified change, we can’t be stopped. And we didn’t just erode Republican influence in Philadelphia — we laid the groundwork for progressive candidates in other major cities across the country, and for mobilizing the multiracial working class in the 2024 elections and beyond. But it was only because of the organizing of groups like the Working Families Party and activists like you that a grassroots progressive candidate like me was able to defy the odds and overcome the obstacles that our system puts in front of us. I ran my campaign on a vision for a Philadelphia that leads the nation in local, transformative policy-making that supports youth, houses neighbors, empowers workers, and provides communities with all of the resources they need to thrive. Today, I can proudly say that vision is one step closer to reality. But my work — our work — isn't done yet. We need to keep building a country for the many, with strong schools, good jobs, and safe communities. We need to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long. To do this, we need everyone to pitch in. That’s why I’m proud to call myself a member of the Working Families Party. Thank you for all your support, Nicolas O’Rourke Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Our holiday tradition
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=948%2E135344%2EQk4rzJ)

Friend,
We all have our own traditions around the holidays, so I wanted to take a moment today to share mine with you.
Each year, my family and I do our best to spend about a week together, usually within driving distance of one of our homes. I’ll be trying to sneak in a little bit of time to relax and see my family before a crazy election year officially starts.
This year, I’m taking some of my nieces and nephews on a bunch of day-adventures around Detroit. There are so many things to do in the city, but here are some options:
* Kid-focused tour of the Detroit Institute of Art
* The Mandela Exhibit at the Henry Ford Museum
* The Black Panther costume exhibit at the Wright Museum
* The DNR Outdoor Adventure Center
* Elf, with the Detroit Symphony Orchestra live music
* Lots and lots of sugary snack options in between

Whatever your tradition, I just wanted to once again say thank you for being a part of this campaign.
I cannot overstate how much I appreciate your support: the notes, the calls, the Facebook messages, the advice, the impromptu “Slotkin for Senate” crafts, and more than anything, for your belief that together we can protect Michigan's open Senate seat for Democrats.
Enjoy these final days of 2023. I am grateful to know that I will have you with me as we prepare for what's to come in 2024.
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=948%2E135344%2EQk4rzJ).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=948%2E135344%2EQk4rzJ)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Marshall for Congress
subject: Tell SCOTUS: Don’t outlaw Mifepristone!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
Peter, after overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , the Supreme Court is set to decide whether to limit access to Mifepristone, a key abortion drug.
Mifepristone is part of a safe, proven two drug regimen that is used for [53 percent](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDP9LDYX80AM5IjPqzQcIzQP0i2d1wMc7Y37vE5ili13Ump6tVEYY_0dnjmA462wo5CUykPR5GTmZ3q3h127Z6LYrEhcJtfS1VeVgvSRAchiILOL_Q1Fqcw_IC2DnEeiMeDQWFgGYIAtVmlWL2GV_ViDNoSZZWOgmQ1dTGuqlJNbHM7go9FRm50AK7Fn7yMFl7PYUgEALEqgmIM_Nz_q2m9Eu1ExTzwTQ2DXO8286Hc2EEDL_HDsBm08nTInPacVGu7R0kdujsN0MudRRlrKufi8nresjKJhslEcRjQphfOOS_j-yYFs8TLMrZAByjnQyo6b_2y8UKMGXApp3T8SXWALxjToDHNxwxki_5a6-gHT0/42d/cIMvYfYVSQ-ZUf9jviouKw/h0/9crFiQi3_3lQa730Fxsspb_LrEpC83TNACDeHGVf8X0) of all abortions in the US.
Earlier this year, an extremist federal judge in Texas suspended the FDA’s approval of the drug. The Supreme Court stayed the ruling, so Mifepristone is available for now... pending their ruling this summer.
**Despite being widely used for more than TWENTY YEARS, anti-abortion advocates, bent on controlling women’s lives, are disingenuously disputing the drug’s safety in an effort to ban the drug _nationwide_.**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75709249/445507582/1436736915?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzM4MzE1NDAtYmRhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RHJ1OtBoR4CCG4zh9bwMNONIw9DlTJmino1_KLsoNj0=)
Peter,

Happy holidays! The holiday season is one of my favorite times of year – I love spending time with our family and friends.

We will be shopping and cooking for our annual Christmas gathering with a wonderful blend of family and chosen family members. And this is not our only family tradition around the holidays. Somewhere along the line, we decided the holidays were a good time to plan pranks on one another.

Last year, one of my daughters (safely) turned our dog, Olaf, into the Grinch while I was out shopping. 😂
_Olaf the Grinch (pet-safe coloring was used!)_
Funny business aside, I am feeling extra thankful this year. I am so grateful for your support of my grassroots campaign to keep CA-47 blue.

Our success is owed to supporters like you – whether you chip in donations, volunteer to knock on doors or make phone calls, or even just open messages like this one.

Today, I just want to wish you a wonderful holiday and express my deepest thanks.

In unity,

Joanna

clean_body: | = Peter, Happy holidays! The holiday season is one of my favorite times of year – I love spending time with our family and friends. We will be shopping and cooking for our annual Christmas gathering with a wonderful blend of family and chosen family members. And this is not our only family tradition around the holidays. Somewhere along the line, we decided the holidays were a good time to plan pranks on one another. Last year, one of my daughters (safely) turned our dog, Olaf, into the Grinch while I was out shopping. 😂 Olaf the Grinch (pet-safe coloring was used!) Funny business aside, I am feeling extra thankful this year. I am so grateful for your support of my grassroots campaign to keep CA-47 blue. Our success is owed to supporters like you – whether you chip in donations, volunteer to knock on doors or make phone calls, or even just open messages like this one. Today, I just want to wish you a wonderful holiday and express my deepest thanks. In unity, Joanna | **=** | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS Joanna Weiss for Congress PO Box 3122 Costa Mesa, CA 92628 United States

subject: There's a target on my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
The GOP is blatantly trying to kick me out of Congress |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75709282/445507726/1878606714?refcode=20231223_McBathSplit_ND&sourceid=1052608&refcode2=WTEFHL54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTAyY2YxMy1iZGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-jKg97LfGV3UW6qi5KYbCP0vijJ8clcGRq00kQ2m5w=) **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75709283/445507761/1878606714?refcode=20231223_McBathSplit_ND&sourceid=1052608&refcode2=WTEFHL54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTAyY2YxMy1iZGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-jKg97LfGV3UW6qi5KYbCP0vijJ8clcGRq00kQ2m5w=)** Hey Peter — I'm Congresswoman Lucy McBath, a proud Democrat representing Georgia's 7th District. **The Georgia state legislature _just passed_ new Congressional maps that redrew my district to be over 20 points Republican. **I'm going to ask for your support in fighting back, but first let me tell you my story...

**I never thought I'd become an activist, but everything changed when my son Jordan was shot and killed in November 2012.** _As a grieving mother, I decided I had to turn my pain into purpose._ I began working as an organizer and activist for gun safety organizations and eventually ran for Congress in a district deemed impossible for Democrats to win. So-called "experts" told me not to raise the issue of gun safety reform in Georgia, but I knew my community better. [**I've become a leading voice on gun violence prevention in Congress, but a recent court ruling has put my reelection into question. The state legislature just passed the new Georgia Congressional maps, and the district I represent is now tilted toward the GOP by +20. Can you please split a donation between myself and EMILYs List to help me fight back before the judge makes a ruling?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75709284/445507762/1878606714?refcode=20231223_McBathSplit_ND&sourceid=1052608&refcode2=WTEFHL54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTAyY2YxMy1iZGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-jKg97LfGV3UW6qi5KYbCP0vijJ8clcGRq00kQ2m5w=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75709285/445507763/1878606714?refcode=20231223_McBathSplit_ND&sourceid=1052608&refcode2=WTEFHL54&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTAyY2YxMy1iZGExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-jKg97LfGV3UW6qi5KYbCP0vijJ8clcGRq00kQ2m5w=)

clean_body: The GOP is blatantly trying to kick me out of Congress | = = Hey Peter — I'm Congresswoman Lucy McBath, a proud Democrat representing Georgia's 7th District. The Georgia state legislature just passed new Congressional maps that redrew my district to be over 20 points Republican. I'm going to ask for your support in fighting back, but first let me tell you my story... I never thought I'd become an activist, but everything changed when my son Jordan was shot and killed in November 2012. As a grieving mother, I decided I had to turn my pain into purpose. I began working as an organizer and activist for gun safety organizations and eventually ran for Congress in a district deemed impossible for Democrats to win. So-called "experts" told me not to raise the issue of gun safety reform in Georgia, but I knew my community better. = | = You see, my outspokenness on the gun violence epidemic has put a target on my back. The NRA (and the GOP politicians they back) have been attacking me for years. They know I won't back down, and they've done everything they can to force me out of Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for having my back, Rep. subject: Is Powerball Rigged? 7-Time Lotto Winner Reveals What to Watch Out For
body:

better chance of becoming the president of the US than of winning
at the Lottery...

there crushing the lottery CONSISTENTLY, every single month?
I'm not sure you're going to like
what this 7-time lotto winner has to say...
Because the TRUTH is...
You NEVER stood a chance of
winning the lottery... (They trick you into choosing the wrong

revenge...
And find out the only thing you

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: How many will be enough?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Right now, we are seeing two very different visions for the future of
America and the world.

Last week, Congress approved giving $886 billion of our tax dollars to
fund bombs, weapons, and war crimes. I voted against this massively
wasteful budget for war and destruction, which was the largest military
budget in the history of our country. This budget is impossible to justify
when our neighbors are struggling to put food on the table, fighting to
keep a roof over their heads, and rationing their medication.

My constituents sent me to Congress to invest in life and in everyday
working people. Last week, I was proud to stand alongside United Auto
Workers (UAW) President Shawn Fain and other union leaders calling for a
ceasefire now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231223-rt.gY8MRu&refcode=em20231223-32438&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32438%2E1203867%2EJrvvw_ ]Michigan Advance: Tlaib joins with UAW's Fain and others to call for
Gaza ceasefire

At the ceasefire rally, UAW President Shawn Fain said:

“The world has seen enough slaughter and devastation. Peace is the only
path forward... As union members, we know we must fight for all workers and
suffering people around the world. We must fight for humanity.”

My Yaba (dad) was a UAW member and I wish he was alive today to see his
union stand up and courageously say: Ceasefire now!

But even as our movement demanding a ceasefire grows, Congress continues
to fund more bombs and more senseless killing.

Why aren’t over 18,000 Palestinians killed enough for my colleagues to say
the words, ‘Ceasefire now’? Why aren’t over 7,000 children killed enough
for my colleagues to call for a lasting ceasefire for an end to this war?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231223-rt.gY8MRu&refcode=em20231223-32438&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32438%2E1203867%2EJrvvw_ ]Donate to Justice Democrats and my campaign today to power our
ceasefire movement, as we raise our collective voice saying: “We choose
life over death.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231223-rt.gY8MRu&refcode=em20231223-32438&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32438%2E1203867%2EJrvvw_ ]Contribute $3

Thanks to you, our movement is growing.

Together, we will keep demanding not only a ceasefire, but also an end to
the blockade on Gaza, an end to the dehumanizing system of apartheid, and
the return of all hostages and those arbitrarily detained. We will keep
pushing back against oppression here and abroad, and advocating for human
rights and freedom for all people around the world.

In solidarity,

Rashida

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32438%2E1203867%2EJrvvw_ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32438%2E1203867%2EJrvvw_ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231223-32438-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32438_1203867_Jrvvw_&akid=32438%2E1203867%2EJrvvw_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32438%2E1203867%2EJrvvw_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a ceasefire through [ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them using [ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this critical moment. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Team Kelly
subject: Wishing you a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Reflecting on the challenges and triumphs we've shared throughout the past year
#

Hey there, friends,
We hope this message finds you well, and that you’re looking forward to spending some quality time with family and friends over the next several days.
We’ve been reflecting on the challenges and triumphs we've shared throughout the past year, and wanted to take a moment to express our gratitude for all of your support.
And as we approach the holidays, Mark and Gabby wanted us to extend their warmest wishes to you and your loved ones.
[**In the spirit of the season, we were hoping you could sign their holiday card. Please, add your name alongside many more of Mark and Gabby’s strongest supporters.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-christmas-2023/?source=em231223-1-f&refcode2=5682.6688874.YCZYJK&akid=5682%2E6688874%2EYCZYJK)
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-christmas-2023/?source=em231223-1-f&refcode2=5682.6688874.YCZYJK&akid=5682%2E6688874%2EYCZYJK)**
Looking ahead to the new year, it’s our hope that the strength of our shared values and goals will help guide the way to victories in 2024 and beyond.
Thank you for sticking with us and for being an integral part of this team. Your support is essential to our success. And we’re excited to face the challenges and opportunities that 2024 will bring, together.
Wishing you a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5682%2E6688874%2EYCZYJK).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Wishing you a happy, healthy, and peaceful holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
I know 2023 has been a tough year for a lot of us. The continued war in Ukraine and the war in Israel and Gaza have affected so many of us deeply and personally.
Amid the darkness, I am also reflecting on the light and on everything we’ve been able to accomplish together – fighting for reproductive rights, privacy rights, and LGBTQ+ rights; working to make child care more affordable and accessible; fighting to prevent drug shortages; making sure our service members and their families have the resources they need and deserve; and making sure the U.S. is leading with our values around the world.
I remain so grateful to be representing my district and our country in Congress – serving in House Democratic leadership and elevating San Diego’s priorities nationally. It’s the honor of a lifetime to do this work on behalf of the community I love.
Wishing you a happy, healthy, and more peaceful 2024,
Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
P.S. As we close out the year, I also wanted to share one of my favorite passages from The Talmud. “ Do not be daunted by the enormity of the world’s grief. Do justly now, love mercy now, walk humbly now. You are not obligated to complete the work, but neither are you free to abandon it.”

clean_body: | | | | It’s time for the airing of grievances | Happy Festivus, Peter. The tradition of Festivus begins with the airing of grievances. | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- ==

clean_body: Not asking for a donation. | = | Hey Peter, it's Josh. I recently filed for re-election in California’s 9th district - which is already shaping up to be one of the most competitive races in the country in 2024! Our election against my GOP opponent Kevin Lincoln is on March 5th. By endorsing my campaign, you’re sending a message that we have real grassroots support behind us. That’s how we’re going to win this race without the help of corporate PACs or special interests. I’ve always relied on this grassroots team to win some of the closest races in the country. In fact, our race was one of the last called on Election Night! With supporters like you by my side, we flipped the House blue to protect our healthcare in 2018, defeated two Trump-backed extremists in 2020 and 2022, and this year will be our most challenging campaign yet. Your commitment in 2024 is critical so we can protect our democracy against MAGA extremists and defend a woman’s right to choose. Thanks for your support! \- Josh *

| Merry Christmas 2023!
---
|
---
| We Wish You A Merry Christmas!
---
| Hello friends,
Tomorrow is Christmas Eve. Tracy and I are super excited to have our children home including our recently married son John and his wife Emily. Don't forget the miracle of Jesus is the reason for the season. Tracy and I have had a lot of fun this year meeting you and making friends all over Virginia. We wish you and yours a Merry Christmas!
Fellow legislators and I have been getting ready for the 2024 session that begins Monday January 10!
Here is some of what has been on my mind and some of what we have been up to:
---
| Thank You Governor Youngkin!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Tracy and I had a wonderful time at the Governor's Mansion with the Governor, First Lady, and fellow legislators. The cost of living is up everywhere and the folks are struggling. Governor Youngkin is proposing sweeping tax cuts for all Virginians in the the new year to include eliminating the Car Tax. The Governor said of the Car Tax, "It belongs in the trash can". Will the Democrats in the Senate and House cooperate fellow Republican legislators in January so we can give the people a break?
---
| 29 Degrees in Lynchburg Virginia!
---
|
---
|
---
| It was 29 Degrees (Frogman Weather) waving at cars in Lynchburg this week. I have been having fun campaigning all over the 5th Congressional District. I can't wait to meet you.
Bob Good must be really be anti Trump to endorse Trump's opponent Ron DeSantis less than a year after receiving a Trump endorsement, before DeSantis even announced for president, and on the day Trump received a ridiculous indictment. [If you click this link and watch the video, you will ask yourself what else is Bob Good not telling you the truth about.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sNXW9ulx2PuG_6t5pYldnLIcBhuH0jsl8Lew6Djc3xgk9b62ayucVqXjfw0pTvCtvG0cTDyyhbd9FpsMLPXTjpS4d3TtyVoPqB_6EioqFc0iLwe8AatF7vgUtJzJoyc0-j2qgHT832kSdzKUqUWfKZinyxfpiORU7CjqOWDJ_60VefbW8YGHk4zRvyF5ZCKpBNcbRaReMCVgFOPs5SXGjYdD4ZkAAuEOrzMkfHCxBmSGFlfN6_d_JSbI17afttElmvQ30HRd_OLQSGVOvQOXP1BfDYN_3gEr_r_p4r4L3bM3LynyVBhGeU0Z5nKba8XI41qEdGLX86J_lJcYKcuP2Q==&c=rpHDv3iucAHjNTr749yZMYPSSKM6v-zhQBFw907bi5BTuEB96fOp5w==&ch=QeXMbK0UHDVjAlTJ94tnLnjwR4Js14PewkdQMl1TipDt_-72Hltl6w==) I am also hearing more and more stories across the district on the campaign trail of Bob Good's indefensible behavior towards his constituents. We can do better than Good!
The one man strong enough to Save America is Donald J Trump. Please make a plan to vote. We have 45 days of early voting, the first day to vote is January 19, 2024. The 2024 presidential Virginia primary final day to vote is March 5. We are praying for Trump and our nation. God will determine the outcome!
Visit the Trump [campaign website here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sNXW9ulx2PuG_6t5pYldnLIcBhuH0jsl8Lew6Djc3xgk9b62ayucVhn3LQff9jS2nMqwb8wn-1OA2s6nXxX-DM8g6v59NHVREvSGnN9vfvTEN9rW5ELn1diHgWP4JS0qsAuMZQvYK6nTPLPbQ46xqQ==&c=rpHDv3iucAHjNTr749yZMYPSSKM6v-zhQBFw907bi5BTuEB96fOp5w==&ch=QeXMbK0UHDVjAlTJ94tnLnjwR4Js14PewkdQMl1TipDt_-72Hltl6w==)

Tom Leonard, proprietor of Tom Leonard's Farmer's Market, was appointed to [Virginia's Small Business Commission](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sNXW9ulx2PuG_6t5pYldnLIcBhuH0jsl8Lew6Djc3xgk9b62ayucVnrg_L4e5WpuNO-Co3Hvo3VBTvPcpQaYVo1lXpQcb2AW7nXx_Q03Wjn2WocmGoEEc2IxRIYbgWsubwTMZYCQ1JDIrkF7XsxlPYoE4pAt2YzQZcn7WkITBXk=&c=rpHDv3iucAHjNTr749yZMYPSSKM6v-zhQBFw907bi5BTuEB96fOp5w==&ch=QeXMbK0UHDVjAlTJ94tnLnjwR4Js14PewkdQMl1TipDt_-72Hltl6w==) by Governor Glenn Youngkin.

| Colorado Supreme Court Election Interference
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
Trump is a danger to the broken status quo, which is why they hate him. The Colorado ruling = ivory tower elitists trying to take power from We the People. It will fail. This is more election interference from radical Democrats. The American people are waking up. Even former Democrat Governor Wilder said on the WRVA John Reid Show this week "The decision in Colorado is stupid and will not succeed". This outrageous banana republic stuff will be overturned by SCOTUS. I'm 100% on Trump's team unlike my opponent Never Trumper Rep. Bob Good.
| Welcome Tammy Brankley Mulchi
---
|
---
|
---
| Congratulations! We welcomed our newest State Senate Republican nominee and fellow Trump supporter Tammy Brankley Mulchi at the Republican State Senate Caucus Meeting in Richmond at the Jefferson Hotel. She won a tough six way mass meeting around 2am Tuesday and then rallied to join us just a few hours later in Richmond. Senator Ryan McDougle (Hanover) introduced her to the crowd.
Tammy will face a Democrat opponent at a special election scheduled by Governor Glenn Youngkin for Jan. 9 to fill the seat. [Visit Tammy Brankley's website here to donate, volunteer, and learn more.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sNXW9ulx2PuG_6t5pYldnLIcBhuH0jsl8Lew6Djc3xgk9b62ayucVv5gTbB_xellgSE1SaZvmCcQ4o_vcmY2j0_nkYuVK5NEVOudyKp-YiemXEdkA22ysZxn61woNoaSKlkc9tUFoLIYc4A1FIxCog==&c=rpHDv3iucAHjNTr749yZMYPSSKM6v-zhQBFw907bi5BTuEB96fOp5w==&ch=QeXMbK0UHDVjAlTJ94tnLnjwR4Js14PewkdQMl1TipDt_-72Hltl6w==)

| RIP Uncle Pat McGuire
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Today, Tracy and I attended the funeral for my Uncle Pat. A great American, he impacted many lives and was a real example of a Servant Leader. I remember, when I was small, he would pick me up from my foster home on the weekends and buy me stuff like a cap gun, a Batmobile, or a book. Strong in his faith, Uncle Pat was married to my Aunt Linda 49 years, served in the Army reserves for 43 years, volunteered for 48 years with the Forest View Rescue Squad, and coached high school girls softball. RIP Uncle Pat. [Click here for the obituary in the Henrico Citizen. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sNXW9ulx2PuG_6t5pYldnLIcBhuH0jsl8Lew6Djc3xgk9b62ayucVnrg_L4e5WpuaZsYKcWHdtXZN2_Io0u-FKG_1qhlxQW3CJm3oi7Y28ZgufGpidTUMBHLhr6Chb2Y4R7ZIrx8vJxMhtqC1ekaSA4P-Pu2IewJ0h1HCSJPIDXyedr8ClPwVQ3d0t8n5mAJ9TGjqhYfDdsIMtAWJa0PNQ==&c=rpHDv3iucAHjNTr749yZMYPSSKM6v-zhQBFw907bi5BTuEB96fOp5w==&ch=QeXMbK0UHDVjAlTJ94tnLnjwR4Js14PewkdQMl1TipDt_-72Hltl6w==)

| It was an honor to celebrate the holidays with students at Goochland High School with fellow Veterans at the Goochland Veterans Project Holiday Party. Thank you for supporting our Veterans!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | Merry Christmas 2023! | | We Wish You A Merry Christmas! | Hello friends, Tomorrow is Christmas Eve. Tracy and I are super excited to have our children home including our recently married son John and his wife Emily. Don't forget the miracle of Jesus is the reason for the season. Tracy and I have had a lot of fun this year meeting you and making friends all over Virginia. We wish you and yours a Merry Christmas! Fellow legislators and I have been getting ready for the 2024 session that begins Monday January 10! Here is some of what has been on my mind and some of what we have been up to: | Thank You Governor Youngkin! | | | | | Tracy and I had a wonderful time at the Governor's Mansion with the Governor, First Lady, and fellow legislators. The cost of living is up everywhere and the folks are struggling. Governor Youngkin is proposing sweeping tax cuts for all Virginians in the the new year to include eliminating the Car Tax. The Governor said of the Car Tax, "It belongs in the trash can". Will the Democrats in the Senate and House cooperate fellow Republican legislators in January so we can give the people a break? | 29 Degrees in Lynchburg Virginia! | | | It was 29 Degrees (Frogman Weather) waving at cars in Lynchburg this week. I have been having fun campaigning all over the 5th Congressional District. I can't wait to meet you. Bob Good must be really be anti Trump to endorse Trump's opponent Ron DeSantis less than a year after receiving a Trump endorsement, before DeSantis even announced for president, and on the day Trump received a ridiculous indictment. == I am also hearing more and more stories across the district on the campaign trail of Bob Good's indefensible behavior towards his constituents. We can do better than Good! The one man strong enough to Save America is Donald J Trump. Please make a plan to vote. We have 45 days of early voting, the first day to vote is January 19, 2024. The 2024 presidential Virginia primary final day to vote is March 5. We are praying for Trump and our nation. God will determine the outcome! Visit the Trump == | Tom Leonard | | On my way back from Richmond, I stopped by to wish my friend Tom Leonard a Merry Christmas! Tom Leonard, proprietor of Tom Leonard's Farmer's Market, was appointed to == by Governor Glenn Youngkin. | Colorado Supreme Court Election Interference | | | | ---|--- | Trump is a danger to the broken status quo, which is why they hate him. The Colorado ruling = ivory tower elitists trying to take power from We the People. It will fail. This is more election interference from radical Democrats. The American people are waking up. Even former Democrat Governor Wilder said on the WRVA John Reid Show this week "The decision in Colorado is stupid and will not succeed". This outrageous banana republic stuff will be overturned by SCOTUS. I'm 100% on Trump's team unlike my opponent Never Trumper Rep. Bob Good. | Welcome Tammy Brankley Mulchi | | | Congratulations! We welcomed our newest State Senate Republican nominee and fellow Trump supporter Tammy Brankley Mulchi at the Republican State Senate Caucus Meeting in Richmond at the Jefferson Hotel. She won a tough six way mass meeting around 2am Tuesday and then rallied to join us just a few hours later in Richmond. Senator Ryan McDougle (Hanover) introduced her to the crowd. Tammy will face a Democrat opponent at a special election scheduled by Governor Glenn Youngkin for Jan. 9 to fill the seat. == | RIP Uncle Pat McGuire | | | | | Today, Tracy and I attended the funeral for my Uncle Pat. A great American, he impacted many lives and was a real example of a Servant Leader. I remember, when I was small, he would pick me up from my foster home on the weekends and buy me stuff like a cap gun, a Batmobile, or a book. Strong in his faith, Uncle Pat was married to my Aunt Linda 49 years, served in the Army reserves for 43 years, volunteered for 48 years with the Forest View Rescue Squad, and coached high school girls softball. RIP Uncle Pat. == | Another Trump Victory! | | The Supreme Court Denies Special prosecutor Jack Smith's Extraordinary Gamble. It was decided the Supreme Court won't ignore the court of appeals. Special Prosecutor Jack Smith wanted to ignore procedural process and skip the appeals court and go straight to the Supreme Court to maintain his planned trial date intended to prevent Trump from campaigning right before the Iowa Caucus. This move demonstrated to the world Jack Smith is a political hack. He cared more about getting the trial in before Super Tuesday than justice. Democrats are determined to make 2024 an election decided by special interest lawyers and courts, not by voters. == | Jason Miyares Speaks to Virginia Free | | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler (Hanover) and I attended the Virginia Free Senate Holiday Reception. You could have heard a pin drop when Jason Miyares spoke facts and statistics. He said "let's remain committed to supporting our free market and workforce." "Together, Virginia will remain the best place to live, work, and raise a family." | Nicole Frost | | Tracy and I ran into our friend and State Farm Insurance Agent Nicole Frost of Hanover County at the Jefferson Hotel for the Senate Holiday Reception. | Goochland Veterans Project | | | | | It was an honor to celebrate the holidays with students at Goochland High School with fellow Veterans at the Goochland Veterans Project Holiday Party. Thank you for supporting our Veterans! The Goochland Veterans Project is a co-curricular project connecting Goochland High School students with veterans to promote leadership, civic engagement, community involvement, and respect for veterans. We are recommending this be a model for all of Virginia. You can learn more about @GHSVetProject by contacting Mrs. Rachel Tate RTate@glnd.k12.va.us | I am looking forward to celebrating Christmas with family and friends. Our best days are ahead of us. I'm running for Congress to help Trump Save America from radical Marxist policies that put America last. Unlike my opponent Bob Good, I've been all over the district and I can tell you the fifth Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | | | | == | == | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA New Email: john@mcguireva.com New Website: www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

Peter – from my family to yours, happy holidays!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75710680/445512895/-233825198?refcode=em-12.23.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTY2OTM3MC1jMWExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OlDGdaeZhjsm1TCne4tyUGv5vl_l_Vu2irQ3KKxkqGM=)
I hope that you have a wonderful holiday with your family and friends. This year, I am incredibly thankful for your support of our campaign to flip CA-27 blue.

Thanks to your support, our campaign has been able to ramp up our operations ahead of our election year – holding more community events, meeting more voters on the trail, and so much more.

I can’t wait to continue what we’ve started in the new year. There is no better time to hit the ground running and spread our message across the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys.

But before I get ahead of myself, I want to take time this holiday season to thank you for your support – whether you’ve donated, signed a petition, volunteered, or even clicked on a message like this one.

I know that together we will win this competitive race and give CA-27 the true representation it deserves.

With thanks,

George

🎄🧑🎄🎁 If you celebrate, I want to wish you a Merry Christmas. 🎄🧑🎄🎁 I start looking forward to Christmas Day right after kickoff at our annual McBride family Thanksgiving Day soccer game (quick picture from this year’s game 👇). | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75710820/445513318/830261073?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231225_na_holiday_cand_nc_act_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDk3YjA0Yi1jMmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nw3tb1kao7kpxWtImkS5BFQ7URWsBhq4cgFHVuxzFYg=)
---
Actually, full disclosure, I start looking forward to Christmas the first day of November... I promise, I only listen to Christmas music pre-Thanksgiving when I’m by myself.
That’s when the holiday season begins for me. **It’s a time of year set aside for some of the most important things: family, reflection, and cheesy movies on the Hallmark channel.**
Waking up early on Christmas morning is quite a bit different now that I’m older. It’s been a while since I was the youngest in the house, waking everyone up to open presents.
Today, it’s my nieces and nephews that bring the energy, joy, and, well, chaos on Christmas day.
**My parents, my brothers and their kids, and I open presents and then spend the rest of the day rotating between playing with our gifts, reliving Christmases past and laughing (like when my brother tried to tell me that Santa wasn’t real), napping on the couch, and snacking.**
And if you need me, you can find me — the least-bad cook in the McBride family — in the kitchen trying to get something on the table in time to catch one more Hallmark movie.
— Sarah

| Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. clean_body: | = 🎄🧑🎄🎁 If you celebrate, I want to wish you a Merry Christmas. 🎄🧑🎄🎁 I start looking forward to Christmas Day right after kickoff at our annual McBride family Thanksgiving Day soccer game (quick picture from this year’s game 👇). | = Actually, full disclosure, I start looking forward to Christmas the first day of November... I promise, I only listen to Christmas music pre-Thanksgiving when I’m by myself. That’s when the holiday season begins for me. It’s a time of year set aside for some of the most important things: family, reflection, and cheesy movies on the Hallmark channel. Waking up early on Christmas morning is quite a bit different now that I’m older. It’s been a while since I was the youngest in the house, waking everyone up to open presents. Today, it’s my nieces and nephews that bring the energy, joy, and, well, chaos on Christmas day. My parents, my brothers and their kids, and I open presents and then spend the rest of the day rotating between playing with our gifts, reliving Christmases past and laughing (like when my brother tried to tell me that Santa wasn’t real), napping on the couch, and snacking. And if you need me, you can find me — the least-bad cook in the McBride family — in the kitchen trying to get something on the table in time to catch one more Hallmark movie. — Sarah | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = = = = = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. Palestinian Christians are praying for a ceasefire. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvAxWKEjsR7r6arIaPqASP2iBeYQ1AwBnpGHxkhEjlzNjd2ghtZiujh9ujOIATJLBXCfGu6j32wUPp5zSB5LvZkv8tpyaMoZ79gVQwc5iFHH0CQqeXkQeuuCzAdHr5de1F46fmycStfWiJHISgGHou3fdK8hZuxjMmzxXhOiPOO49m3nZX-2IVaM6bPquQcXJw0TyCAOz-pwacV6HxHwPxMdTW5qG4B-vGTJ7kMtjTUqFyOMOmnitwHWVueEK-LXFYrxit7AdQAi0BRJ2KG9IxkL3LTqUM794W5-Kh2OmoAcQ/42d/a_I2VnmdSsWwiDxJ_qTzRg/h0/zAwXePkvKUxLZyVuYM83-DgGNNPAKISQcBr3LCQhsQU)

Friend, Church leaders in Jesus’s birthplace decided to cancel Christmas festivities this year. Reverend Munther Isaac, who leads a church in Bethlehem in the West Bank, said: _“It's impossible to celebrate when our people are going through a genocide.”_ At his church, he set up a nativity scene featuring baby Jesus amidst rubble and wearing a keffiyeh. He said: _“If Christ were to be born today, he would be born under the rubble and Israeli shelling. This is a powerful message we send to the world celebrating the holidays.”_ Isaac traveled from the West Bank to Washington D.C. last month to meet with Congress and the Biden administration. He delivered a letter to President Biden from Bethlehem’s Christian leaders, which says: **_“We want a constant and comprehensive cease-fire. Enough death. Enough destruction. This is a moral obligation... This is our call and prayer this Christmas.”_** Palestine includes the oldest Christian communities in the world, and the Christian residents of Gaza could be entirely wiped out from the relentless bombing. Two months ago, Israel’s government dropped a bomb on Gaza’s oldest church, where hundreds were sheltering inside. One survivor said:_“We thought we would be protected by the church but unfortunately the brutal Israeli occupation does not differentiate. They have targeted churches, mosques and hospitals. There is no safe place.”_ That bomb killed 18 people who were seeking shelter, including a baby and young relatives of former Congressman Justin Amash, a fellow Palestinian American. With U.S. help and U.S. bombs, Israel’s government has killed more than 20,000 Palestinians in the past few months. Most of Gaza’s 2.3 million residents are suffering from forced starvation, dehydration, and displacement. President Biden could end this devastation. Instead, he’s sending more U.S. bombs to Israel’s military, and blocking or watering down UN resolutions for a ceasefire and humanitarian aid. As Palestinian leaders wrote in the letter to Biden that Isaac delivered: _“It is time everybody can live with dignity in this land. The Palestinian and Israeli children deserve to live, hope and dream.”_ I will keep working for real lasting peace that upholds the human rights and dignity of all people. This holiday season, may we honor the sacredness of all life and continue to push for a world where all children can live in safety and freedom. In solidarity and love, Rashida [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wXKobaCsGAH8p_GbEAOUhqdnmvXGr0JbFt6TVh4QwS7yUspJRtqNC-yCCF33rpfeo2JGCtoyfbByWc5bWCS8JSO1fyg-GN_-NbQV3quuPJpq9m3EvqVOmmq2o1FQFNpahD0w9qWhV5egYDGieVL6myO4E51VBI0N8He9maiBvvMp6njyYdgxET8NWk-jKl_CI8gND0ADzty_ogsGY_OKBqhy9hr5hW06nYaU4so41VW_YGN0ntOeqzzhslapBMrJDj824ad6BVifszRWS8M-Ip_5WZArsIjeNXDmcQK1ocPKS1qkN6Rl65bfwmG_UAvr9srLni5LUXWotK70xCF3fpWqI5VS8OpqBZkWkygGw43PTV4GXG96cAGwMYD0PNroLXM9sheFnTbaL8aTzaHcmIQUmtF_dRHWUBvdgj_hX_57fFN22O9D7r1kuhcWfIYaqvOIOO_XFXnQaLE45VBiqErWGW9UfO7KNyY72rZu9t5w/42d/a_I2VnmdSsWwiDxJ_qTzRg/h1/tCWJg23hbi5RwupsUgFeQOOVLMqBYYpd6Gn5vtohw9U)

* * *
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75710968/445513933/1575385346?code=jtk4667-su-nd&refcode=jtk4667-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY0MmE1ZC1jM2ExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYiUkL4-MXKw4sbUbIoscQ4YAqKZfbmF4kiouKxgoQo=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. clean_body: Trump rallying support in swing states | | | YOU'VE BEEN SELECTED TO REPRESENT 43614 IN A FLASH POLL: Friend: Trump has spent the last month campaigning and rallying his MAGA base in critical swing states like Florida and Iowa. This is BAD NEWS for Democrats. We cannot let Trump gain momentum in these crucial swing states — especially when data shows that this election is NECK-AND-NECK. With President Biden and Trump locked in a statistical tie, Democrats will only win with a massive turnout on Election Day. That's why we need to make sure that every single Democrat is ready to cast their ballot for President Biden — and you have been selected to represent 43614 in our live poll! Please, respond immediately to ensure that your response is counted: Who will you vote for in 2024? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: re: sitting on the sidelines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, With almost 3,000 farms and some of the most fertile soil in the country, it’s no surprise that agriculture is the number one economic driver in communities throughout Central and Southern Illinois. That’s why I was proud to join colleagues on both sides of the aisle to vote for an extension on the Farm Bill last month. While I am happy that we were able to keep vital nutrition programs like SNAP going, we owe it to farmers across the country to put aside the partisan games to finally pass a bipartisan Farm Bill that prioritizes our communities. **There is too much on the line to sit on the sidelines, so I will continue holding the line to meet this moment with the urgency it deserves.** So I will be working around the clock to ensure my colleagues are standing with me to pass a bipartisan Farm Bill that will expand job opportunities, put food on the table, and provide our farmers with the resources they deserve. **[I need a strong team standing with me in the fight to finally pass the Farm Bill. subject: I want to share this with you
body:
Whether you’ve been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=4cd6b9889b0c48fd80143d711841e425&_t=1ng1SIKjyH40iWM-k3iDQ7mBgOym8aDQIFa_LpEKj7m-Ft4kZgW74tUo3xLz2vQ9vKhtMKCnOChhfPgPqcPr2--rfp3NXOCMyjvIi26RYaI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=4cd6b9889b0c48fd80143d711841e425&_t=1ng1SIKjyH40iWM-k3iDQ7mBgOym8aDQIFa_LpEKj7m-Ft4kZgW74tUo3xLz2vQ9vKhtMKCnOChhfPgPqcPr2--rfp3NXOCMyjvIi26RYaI%3D)

Hi Peter,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4cd6b9889b0c48fd80143d711841e425&_e=cdC7wphj4gBaAdYXdCxuF977wK4myqr-cMtk8VjX3ArkHnbC3nbu68Rpi241JCKbgZLQcpv1D7H3USfkCk8jz8sDxDrwH7lgY0Mzlkn59c6bV62MiSjrC3EujQUjBpk9lkxYkhLFSS2qhluXPDT_S1vRe41_FXuAPMoLZ75546xB7xizMlZdPZVcx9GsfCHF56JkKDkA_XtUXsBu2EY8WSDR1d9eQ0HznzlRG8hVbXTLNycwj_nmkLT45AGkLbBPp6CLUGVrKRQyWUP6O-_YATfRbLROx9vkq5pXrB63M2spxV1Gs-Pv7I7pXcDyIIX6jFQxgDCq-xpIFraMxPdCm-MwBqJ8FZ_acGPWhiRUOpbYi7ltLIDHZ_HY7jFNghl8)**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable._**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4cd6b9889b0c48fd80143d711841e425&_e=cdC7wphj4gBaAdYXdCxuF977wK4myqr-cMtk8VjX3ArkHnbC3nbu68Rpi241JCKbgZLQcpv1D7H3USfkCk8jz8sDxDrwH7lgY0Mzlkn59c6bV62MiSjrC3EujQUjBpk9lkxYkhLFSS2qhluXPDT_S1vRe41_FXuAPMoLZ75546xB7xizMlZdPZVcx9GsfCHF56JkKDkA_XtUXsBu2EY8WSDR1d9eQ0HznzlRG8hVbXShYYB4p5Rj_vyWa2UrScIw3rrYMJ8R9bJmOfEmgGKE83mW-zxvo8He2GqonsRaYENswVyby5ovhrg8Qq6l0rhN2T1JViHaEgRXvkrbT8QOfe3zpQQkFMCYypv4SMyRSwb8YRP4EX9mvLSf2Sf9_le6)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.

---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.** ➡️

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4cd6b9889b0c48fd80143d711841e425&_e=cdC7wphj4gBaAdYXdCxuF977wK4myqr-cMtk8VjX3ArkHnbC3nbu68Rpi241JCKbgZLQcpv1D7H3USfkCk8jz8sDxDrwH7lgY0Mzlkn59c6bV62MiSjrC3EujQUjBpk9lkxYkhLFSS2qhluXPDT_S1vRe41_FXuAPMoLZ75546xB7xizMlZdPZVcx9GsfCHF56JkKDkA_XtUXsBu2EY8WSDR1d9eQ0HznzlRG8hVbXRZsn-HaTx0M5UZzUThLSiqtCxnLTihSKd28A1YArgVtJ6lTTPjrcEf3yUm5_MjK4L5-fyoGiMeDFKia8sWE3j-y9Z9qXkGdrbvrd2jlQr-nI0I2WUPzwoEOu54bawr0EjBqAGWHiM24GpjvJSX1dp3)
---
When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4cd6b9889b0c48fd80143d711841e425&_e=cdC7wphj4gBaAdYXdCxuF977wK4myqr-cMtk8VjX3ArkHnbC3nbu68Rpi241JCKbgZLQcpv1D7H3USfkCk8jz8sDxDrwH7lgY0Mzlkn59c6bV62MiSjrC3EujQUjBpk9lkxYkhLFSS2qhluXPDT_S1vRe41_FXuAPMoLZ75546xB7xizMlZdPZVcx9GsfCHF56JkKDkA_XtUXsBu2EY8WSDR1d9eQ0HznzlRG8hVbXRkEOxLIQwUrc-Kwz1Nx2JLzXjiaCkYsS0jBP_GB8bD315oOw3Ib-2Ms355CfqRiRl3j6_ZybXFjxD8GcauSzpehaaOTRhVuGPvIGhRO_V5hVOLOgXlu4v6KjQMl0v5Mz-wXjFxM--RI5_MnicghW88)
---

I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

clean_body: Whether you’ve been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. | | | | | Hi Peter, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable.Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. | | When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, our campaign is catching fire, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained! | | | | | | | Peter, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. President Joe Biden on Friday signed the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) for Fiscal Year 2023-24 into law, according to a White House press release. The NDAA is an important legislative item passed every year by Congress to authorize several key national security programs, such as the Department of Energy’s maintenance of the U.S. nuclear weapons stockpile, []

name: Katherine Clark
subject: Why this end-of-year fundraising push is so important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
Can you help my friend Chris Deluzio?

|
Derek, This is House Democratic Whip Katherine Clark. I want to take a moment to explain why this end-of-year fundraising push is so important, especially for my colleague, Chris Deluzio. At the end of each quarter, fundraising numbers are submitted by campaigns to the Federal Election Commission (or the FEC), which are then published for everyone to see. **And when I say everyone, I mean _everyone_.** Dark money GOP super PACs, extreme right-wing groups, and national Republican megadonors - or as Chris likes to call them, Corporate Jagoffs - are watching, especially now that we’ll be entering an election year. Posting strong numbers, including the total number of grassroots donors who support this important work, will showcase the strength and momentum behind taking back the House and putting Democrats in charge. On the flip side, showing any signs of vulnerability could invite attacks from the right. **This is particularly true for Chris — he's one of the top targets of extreme MAGA Republicans who are raising record-breaking amounts of money to try to flip PA-17 and expand their majority in the House.** The millions the GOP raises will directly translate to the size and scope of attack ads they’ll lob against Democrats like Chris, so grassroots support has a huge impact on our ability to fight back. Hitting this goal means that Chris and I will have the resources we need to respond to any attacks, build winning campaigns, and flip the House blue. [**We can flip the House, but that is only possible if we re-elect Chris. So please, before our critically important end-of-year deadline, can I count on you to support our efforts by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Chris’ today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75712569/445519779/601680766?refcode=231223_kc_eoq_split_l1&ms=231223_kc_eoq_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGViN2M2OC1jN2ExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R8-xgDm-wECOx3FY-bhJFNMSCuQaz26aTGq2dOSYPzU=) Happy Holidays!

Andrea

| | | Team, here are five reasons why we're asking you to make a donation to support Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's campaign for Senate:

1.) Rick Scott supports Trump's election lies, wants to overturn the Affordable Care Act, and wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare.

2.) _CNN_ ranks Rick Scott as one of the top 10 most vulnerable senators in Washington — **and polling shows that this race is already a statistical TIE!**

3.) Debbie is a proven fighter: She flipped a battleground seat blue, wrote the bill to expand Medicare, and is a bold advocate for working families.

4.) With Manchin announcing he’s not seeking reelection, _flipping Florida blue is CRUCIAL to saving our majority._

5.) Rick Scott is a mega-millionaire who spent $64 MILLION to buy this seat in 2018. And this time around, **he's already dumped $3 million into attack ads!**

**[Florida could decide control of the Senate, but unless Democrats like you stand with Debbie, Rick Scott will BUY this election. Folks, can we take a minute to talk about Yadira Caraveo?
Yadira is a pediatrician, accomplished legislator, and longtime advocate for children. She’s worked hard to give Coloradans a fair shot at achieving their American Dream.
In 2022, she jumped into the race for Colorado’s newest 8th congressional district.
**The pollsters said she had a 9% shot of winning this race. But thanks to grassroots supporters like you, she defied the odds in 2022 and won by just 1,000 votes — becoming the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.**
Since then, Yadira and Jason have worked hand-in-hand to deliver for hardworking Coloradans.
Now, election experts are ranking her seat as a toss-up. Far-right donors spent millions of dollars last year in Colorado — and they’re gearing up to spend millions more in 2024.
Taking back the House starts with protecting Yadira and keeping CO-08 blue. Yadira is no stranger to tough races, but she’ll need our grassroots help to overcome the GOP’s spending.

name: Bob Casey
subject: Happy holidays, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1479%2E552475%2EUFCICn)
Peter,
From my family to yours — happy holidays.
This holiday season, I’m grateful to spend time with my wife Terese, my four daughters, and my two grandsons, who I am proud to be “Bomba” to every day.
I have fond memories of when my girls were young during the holidays. Terese and I would have them wait at the top of the stairs so they could all go down and open their presents as a unit — but before that, I would take my time checking to see if Santa Claus was still there while they waited for the “all clear.” Now, we have two grandsons who can join in the festivities.
Another one of my favorite Christmas traditions is the cookies. My grandmother used to make my favorite cookie — a ball of cookie dough doused in powdered sugar that we used to call “Swedish meatballs.” Lucky for me, Terese has carried on the tradition of making them for the family and for Santa.
I’m grateful for these traditions with my family at the holidays and much more.
I’m grateful for the bravery and sacrifices of our service members, many of whom are spending this season away from their loved ones.
I’m grateful for the families across Pennsylvania who work hard, care for one another, and make this Commonwealth great.
Last but not least, I am grateful for every single person who has joined this team. I cannot continue fighting for the future of Pennsylvania without your support, and we are going to accomplish so much together in the year ahead.
Stay warm, take care, and enjoy your holidays.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey
P.S. Before you log off for the holidays, I hope you’ll consider helping our campaign. **[We’re facing a major fundraising deadline at midnight on December 31st. Could you chip in to help us reach our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231223-2?refcode=em20231223-2&refcode2=1479_552475_UFCICn&akid=1479%2E552475%2EUFCICn)**

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1479%2E552475%2EUFCICn)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1479%2E552475%2EUFCICn)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.
