clean_body: I have a simple ask today | | Fellow American, | There are 99 counties in the state of Iowa. While some candidates try to brag that they'll visit them all before the Iowa caucus, I’ll be the first presidential candidate in history to do all 99 counties twice over in less than a year AND we’ll hit it by January 2! Fellow American, for just the price of a cup of coffee (unfortunately more thanks to Bidenomics) you can help me and my team power through this weekend and head into the caucus stronger than ever knowing that we have you on our side. Other candidates are relying on being bankrolled by Super PACs, millionaire elites, and the party establishment. Our campaign – full grassroots movement – the most small-dollar donors of any campaign and myself. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: my FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Two elections, for the same seat, on the same day — against more than 30 other declared candidates from every conceivable party.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4842%2E5257348%2E8K7pk3)
Hey Derek,
Your time is valuable — especially this time of year — so I’ll be as brief as I can before we take a break from fundraising for the next few days. FEC deadlines during the end of the year are incredibly hard. Take it from someone who spends a lot of time on the road and apart from family — I know how meaningful this time of year is.
But the reality is that 8 days from now, my campaign will have to close the books and file a public report with the Federal Election Commission logging every donation and dollar we’ve raised in the past three months.
And a few weeks after that, California voters will receive ballots in the mail with my name on them in California’s primary and special election primary for the U.S. Senate race.
**Two elections, for the same seat, on the same day** — against more than 30 other declared candidates from every conceivable party.
**Only the top two will advance to November.**
Our campaign is aggressively deploying all available resources to reach millions of voters. Mail. TV ads. Hiring organizers across the state. We’re leaving no stone unturned.
Every dollar of your support helps. If you can spare it, **[please, chip in $3 or more to my campaign before this FEC deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231223_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4842%2E5257348%2E8K7pk3)** It **will** make a difference.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Adam

| Peter,

I wanted to reach out ahead of this holiday weekend and extend my genuine gratitude for your ongoing support of my campaign. You make the work of improving the lives of Long Islanders possible.

I hope you have a wonderful holiday spent with friends and family. Whether you are celebrating Christmas, the upcoming new year, or just enjoying some much-deserved rest, I am sending my best wishes your way.

Thank you for your support,

Laura

clean_body: Whether you are celebrating Christmas, the upcoming new year, or just enjoying some much-deserved rest, I am sending my best wishes your way. | = | Peter, I wanted to reach out ahead of this holiday weekend and extend my genuine gratitude for your ongoing support of my campaign. On behalf of all of us here at Team Christie, we'd like to wish you a Merry Christmas. Your support has made a difference all the way through this campaign, but we're just getting started. The greatest gift we can give to our fellow man is compassion and service – that's what Chris Christie is all about, and it's why he's running. clean_body: | | | | | On behalf of all of us here at Team Christie, we'd like to wish you a Merry Christmas. Your support has made a difference all the way through this campaign, but we're just getting started. The greatest gift we can give to our fellow man is compassion and service – that's what Chris Christie is all about, and it's why he's running. Being an American is a gift, and we are thankful for everyone who has pitched in to help Chris get the truth out and WIN for America. From our families to yours,Merry Christmas | | This week the Colorado Supreme Court decided to take Donald Trump off of the ballot. While the guy is terrible and should never be our president, the voters should decide that not the courts. | | Our southern border had record-high crossings this week. But how Donald Trump reacts and talks about the issue and the real people surrounding it is uncalled for and not fit for a president of our country. | | We had a great series of town halls this week in New Hampshire. These people will decide that our country has had enough of Donald Duck and that it is time for new leadership that can beat Joe Biden. Thank you for your continued support during this Christmas season. We wish you all a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year. The Christie Family | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: “a death panel designed to cut Medicare and Social Security behind closed doors.”
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75714347/445526372/-2102377403?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTJjYzVmMS1jZmExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXDQ4sI38oIONYAuR94uupdCS1r3mZQpt8Ues2X-Y9Y=) Peter, It feels like Medicare and Social Security have never faced such grave danger. **First,** Republicans elected Mike Johnson as House Speaker. Most of us, especially in the Senate, knew little about him. But we quickly learned that MAGA Mike has previously supported making dramatic cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security — programs that millions of Americans rely on. **Then,** shortly after being elected Speaker, Johnson proposed the creation of a “fiscal commission” for these programs — or what _Social Security Works_ refers to as “a death panel designed to cut Medicare and Social Security behind closed doors.” **Now,** with less than a year until the 2024 election, we must prepare to defend _every single_ Democratic Senate seat, because if Senate Republicans win back the majority in 2024, Mitch McConnell will put Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid up first on the chopping block — and he’ll be right in lockstep with Speaker Johnson. **Peter, I will never let down in the fight to defend the programs that millions of Americans rely on for affordable health care and a life of dignity, but I can’t do it alone.** [**With our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline just weeks away, your support will help us show MAGA Republicans that we won’t back down while they shamelessly attack working families. While Republicans have been spending the bulk of their time rolling back voting rights, Democrats have been pushing for life-saving gun violence prevention legislation, funds to mitigate the impacts of climate change, and fighting for reproductive justice. clean_body: North Carolina is a battleground state for voting rights, and as we head into 2024, Republicans aren’t slowing down in their assault on voters. | = | Peter, I wanted to check in with you as we wrap up the year, = | = North Carolina is a battleground state for voting rights, and as we head into 2024, Republicans aren’t slowing down in their assault on voters. Just last month, a federal appeals court voted to further chip away at the Voting Rights Act – removing a key section prohibiting discriminatory voting practices. Make no mistake, this is an egregious infringement on democracy itself. While Republicans have been spending the bulk of their time rolling back voting rights, Democrats have been pushing for life-saving gun violence prevention legislation, funds to mitigate the impacts of climate change, and fighting for reproductive justice. = | = | = | = | = | = Onward, Valerie * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. clean_body: | | = Peter – we’ll just get right to the point. Can you spare a buck to help us DEFEAT Republicans up and down the ballot? = = | = We've got a crucial deadline coming up and we need YOUR help. We're hustling to raise $25,000 by the end of the year to make sure we have to invest in critical races all across the country. From undermining our democracy, to attacking our fundamental rights, Republicans are destroying our country. If we don't step up now, think about what's at stake. Our values, our rights, our future—it's all on the line. And here's the deal: If we don't hit this target, we'll be at a serious disadvantage against the GOP and their MAGA millions. They're banking on us falling short. | | | Fellow American, the socialist squad makes me absolutely sick. They’re trying to take away every last one of your rights and liberties. _**Let me be clear: I've seen where this road leads, and it's not good.**_ My family escaped Communist Cuba to gain their FREEDOM in the United States. It's the race for Senate control.

The future of everything we care about — from health care and voting rights to abortion rights — will depend on who holds the Senate majority after the election. That's why I'm writing to you today.

With the retirement of Sen. Joe Manchin, we could hold every single seat we have and _still_ lose Senate control. **That's why it's so imperative that we help Colin Allred defeat Ted Cruz in Texas.**

Polls are showing these two neck and neck, and Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable GOP senator in the country. We can win this race, but the GOP knows it too — they're preparing to pour millions of dollars into Texas to lie about Colin's record and try to stop us.

**Peter, if we can match the GOP's millions, we can win in Texas and virtually guarantee our Senate majority. But if Colin misses his fundraising goals, we'll lose the best chance we have to secure Senate control.** [Please, I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $10 or more between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz and protect our Democratic Senate majority?!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZMFv6wPY_m01EOjvDWAZ8jwzL4JfT6z497uYRJB7hiIZx3-6hjlhXKyduheDeUVBpJCyd7toibDoj_VcjfYAiJYnnyGxbLaYPR5CybSBGDBfiVN4VUWBeXNvB3KG45UbeqHck8u-I9MGAh6n39lp2arqChuMjm9wl2HgRO-TMdWAIZ8GCITy_SriTkMKLCfOoKLnJzGgWP_Yl_hNyK7IQKHYIPl2ZWbYL0L6FQ_NmlRlpaujj1SIbhbmtdvHNnZTtN9ZBc4plJ1Gb9zrMNTZBO-eoDOHA4EO8svRFkjYcc5c34EiJSong8-A6M-0-C8TVkgAiUlKQR_jNHAbqiQ8KnqNogTBiBVpnP6rMweDT2dA_ITXr4YQouGYI47EzPZcwGAr8dDeL4mPmYf-swwvTIw/42d/KE9MUq-DRHm-NL5YhwSm5g/h2/x5xzMHrjWWwLeg39v5b-om2iZWXyrwa9yaE7vQs7NGc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, the most important race happening in 2024 isn't just the race for the White House. It's the race for Senate control. The future of everything we care about — from health care and voting rights to abortion rights — will depend on who holds the Senate majority after the election. That's why I'm writing to you today. With the retirement of Sen. Joe Manchin, we could hold every single seat we have and still lose Senate control. That's why it's so imperative that we help Colin Allred defeat Ted Cruz in Texas. Polls are showing these two neck and neck, and Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable GOP senator in the country. We can win this race, but the GOP knows it too — they're preparing to pour millions of dollars into Texas to lie about Colin's record and try to stop us. Peter, if we can match the GOP's millions, we can win in Texas and virtually guarantee our Senate majority. But if Colin misses his fundraising goals, we'll lose the best chance we have to secure Senate control. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you. Chuck The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! The Call for Peace this Holiday Season, 2024 Outlook, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Peace for All Town Hall w/ Barbara Lee | Fight the Filibuster
w/ Jeff Merkley| 2024 Path Forward for Progressives w/ Larry Cohen
| Education for All w/ Barbara Lee | Housing for All Town Hall w/ Ro
Khanna | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

As we head into this holiday season, the call for Peace on Earth is needed
more than ever. Our Revolution stands with our progressive movement in
calling for a ceasefire in Gaza and an end to the bombing that is killing
thousands of innocent civilians.

When you support Our Revolution, you’re helping us defend progressives who
are under attack for demanding an immediate halt to the horrific violence.
With a $5 recurring donation or a one-time $10 gift, we’ll send you this
Peace Sticker as a thank you for taking a brave stand in this critical
moment.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13104?t=1011&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]GET YOUR PEACE STICKER

★ ★ ★

Progressives are leading the call for Peace, and we have their back! Join
Barbara Lee and other special guests on Our Revolution’s Peace for All
Town Hall on Jan. 4th to join the call for a Ceasefire in Gaza and the
push for Peace.

Innocent lives are being lost and progressives in Congress calling for an
end to the bombing. But, now, the AIPAC lobby is set on spending $100
million to try to defeat some of our biggest peace champions in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13110?t=1012&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

Join U.S. Senator Jeff Merkley and U.S. Rep. Barbara Lee in conversation
on Our Revolution’s LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call on January 8th!

You won’t want to miss this deep dive into the filibuster, democracy, and
the call for peace at home and abroad. We will delve into Sen. Merkley’s
new book “Filibustered: How to Fix the Broken Senate and Save America” —
and offer a special pre-order!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13105?t=1013&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

If you’re in the Bay Area on Martin Luther King Day, we would love for you
to join Our Revolution and Barbara Lee for a LIVE in-person Town Hall on
Education for All.

Barbara will lay out her plans for education and removing barriers for
young people and people of all ages to get the knowledge and training they
need to succeed in life.

This intimate event will kick off at 6 pm on January 16th, and we will be
joined by Our Revolution’s local chapter, San Francisco Education
Alliance!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13106?t=1014&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

Join Our Revolution for this year’s Reducing the Threat of Nuclear War
Conference — one of the nation’s most significant gatherings of Nuclear
Disarmament advocates, led by Massachusetts Peace Action.

Guest speakers will include U.S. Rep. Ro Khanna, OR Board Chair Larry
Cohen, Shailly Gupta Barnes of the Poor Peoples Campaign, Prof. Alan
Robock of Rutgers University, Dr. Ira Helfand of the Back from the Brink
Campaign, and many other leading peace advocates.

We are in a period of unusual danger and difficulty: The Russia/Ukraine
conflict has sharply increased the danger of nuclear war; The tragic
Israel/Gaza Conflict threatens to expand; The Pentagon budget is higher
than ever and still going up; Cold Warriors in high places are beating the
drums of war toward Russia and China; And, within the US right wing forces
are working to weaken voting rights and representative democracy.

We must keep the candle lit for peace.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13111?t=1015&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

AIPAC lobbyists are preparing to spend more than $100 MILLION to try to
replace pro-peace members of Congress like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Cori
Bush, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and others — at a time when 66% of
Americans want our government to work toward a ceasefire.

We must defend progressives who are bravely speaking out to demand a
ceasefire and peace in Gaza and around the world. We will not be
intimidated into backing down when such atrocities are taking the lives of
innocent civilians and children.

Help us have their backs and make sure strong antiwar voices are not
defeated by big money in 2024. With a recurring donation of $5 or more —
or a one-time donation of at least $10 — we will send you the Defend
Peace/Defend Democracy sticker above with our gratitude.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13108?t=1016&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]GET YOUR STICKER HERE

★ ★ ★

Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024
to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for
the crucial battles to come.

Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to
take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the
Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship
around.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13109?t=1017&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks to help us staff up for the big
elections ahead in 2024 — there’s no time to waste!

★ ★ ★

In September of 2001, Barbara Lee cast the lone “No” vote in Congress
against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She endured death threats,
hate mail, and media slander for years. But history vindicated her.

Today, Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California
calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. Check out this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12238?t=1018&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]LA Times article on why
Barbara is the Peace Candidate in this race compared to her opponents,
Katie Porter and Adam Schiff.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12373?t=1019&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]JOIN PROGRESSIVES FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making
calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but
this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a
powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12528?t=1020&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

We know what we’re fighting for, but we need to share the message far and
wide. Get your new Our Revolution T-shirt and advocate for our progressive
values everywhere you go!

We are proud to stand up for Education for All, Racial Justice,
Reproductive Rights, Medicare for All, Economic Justice, Labor Rights,
Housing for All, Environmental Justice, LGBT+ Rights, and so much more. In
short: JUSTICE FOR ALL.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1021&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]GET YOUR NEW SHIRT TODAY!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1022&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ][IMG]

From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an
organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re
already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1023&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly
donation today!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1024&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1025&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&amount=10&t=1026&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.8mo4ef&t=1007&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.F0hoXP&t=1008&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.SpTrYY&t=1009&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20231223_NL_RevReportRS_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.5oU_5l&t=1010&akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=5102%2E5885482%2Ebjgwh6

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

It’s a lot of fun, but this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate! [ ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA LEE ★ ★ ★ We know what we’re fighting for, but we need to share the message far and wide. Get your new Our Revolution T-shirt and advocate for our progressive values everywhere you go! We are proud to stand up for Education for All, Racial Justice, Reproductive Rights, Medicare for All, Economic Justice, Labor Rights, Housing for All, Environmental Justice, LGBT+ Rights, and so much more. In short: JUSTICE FOR ALL. [ ]GET YOUR NEW SHIRT TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an [ ]official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly donation today! [ ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! name: Team DASS
subject: Happy Holidays from all of us at DASS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89914/images/dass-logo-transparent.png]

Friends –

As this year comes to a close, we wanted to take a moment and express our sincere gratitude for all of the support you’ve shown over the past year.

In today’s political climate, it’s easy to only focus on the work we have ahead of us. But today we wanted to reflect on everything we have to celebrate and be grateful for. After all, protecting democracy is no walk in the park. With your help, we’ve been able to defend our basic freedoms and protect the integrity of our democracy.

No matter how you celebrate, we hope the season is filled with peace, laughter, and some much deserved rest. We are so thankful to you and everyone who’s been involved – in ways large and small.

Wishing a happy, healthy holiday season to you and yours,

Team DASS

Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.
Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda.

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdk-dasspac-email-footer-062022?&refcode=DASS_EM_FOOTER_BUTTON_06132022&amount=5]
Donate Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdk-dasspac-email-footer-062022?&refcode=DASS_EM_FOOTER_BUTTON_06132022&amount=5&recurring=1]

name: Team Alsobrooks
subject: Alsobrooks Campaign Weekly Newsletter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)

| | Hello, Peter! We hope you’re doing well! In the midst of the holiday season, we’re still hard at work sharing holiday cheer with Marylanders across our state. As we look ahead to the new year, Team Alsobrooks is looking forward to building on our momentum and getting Angela elected to the Senate. This week, Angela joined NAACP members for their holiday parties in Howard and Charles counties. Historically, these organizations have fought for better livelihoods for marginalized people in this country, and it was an honor to celebrate the holidays with them. She was reminded that at the end of the day, no matter our backgrounds, we all want the same thing: a strong Maryland, with safe communities to raise our families in. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2570?t=7&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2570?t=8&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2570?t=9&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2570?t=10&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN) On Monday, Angela received three major endorsements that will help us win big in this primary: Krimson Political Action Council, the Omega Network for Action, and the National Women’s Political Caucus. Check out our announcements here. [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9326?t=11&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN) **NEWS OF THE WEEK** **[Washington's winners and losers in 2023](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9327?t=12&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)** _Alsobrooks was center stage when Greenbelt landed the_**[ _FBI headquarters_](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9328?t=13&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)** _in November — setting Northern Virginia's_**[ _hair on fire_ _._ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9329?t=14&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)**
* _It was a huge win for Maryland and the affluent, majority Black suburb of Prince George's County that Alsobrooks has led since 2018._
* _She is now running for U.S. Senate, with the_[ _**endorsement**_](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9330?t=15&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN) _of Gov. Wes Moore._

Here on Team Alsobrooks, we’re proud to be a campaign powered by grassroots donors. We believe in Angela's ability to go further and do better for our communities, and we know you do too! It’s going to take all of us working together to help Angela win this May. | | | [Volunteer](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=16&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)
---
| | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9331?t=22&amount=25&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)
---
**Socials**
While we'll keep sending emails keeping you updated, the best way to keep up with Angela is on our social media channels. Follow us on Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram to follow along with us on the campaign trail!
| | [Facebook](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8814?t=17&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)
---
| | [Twitter](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8815?t=18&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)
---
| | [Instagram](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8816?t=19&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)
---
Sincerely,
Team Alsobrooks

| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)
---

| | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=782%2E52803%2EEuX0qN)

---

name: Emily (Team Debbie)
subject: What matters to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
A quick request:
| | |
---
Hey, friend, it's Emily. As Debbie's Digital Director, it's my job to make sure that our campaign reaches voters like you.
Unlike Rick Scott, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is not running to represent the ultrawealthy or fight for the interests of corporate America. **She's running to represent Floridian families and make real progress.**
So much is on the line next year: abortion rights, Social Security and Medicare, climate change action — even our democracy. Because of this, it's critical that we hear directly from grassroots Democrats so we can ensure our campaign strategy is reflective of what matters to real people (_not giant corporations_)_._
That's why we've launched a new **Daily Issues Poll**. **As one of Debbie's earliest supporters, I'm personally asking you to represent 34223 in today's dataset.**
**[I'm reviewing these results first thing tomorrow morning, so please, will you be sure to lock your response in before midnight tonight? I'm really counting on your feedback here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75715016/445529125/-1980700187?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk518-su-nd&refcode=jtk518-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIyZjc2ZWMtZDZhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=55qL4QHJWWSlHc4NhDsbU1ErOSpDjcuDlh4HOaOcKu0=&emci=35064c0e-aa9e-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=c22f76ec-d6a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=3969733)**
**_DAILY TRACKING POLL:_
What is your top issue heading into the 2024 elections?**
| | [RESPOND NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75715017/445529126/-1980700187?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk518-su-nd&refcode=jtk518-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIyZjc2ZWMtZDZhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=55qL4QHJWWSlHc4NhDsbU1ErOSpDjcuDlh4HOaOcKu0=&emci=35064c0e-aa9e-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=c22f76ec-d6a1-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=3969733)
---
Thank you so much for your feedback here. I'm looking forward to reading through your responses.

— Emily W.
Team DMP
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75715018/445529127/-31037693?code=jtk518-su-nd&refcode=jtk518-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzIyZjc2ZWMtZDZhMS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=55qL4QHJWWSlHc4NhDsbU1ErOSpDjcuDlh4HOaOcKu0=)

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: The entire team @ CADEM
subject: Happy holidays from CADEM!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
In this season of gratitude and celebration, we are so happy you are a part of our team. |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75715039/445529262/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVlNTAzNi1kN2ExLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhxU3FYQhTnaAnQfBwOq3zzotpeK_4Ak5Sdg_PqUxWI=)

body:
So we’re reopening our letter until midnight so good Democrats like you can sign!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)
---
Hey,

Last week, we sent you our special letter wishing the Biden Family happy holidays.

**But your signature is missing.** With the GOP’s sham impeachment scheme raging out of control, the Biden Family could really use some holiday cheer.

So we’re reopening our letter until midnight so good Democrats like you can add their names! [**_Click HERE or use the button below to sign the letter »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34831?t=7&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I) | [SIGN NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34831?t=8&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)
---
I’ve attached the original letter below for your records. Thanks,

Andrew

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: Bidens holiday card >> (FFR)
Subject: TO: Joe Biden & Jill Biden
To: Top Democrats
Out of thousands of Democrats, YOU were selected from your state to sign this exclusive letter showing your thanks to the Bidens – _so we’re really counting on you to take up this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!_
[**_The letter is closing at 8 AM SHARP so please don’t waste a second »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34831?t=9&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)
[Contribute $7 to sign our exclusive holiday card for President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden now! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34831?t=10&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)
---
**TO:** President Joe and First Lady Jill Biden
**FROM:** A Grateful Democrat
**Subject:** I’M THANKFUL FOR YOU THIS HOLIDAY SEASON! Dear President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden,

This Holiday season is filled with joy, hope, and good tidings all because of your hard work and dedication to serving the American people.

For that, I would like to personally say THANK YOU! [**_Despite the relentless attacks you face from MAGA Republicans, you continue to prioritize unity, protecting our freedoms, and putting people over politics. So I’m signing this card and chipping in $7 to Fight for Reform to continue to invest in critical state and local battleground races across the nation to show that Democrats will continue to stand behind your historic agenda. »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34831?t=11&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I) | [Donate $7 to support our work now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34831?t=12&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)
---
**President Biden:** You led our country out of a pandemic and strengthened our economy all while passing a historic agenda – _giving the American people a light in the darkness amidst ongoing MAGA Republican chaos!_

**Dr. Biden,** you continue to set an example of what leadership looks like, confronting every challenge with dignity and grace!

**The major wins we’ve witnessed for Democrats across the board in November’s elections are a testimony that voters are beyond pleased with your historic agenda and leadership.**

And although we anticipate the challenges awaiting us in the new year, we are ready to face them head-on knowing that your empowering and unwavering leadership will help us overcome anything.
[**_Happy Holidays to you both, and THANK YOU for how you continue to show up for the American people!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34831?t=13&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)
**_X A Grateful Democrat_**
[Donate $7 to support our work now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/34831?t=14&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)
---
| | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I).**

[Click here](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails/?t=4&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=15&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Fight for Reform »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26914?t=5&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26915?t=6&akid=20559%2E4449941%2EU1q01I)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Message from Chairwoman Karamo
body:
We Will Not Be Deterred! | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
Hello My Fellow Michiganders,
I wanted to take a moment and send a note of Merry Christmas and well wishes to all the dedicated and dependable men and women of the Michigan Republican Party.
As a Party, I have heard from county leaders and precinct delegates from across the state who are frustrated with the instigation of internal fighting and want Republicans to focus on winning, which is necessary to save our nation.
These deceptive and underhanded endeavors endanger the Michigan GOP’s drive toward victory in 2024. They also disrupt the determination of the Republican men and women who are working tirelessly to win the Spiritual war being fought on a cultural battlefield.
We will not be deterred!
We must be resolute in our efforts and actions to engage and energize Michiganders in every community, city, and county to join us in the fight to stave off the onslaught of global authoritarianism that threatens our great state and beloved country.
I am entirely optimistic about the great strides the Michigan GOP has made and will make in 2024. I ask that my fellow Michigan Republicans come together through differences and disagreements like iron sharpening iron. It is truly an honor to serve as Chairwoman for the Michigan Republican Party, and I am fully committed to working with my fellow Michiganders to ensure victory in 2024.

| [Donate to Protect our Kid’s Freedom](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6feb3684b9&e=a2af77507c)
---
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| | | | | | [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=b569551f9e&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=2be7c20226&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=3dd7a16de0&e=a2af77507c)| [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=55ecb81236&e=a2af77507c)| [](mailto:communication@migop.org)

**FIRST:** Dave McCormick announced his run for the Senate in Pennsylvania. He immediately got to work telling Pennsylvanians how he is going to shake things up in Washington.

**THEN:** Conservative leaders across the nation, including the Pennsylvania GOP, UNANIMOUSLY endorsed Dave, paving the way for him to take on incumbent Senator Bob Casey next year.

The endorsements from other Senators and conservative leaders rolled in soon after - Ted Cruz, Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, John Barrasso, Marco Rubio, Steve Daines, Marsha Blackburn, and Tom Cotton have all thrown their support behind Dave.

**NOW: Dave needs to close out 2023 STRONG if we have any hope of winning in 2024 --and he needs your help to do so!** **[Will you pitch in $5, $10, or even $50 right now?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bc5dabbe367d4a72ae2ea0c852fa9221&_e=nHIUpQkoCcpRNBuhV__4BBO6WEbjlwgbsaW_mgMa9GFuZG5KvqY_kQysw5KaNnHSjXLcPbI2qoo5qW2f1Ewr4vArxZqwvMrEvKzj-0SOkUWl5vgAUrLqkFS5r_l2oqhuuc69DP1aX69tNOdxTM2OP2yo1XUfxARnTWcRN2oUt4Tn3_hjtjKrA2l-NzKSufLn3byTSgPyz_HBBfMVYLJCd7rAOhhw9nW4GGdh2NReLckBJdFSM58iQbe-S08jl7TUeLCZh38DsgOwu-Ot0ehqUD3A_EAkUI1i24YgBSbcqs0QhWCALd7IDy4SU3x0NYuY2zFuxualCc2YdZw9Qr480v5VripUGdeyT8EIjCcozh6oyLfBJv63yRrWDaT6r634P2HI1_c8PxkQjzGJ-nk5JQ%3D%3D)** Every dollar counts! He immediately got to work telling Pennsylvanians how he is going to shake things up in Washington. THEN: Conservative leaders across the nation, including the Pennsylvania GOP, UNANIMOUSLY endorsed Dave, paving the way for him to take on incumbent Senator Bob Casey next year. The endorsements from other Senators and conservative leaders rolled in soon after - Ted Cruz, Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, John Barrasso, Marco Rubio, Steve Daines, Marsha Blackburn, and Tom Cotton have all thrown their support behind Dave. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Slipping Away:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.

|
---
| | | **The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The dream of home ownership is slipping away for too many Americans.
Consider...
* American homeownership is declining at the highest rate since the great depression.
* We lost more than 1 million homeowners in 2021 — more than in the housing crash of 2008 — and then another million in 2022.
* The median home price has risen from $250,000 in 2019 to $400,000 in 2023.

Home ownership is now out of reach for all but the very rich.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=2)
For younger Americans, home ownership is a luxury of a bygone era...and rent is the new normal.
Millions now face corporate landlords who will raise rent to the highest level the market will bear–squeezing them of jobs and opportunities.
None of this is inevitable.
As President, RFK Jr. will enact a series of policies to put home ownership back within the reach of working families.
_**RFK Jr.’s biggest plan is to implement tax-free 3% government-backed mortgage bonds, to bring the mortgage interest rate back to 2019 levels and even lower.**_
And RFK Jr.’s plan consists of financing that will come from investors, making the cost to taxpayers minimal. This measure alone will reduce monthly costs for the average home purchase by $1,000.
This innovative change will restore home ownership to tens of millions of Americans, and lower costs for tens of millions more.
[DONATE NOW >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=3)
This simple, yet significant law, will reinvigorate our economy and give hope to hundreds of thousands of young Americans who represent our future.
[Please consider a gift today to help meet our critical end of year $6 Million fundraising goal to put us on the ballot.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=4)
The maximum amount you can give is $6,600 – $3,300 for the primary and $3,300 for the general. I know that is a lot of money. **But all gifts to our campaign are critical–from $1 to $100.** [I would be grateful to you for your sacrifice.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=5)
Sincerely,
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=6)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=7) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=8) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=9) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=10) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=home_12_23_23_email_1_2_nd&n=11)

body:
Republicans will begin voting for their nominee as soon as next month. | | |
---
[Peter, if you’re looking for three reasons to donate your first $25 donation to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’s reelection campaign, look no further ⬇️: ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZnCojhadU-b1ix1YpHL0vbGADzeqRKxqJ41wJ6X41MfEFD3tq9bkmIVLyrt6TGs4ImxOxuOQFQQySwFX7xS4_bWQ-6miA4PjOyDQf1EbodeftlFP7eVDa9vyfc--57VN7KxodJ3VwQHkRfKXQGgABPFpx9eaK7aKeG231NZpxjwtG7f3OErgiTvk5xDR2aBKQ6AZo0kbwYaSRFyRkhufS3Zvjdkvt_lQ_mQ2fkuSPkgmOnjcKTIv64bOkIvjCO5IdiOyaohPnpzcSzCks4Yoh92_arZvd6ZpLTB1bjJ6ElmAQxhxqYLJJC5HCXlHEfr5Whw6iR1LDN6azusGwpkGcS7y5-060dJ0ZjNjZ9L72gbe6Gt072KXkNUA9AJnjmuUeC1rXdgapsMgW08HJzrqhfeFIwFFsgGvlXSRPz9dtC5JPWB9N3xh9IXYyOx7_G0kp6UJhEfJS-l-Tv3S2mGRPc7BHoq4djOXnX15SJtaK5JNS9sM66ioJlafHrqPIwUuV/42d/zDSBlurTR7u7O9i2eEYKXA/h0/g-HuWR--FnPXm3L1TWq-2DqiO2dcw55GwOzF49feVOQ)

**Reason #1:** Republicans will begin voting for their nominee _as soon as next month_. Trump is the overwhelming favorite and he’s calling on Republicans to focus their energy and resources on “taking back [their] country.” We have to be ready.
**Reason #2:** As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking the President with an endless barrage of negative campaign ads. We can’t let their hate-driven message sink in with voters ahead of 2024, which brings us to our next point.
**Reason #3:** Our last -- and most important -- fundraising deadline of the year is just over one week away. What we raise now, when the majority of people aren’t paying attention, is so important to the success of our campaign. Donations given today go a lot further and allow us to plan ahead and invest early in our success. **That’s how we win, Peter. With grassroots supporters like you chipping in for the first time during moments like these when the President and Vice President rely on their most engaged supporters to take a stand.** [Use this link to contribute your first $25 donation to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’s reelection campaign today. clean_body: Republicans will begin voting for their nominee as soon as next month. | | | Reason #1: Republicans will begin voting for their nominee as soon as next month. Trump is the overwhelming favorite and he’s calling on Republicans to focus their energy and resources on “taking back [their] country.” We have to be ready. Reason #2: As you read this, Republicans and outside spending groups are attacking the President with an endless barrage of negative campaign ads. We can’t let their hate-driven message sink in with voters ahead of 2024, which brings us to our next point. Reason #3: Our last -- and most important -- fundraising deadline of the year is just over one week away. What we raise now, when the majority of people aren’t paying attention, is so important to the success of our campaign. Donations given today go a lot further and allow us to plan ahead and invest early in our success. That’s how we win, Peter. With grassroots supporters like you chipping in for the first time during moments like these when the President and Vice President rely on their most engaged supporters to take a stand. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks for everything you do, Biden for President

Friend,

_Someone on my team must be confused as a goat on Astroturf._

_They told me you declined to support the GOP._

I said that must be some sort of mistake. I know you're smart as a whip, Friend.

Can you do me a favor then?

My biggest deadline of 2023 (and also one of the last ones!) is just around the corner, and I'm short a few supporters. Can you chip in just a few extra bucks?

Here's the situation: In just 8 days, we're facing our final 2023 FEC fundraising deadline. This isn't just any deadline; it's the final one before the cycle officially heats up, and it's absolutely crucial. Our efforts are under the microscope, as we strive to match the enormous funds being funneled by National Republicans into races across the country. This FEC report will reveal if we have the grassroots support necessary to triumph in November. We're in the critical final phase, Peter. name: Barbara Grassley
subject: Help Me, Surprise Chuck!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
Make this Christmas special

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=0129e94887fb46139e0b9b8ebc94b4d5&_e=1UCTAJnaiWOybmGYQu2CF-AfoLGGR_ujwWU8Ld0C4Ti95NzNkjz3VpBZocjCowms_hvnEU8WVqEDqjveFMlNz3C0icCrYo4L40bFBplKzeGzXb1GVdjCUur0Nywqz0y71KOp2WvuVVOpUwFBvH0MoQSN9XMhPtS0SpX3Y1qzkdaVDtM4dUjI1eJRAbUxuWMd3LvjNS_7Wryl0GtEIt0H01LKXCj4a0LUmERhg2PMl1WBGwzPAcrrS1LWNH7rFDGcIKV4k4JDeVzqGeV-xXUcwg53qIuGTzz4gUIUVNGeLNM%3D)

Hi there friends,

Christmas is approaching, and I want to make it a special day for Chuck. He is on Santa's nice list, and to reward him for all he's done for Iowa and America this year, I want to surprise him with our biggest fundraising day of the year!

**[Are you in the giving spirit?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=0129e94887fb46139e0b9b8ebc94b4d5&_e=1UCTAJnaiWOybmGYQu2CF-AfoLGGR_ujwWU8Ld0C4Ti95NzNkjz3VpBZocjCowms_hvnEU8WVqEDqjveFMlNz3C0icCrYo4L40bFBplKzeGzXb1GVdjCUur0Nywqz0y7kPf4RRe3m8pBI8sIo-2qgu8fTLYrtXYYpi2ojFA4vA9QRb854wWPKpMHmVIygMkhCM1ECbiQiaypoBNKEjOT35sM6xEh1DbWPxiSw_qg6G5ytfi6pg9rixmusb1OiddeAVCUYb5OOe-SvJZWC1ANbXVF45BCm1ajvm2yBhB4bvg%3D)**

********[DONATE AND WISH CHUCK A MERRY CHRISTMAS](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=0129e94887fb46139e0b9b8ebc94b4d5&_e=1UCTAJnaiWOybmGYQu2CF-AfoLGGR_ujwWU8Ld0C4Ti95NzNkjz3VpBZocjCowms_hvnEU8WVqEDqjveFMlNz3C0icCrYo4L40bFBplKzeGzXb1GVdjCUur0Nywqz0y7mAax7_3_QwKv_0IJCMsxMXAMCcoGQNQMnfPzFDFHzHnAWSL_lWAD8paDUV04HQiG7uujG3Tksam-hqNQn0syNPyBjvZNhnSYlCYiRaIXk3Ycdvdl5MRxe2V8gIm00Je6fOiivN6o9bYTP2MyhZc2VxbyapQ4NhJDPyg7UM2YfTY%3D)****

My husband relentlessly fights for hard-working Americans every single day.

Throughout his time in the Senate, Chuck has never been so worried for the future of our country. He gets up for his morning run at 4 AM every day and often works late into the night. He learned his work ethic from growing up on the farm and working on the factory floor. He has taken that same drive to the Senate floor to fight for the American people.

My husband is a true patriot and serves our country every day by fighting for policies that benefit the American people. He listens to Iowans and brings Midwestern commonsense to Washington.

**[ Donate now to support Chuck so he can keep working for YOU!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=0129e94887fb46139e0b9b8ebc94b4d5&_e=1UCTAJnaiWOybmGYQu2CF-AfoLGGR_ujwWU8Ld0C4Ti95NzNkjz3VpBZocjCowms_hvnEU8WVqEDqjveFMlNz3C0icCrYo4L40bFBplKzeGzXb1GVdjCUur0Nywqz0y72kOX34NqlRETC6Zp9l6-Q4Dmtpb1KY81y9skmNewNputKPXA5Zlt5bvU6_xMajURHrY0hDa5SOMN0BARYF-PieV63_U1S0q-T56-PqNU-ufGXrmfJMSVpo64Vj6Idylpb_RVDl0aUt0QSr5r0Tkr5qAQZrm6Io4OQWJPyH1ggxA%3D)**

Merry Christmas,
Barbara Grassley

| Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.

name: Katie Porter
subject: 1 minute read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The number we report has big implications for our campaign.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35274%2E3422442%2EoZhtm-)
Derek, our end of quarter deadline is December 31st at midnight. The number we report has big implications for our campaign—more below—but first, **[can you chip in $3 right now to help us meet our $100,000 goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231223-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_EOY_20231223_V1_F&refcode2=35274_3422442_oZhtm-&akid=35274%2E3422442%2EoZhtm-)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231223-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_EOY_20231223_V1_F&refcode2=35274_3422442_oZhtm-&akid=35274%2E3422442%2EoZhtm-)
**Why this is even a thing:** Every three months, federal election law requires campaigns like ours report how much money they have raised.
**Why it matters:** Super PACs supporting other candidates in this race are watching closely. A poor showing could incentivize them to dump millions into this race in support of our opponents. But a strong report can persuade them that it’s just not worth it.
**What makes this report unique:** It’s the final quarterly report before our March primary.
**And another big thing:** In early January, we have to make some really important spending decisions, determining how much we can spend on ads throughout the state. If we don’t reach our goal, we’ll be forced to make steep cuts.
**That’s why we set a $100,000 goal:** Polling shows this as a super tight race, so we really can’t afford to make cuts to our campaign spending.
**[Can you please make a donation of $5 or more before December 31st at midnight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231223-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_EOY_20231223_V1_F&refcode2=35274_3422442_oZhtm-&akid=35274%2E3422442%2EoZhtm-)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231223-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_EOY_20231223_V1_F&refcode2=35274_3422442_oZhtm-&akid=35274%2E3422442%2EoZhtm-)
Thanks a ton,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_2_EOY_20231223_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=35274_3422442_oZhtm-&akid=35274%2E3422442%2EoZhtm-)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=35274%2E3422442%2EoZhtm-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=35274%2E3422442%2EoZhtm-)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
